Are you still an America First conservative? | Fellow American - Joe Biden, his corrupt Department of Justice, and Merrick Garland are back at targeting me.

[**_Do you know what this is about?_**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=c4123092667a46e8bc3b9b7e753c40ca&_e=uYTxXyPieTxfkTnb3yeYaJNXadn3JeMLYDrZCBzVZG6ZswpAQh9IqaZtG4sUiZZQ-WB000FehyzhBsU-yu-ZlFgtwePsuNTGwFO1xOlYTSB-j-jjUagrX5O2hO0pB0sMIK5MGBF5FYRflmDWbw7DuMPSUZgciIDmeXNVsMnErDBwtcdB_n9Q3iHrOUmmIokbnDTXpoXhLyF5rgWjzOeN2Z4P8nRPjwR7GV1-c8r-th7rnGfIa3AmmTl7Rip7pzzzTTsiqwBLTsyJeIq1K17aZnD_uz73jTqrk0c78m7rwE1Xk2ZwSPqbzVDY_5OqZ5U7M4nSeLfavjl6NiYFM21NUmeHG80EtVpdafBqr9m4fh3qy84OjA_osJuhKotN7Mz5_VEbb8PoLnsEulFFH9Q43Wl91UxRpsjldakLimUOll0auu7mN7LXwisI1u7IKXv_)
This witch hunt is because they know they can’t beat me. They think they can distract me from America First and a **_VERY SAD attempt at removing me from this election._**

**Fellow American, I need your support now, more than ever!**

[**ADD YOUR NAME IF YOU’RE WITH ME**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=c4123092667a46e8bc3b9b7e753c40ca&_e=uYTxXyPieTxfkTnb3yeYaJNXadn3JeMLYDrZCBzVZG6ZswpAQh9IqaZtG4sUiZZQ-WB000FehyzhBsU-yu-ZlFgtwePsuNTGwFO1xOlYTSB-j-jjUagrX5O2hO0pB0sMIK5MGBF5FYRflmDWbw7DuMPSUZgciIDmeXNVsMnErDBwtcdB_n9Q3iHrOUmmIokbnDTXpoXhLyF5rgWjzOeN2Z4P8nRPjwR7GV1-c8r-th7rnGfIa3AmmTl7Rip7pzzzTTsiqwBLTsyJeIq1K17aZnD_uz73jTqrk0c78m7rwE2EeON1BHoS7e89RrylppPJ8XVBz4UUvqoaid59XP5kyxto64eg-k-jZp9LGAaf2FWqim1Q06Mfwu8nsLayAMtRuIAxzQKQUU2fXZq7vGytsTLoN0LYfWroYKJIAL5HWBn_K3YsqT1v-nMuiUp-wpmq)
This is __unprecedented even after all I’ve been through already.__ I wonder how many more losses sleepy Joe and unmerited Merrick can take before they give up. Joe may not remember but I do, when:

First, they **illegally spied on my campaign and threw false and slanderous accusations about me and my family** \- nothing but hoaxes!

Then the FBI (following Biden’s Instructions) Agents raided Mar-a-Lago and **refused to let my lawyers oversee the search.**

Finally, **they impeached me TWICE** (I won both with a little thanks to some America First allies in the Senate!) and nothing ever came of it.

**I’M NOT BACKING DOWN UNTIL WE RETAKE THE SENATE AND WHITE HOUSE**

Biden and the cronies in the DOJ and Merrick Garland represent fraud of the highest degree. These meaningless indictments are scams. An attempt to distract me from one thing - representing the good people of this great country and Making America Great Again! [**Stand with me today and we will take back the Senate and White House!**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=c4123092667a46e8bc3b9b7e753c40ca&_e=uYTxXyPieTxfkTnb3yeYaJNXadn3JeMLYDrZCBzVZG6ZswpAQh9IqaZtG4sUiZZQ-WB000FehyzhBsU-yu-ZlFgtwePsuNTGwFO1xOlYTSB-j-jjUagrX5O2hO0pB0sMIK5MGBF5FYRflmDWbw7DuMPSUZgciIDmeXNVsMnErDBwtcdB_n9Q3iHrOUmmIokbnDTXpoXhLyF5rgWjzOeN2Z4P8nRPjwR7GV1-c8r-th7rnGfIa3AmmTl7Rip7pzzzTTsiqwBLTsyJeIq1K17aZnD_uz73jTqrk0c78m7rwE0g5NnUhjuMAqg7FH4WGcu-xphwHwMU4Xlukm0Xlo8uokmRuirVEszecNX1DU97-X7ttjCOVf_OfygmN1XMhpQV_WxRHpfRBl1XVZQVUHv6cN_A7j5r2Y8l4gM7HuqJcIdfq9jtkgG1jSgxX4iIg_Od)

**Your support is instrumental in achieving these ends, Fellow American.**

[**DON’T BACK DOWN –
ADD YOUR NAME TO SHOW YOU’RE WITH ME**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=c4123092667a46e8bc3b9b7e753c40ca&_e=uYTxXyPieTxfkTnb3yeYaJNXadn3JeMLYDrZCBzVZG6ZswpAQh9IqaZtG4sUiZZQ-WB000FehyzhBsU-yu-ZlFgtwePsuNTGwFO1xOlYTSB-j-jjUagrX5O2hO0pB0sMIK5MGBF5FYRflmDWbw7DuMPSUZgciIDmeXNVsMnErDBwtcdB_n9Q3iHrOUmmIokbnDTXpoXhLyF5rgWjzOeN2Z4P8nRPjwR7GV1-c8r-th7rnGfIa3AmmTl7Rip7pzzzTTsiqwBLTsyJeIq1K17aZnD_uz73jTqrk0c78m7rwE1A7P2VzZ6HHnEa0ruDxolEiBkoybwJJEoFTtAH-w2JrVoHxCXDAmB-zitn1hpTaZbqG-u_ZQH--ytU6z0cpRNpOya414-QXgBA94ijWFTVX4AyyBGVyU0yLKyRnqfDa_c7CqF-4pJLLUqHtzXTFOYY)

This isn’t the time to ignore **INJUSTICE.**
This attack on me is an attack on all of us. _They’re coming for**you** next._ We can’t let them surprise us with another baseless attack.

**Act quickly. Act now.**

Thanks,

clean_body: Are you still an America First conservative? | Fellow American - Joe Biden, his corrupt Department of Justice, and Merrick Garland are back at targeting me. This witch hunt is because they know they can’t beat me. They think they can distract me from America First and a VERY SAD attempt at removing me from this election. Fellow American, I need your support now, more than ever! This is unprecedented even after all I’ve been through already. I wonder how many more losses sleepy Joe and unmerited Merrick can take before they give up. Joe may not remember but I do, when: First, they illegally spied on my campaign and threw false and slanderous accusations about me and my family \- nothing but hoaxes! Then the FBI (following Biden’s Instructions) Agents raided Mar-a-Lago and refused to let my lawyers oversee the search. Finally, they impeached me TWICE (I won both with a little thanks to some America First allies in the Senate!) and nothing ever came of it. I’M NOT BACKING DOWN UNTIL WE RETAKE THE SENATE AND WHITE HOUSE Biden and the cronies in the DOJ and Merrick Garland represent fraud of the highest degree. These meaningless indictments are scams. An attempt to distract me from one thing - representing the good people of this great country and Making America Great Again! Your support is instrumental in achieving these ends, Fellow American. This isn’t the time to ignore INJUSTICE. This attack on me is an attack on all of us. They’re coming foryou next. We can’t let them surprise us with another baseless attack. Act quickly. Act now. Thanks, Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States If you want to help Republicans TAKE BACK THE SENATE, text WIN to 55404 to receive mobile alerts! Message and data rates may apply. name: The Federalist Wire
subject: The hammer just dropped on Hunter Biden in a truly stunning way
body:
TheFederalistWire.com

DAILY NEWS | September 10, 2023

The hammer just
dropped on Hunter Biden in a truly stunning way
The son of President Joe
Biden just can't seem to keep himself out of trouble. But this
time he's really in a bind.

And the hammer just dropped on
Hunter Biden in a truly stunning way.
➞ Continue Reading

TRENDING NEWS

Kamala Harris let her big
mouth run wild in this crazy CBS interview

Vice President Kamala
Harris is a problem for the Biden admin. She's proven that time
and again.
➞ Continue Reading

Joe Biden is horrified
about the secret CNN just learned about him

President Biden
doesn't want anyone to know the truth. But it's out of his
control now.
➞ Continue Reading

Greg Abbott is about to
drag Biden through the mud with this lawsuit

President Biden has
waged a war on Greg Abbott. But the Texas Governor isn't putting
up with it.
➞ Continue Reading

ABOUT
US
The
Federalist Wire brings you dependable news that highlights the US
political landscape as well as the economy. We're here for
citizens who want to stay in the know. If you're particularly
interested in politics or economics, our regular news updates
will help keep you informed. If you're not especially interested
in the topics but know it's important to keep up, then our
reports will be simple to understand.

You know that the political and
economic worlds often collide, and that's why we provide you with
specific coverage. Our news team strives to pinpoint and report
the stories that interest you most. We keep our eyes on domestic
and international matters, both political and financial, so we
can help you stay on top of the latest happenings.

DISCLAIMER
Your privacy is important to us.
It is The Federalist Wire's policy to respect your privacy and
comply with any applicable law and regulation regarding any
personal information we may collect about you, including across
our website, and other sites we own and operate.

name: Defend the Constitution
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

| | | This sponsored message from Defend The Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f443329c58db441d9e248ce546916286&_e=okzBXFdd9dmPjz4IxEC92jaYRvOe24VC5xfzPQ8K2moRr0DIrT9XjmtDExbkPbTd6c-vmg4SgBUpqs4rwWJAGXW_8Gqlm8EP_LR18-AHSJLNcmdu7VYMbO3vJuE3K9c7rl4BnA1_WE4Ks9_mLphaqdOh2348hFaiPPFNRPE1RCImM5e8t1TAmuBcrrlp1xSTMp_WfAmT8OXHI-cyY_YWRwWuPz0QsRQZMLGmhMJRyTTlGeSLYxRW_bHpRX8ka0ZHi3PA6NJ_f4ranXCrmb1_arUT4Hc6Jc6cDq8K3ShfW9TD8ofFHTOqfd2R-mPE5jphWwg6a-9tluYGBQKkp2Zzcx7H3odKJg-BpkfTFxS-AW-Ts9mux1ABs7DMLeXTNKA9iox2COV8P5CZXeRIPWBdZbbBk7Gv2j4z68SM76pH2H942cGU-3pb9pgCkVt1JzDu)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f443329c58db441d9e248ce546916286&_e=okzBXFdd9dmPjz4IxEC92jaYRvOe24VC5xfzPQ8K2moRr0DIrT9XjmtDExbkPbTd6c-vmg4SgBUpqs4rwWJAGXW_8Gqlm8EP_LR18-AHSJLNcmdu7VYMbO3vJuE3K9c7rl4BnA1_WE4Ks9_mLphaqdOh2348hFaiPPFNRPE1RCImM5e8t1TAmuBcrrlp1xSTMp_WfAmT8OXHI-cyY_YWRwWuPz0QsRQZMLGmhMJRyTTlGeSLYxRW_bHpRX8ka0ZHi3PA6NJ_f4ranXCrmb1_ao4-y9RvzEZgvjpLPgBlMcqJ5j9KgH9OuJ_Jw5gA2zLcC2jOKlX6GI0M-gwKOif4E4VzR3L3jQDZ64XS0TWliCPuNaqS6RMn4dzK_jcHMf8IKtKiB5qdlhQ-BnbN3UlPZGdn0SI6KmyLDToH6ejmZUZeK92FtiaK9g9yQR3ubO6B)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f443329c58db441d9e248ce546916286&_e=okzBXFdd9dmPjz4IxEC92jaYRvOe24VC5xfzPQ8K2moRr0DIrT9XjmtDExbkPbTd6c-vmg4SgBUpqs4rwWJAGXW_8Gqlm8EP_LR18-AHSJLNcmdu7VYMbO3vJuE3K9c7rl4BnA1_WE4Ks9_mLphaqdOh2348hFaiPPFNRPE1RCImM5e8t1TAmuBcrrlp1xSTMp_WfAmT8OXHI-cyY_YWRwWuPz0QsRQZMLGmhMJRyTTlGeSLYxRW_bHpRX8ka0ZHi3PA6NJ_f4ranXCrmb1_auXXI4dDgRFd_vdfVlI97q0f2YyUspKWn0rIhfz9hkB_9cfQDYgNTZh5MdgbE4H6Oi_enDwMug_c-2PCT-9WcoEGNHCVV7ypzmZfGF79mnwiUbGb2m5-jAg7zmhBxD6Ek_cjICA4TSpII_BQNDdJobqvvFYxdK0FlFrMknHgFksA)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f443329c58db441d9e248ce546916286&_e=okzBXFdd9dmPjz4IxEC92jaYRvOe24VC5xfzPQ8K2moRr0DIrT9XjmtDExbkPbTd6c-vmg4SgBUpqs4rwWJAGXW_8Gqlm8EP_LR18-AHSJLNcmdu7VYMbO3vJuE3K9c7rl4BnA1_WE4Ks9_mLphaqdOh2348hFaiPPFNRPE1RCImM5e8t1TAmuBcrrlp1xSTMp_WfAmT8OXHI-cyY_YWRwWuPz0QsRQZMLGmhMJRyTTlGeSLYxRW_bHpRX8ka0ZHi3PA6NJ_f4ranXCrmb1_avEDxcxIwV5qkVnEZ6xasjxMuUPbL6tfOM_Ue6YqwF4D1ou3fF4Kr4uvjkiEaT3rxg0s9FWbXvCEVuzaP2Ns-ZgGYgsK7e0AFhH_Qy8vjGKqbapnuEhiwkqQTG3fkT_Xai7upBQyfAJdEKrY6VidciDbxboXDnKIREOaErGCr4c2).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

Defend the Constitution
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=f443329c58db441d9e248ce546916286&_t=q_zrGGBGOJE2lBQLfVBBlaQw6ZZIXKxGQr8gFyxIJBlc3p4jKk-iTZNblWJljgEQgw8hnfOaB1KZHRA4KFDchqNB9Om745PjgWbqu2QQVt7vSWyD7gc3AM_eG3-WFakktqTr1Ncib0xp5L4toXhqoE5Y1Z2l2t9QMjHT-Uz-hm8%3D)
_[**unsubscribe**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f443329c58db441d9e248ce546916286&_e=TMgviE7roHs63clzOsstyb27vZOb4akZ1rzr0Uitw5ktJln37KUtl8M0yMQjlNEoqPXaLAO-XiYQ0juXXoQyFhKeY2XpDTKgkUlzr97spFD-7lvnY6vILihVZbQD5z1nFOMWYV4TfGJTTR3MJfLVW2z75xcgk15hMlSHlj4T6oMLTXnf6d-oi92pq28Wjsj-V56oyOHUqZk8fc0zWGY9lp_IWW-mltA9QucPscAzWDpsOihQyjaX66kYXbTUo3k4MGiEvKlIS-tRYu6J6STaqOijM5Hggs7TVl5MegxrRsY%3D)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f443329c58db441d9e248ce546916286&_e=okzBXFdd9dmPjz4IxEC92iGouBdtfvRWhZULGVSdbTUfjhxX7gG0SKe6xMj6MquUGvlE40OKpPNLo8DO73Hvhaov_k4X6TYchk6qtBq0hRWZfa0q5xhZHrnxn6kXfcK0YZ9j7CJYhPmY-d8LJRwPPs6mDut_rwKXtigorsnGoaEDk2PSes0UhowQPJrIBw58Bm47Y2MyWpwURNnrq3PX3pRbIjQcLNK0_HBe-EI7bRU%3D)_

| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=27abc8a4ac764aefbcb6d8c60500b731&_e=rc7aBCfq4THH4MWz9QusgmkfcNYUGawoA_lcNMhuaD3hSLbHhhiyS3nEO-cYDWUBCSdxsN6nfa5bCBPr9baMfag8svoDgdSsuxy-1GtdoJN1wVUA4D_hhOWWNMXtup2PPWIUCzdqXY1F_OtzdcXmx9auCK7GF9JycrLs7CKdpeKDe0EwnmEAJda2DdCCWbAJXkiCaurftRU0jccyrQcSJsyFohvK1x65RTCFBBWe6xiiPiHsecCMrXX8BOFh0mxtYxaLpqWtCNmmto-7_Gj8p76KPdxMF3ggPBVwXmC0msHBLxZcqtMAz_-Ycb7HZwPpWDyZz7xURxcKXGKTcgF6nkRSr3SDdLANJ5bedTrV8lXqs-iuOjTfE6wD5v6m8RraK1oXYqLauaExtIF9MgbKJeJMxaYiBnvafcez6npF9GF_QU19gl1bI3zOSf_Yo8cI).

name: The Liberty Ledger
subject: Embrace Lifelong Learning with Hillsdale College's Free Online Courses
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.libertyledger._pKgpUCE9PwFBO1Ig)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

As the new school year begins, it’s a great time for people of all ages to learn something new and exciting. We’re all called to improve our minds whether we’re returning to school this Fall or past our days sitting in a classroom.

Through Hillsdale College’s free online courses, you can pursue a lifetime of learning for free and at your own pace.
**
**[](http://trk.libertyledger.-D8ifGwqJNxgjc7ZSnoQ)
Hillsdale’s 40 free online courses provide a world of intellectual exploration where you can engage with a like-minded community and increase your knowledge and understanding.

With these courses, you can tackle the classic works of literature you’ve always wanted to read. You can overcome your fears of the “dismal science” and learn what makes the American economy prosper. You can finally understand what had seemed so complicated in freshman philosophy class. And, you can learn how to separate truth from fiction in America’s history.

Here are a few of our most popular online courses that have captivated the minds of learners:

1. **C.S. Lewis on Christianity** : Discover C.S. Lewis’s writings on Christianity, exploring morality, conversion, prayer, the Bible, suffering, and the afterlife. Timeless insights from classic works including _Mere Christianity_ , _The Screwtape Letters_ , _The Great Divorce_ , and _The Abolition of Man_.

2. **The Genesis Story** : Uncover the meaning and beauty of Genesis. Explore the complex relationship between God and man, the consequences of a rupture in that relationship, and the path toward reconciliation.

3. **Constitution 101** : Explore the foundation of American governance by delving into the natural rights theory of the Founding, the link between the Declaration of Independence and the Constitution, the crisis of the Civil War, the Progressive rejection of the Founding, and the nature of modern liberalism.

4. **American Citizenship and Its Decline** : Join Victor Davis Hanson in an eight-lecture course that examines the origins and history of citizenship in the West and the grave challenges American citizenship faces today.

**
**Embrace the joy of learning with one of these free online courses by Hillsdale College.

To get started and learn more about our unique range of courses, visit us at: [https://online.hillsdale.edu/](http://trk.libertyledger._MEKmJEU9sjcXlDy5w)

We look forward to embarking on this educational journey with you.

Warm regards,

Kyle Murnen ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

---
| |
---
Liberty Ledger P.O. Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.libertyledger.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MjE2Mjk1NiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMjUzLTc2Y2U4ZmUwOGNmYTQ2ZDc5OGZmOWEyODExODI1ZWRjIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/R9Nih7qc3UAoC5UlPNNIzg) to unsubscribe.
---

name: Marsha Blackburn
subject: I have to give credit where it’s due
body:
I promise never to take the support you’ve shown me lightly.

| |
---
| | | Friend,

Today, I wanted to take a moment to send along a message of my sincere appreciation.

**I know we ask for your help often, so I promise never to take the support you 've shown me lightly.**

_Let me just say I understand how hard it can be to make ends meet right now. Joe Biden and the Democrats have ruined our economy and stretched the budgets of every American thin. So, if donating isn 't an option for you right now, all I ask is for your continued prayers. And I promise to keep fighting in Washington to solve the economic crisis plaguing America._

Reaching each and every one of our critical fundraising goals is absolutely essential to our odds of success, and I truly would not be able to continue in this fight without your gracious help and continued support.

Especially now that a radical member of the Socialist Three has launched her campaign to try to defeat me, your support couldn't have come at a more pivotal moment.

So from the bottom of my heart, _**THANK YOU, THANK YOU, THANK YOU!**_ Your generosity has exceeded what anyone thought would be possible, _**[but can I ask if you would be willing to chip in just one more time to my campaign?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbjaduodu7kgq1cc3oorjt2ejm1ng78375vjp9lo_rp22sh2s8i66p71cpgm0o31chh2bs "but can I ask if you would be willing to chip in just one more time to my campaign?")**_

As you know, I'm up for re-election this cycle, and my new opponent is pulling out **ALL THE STOPS** to turn Tennessee blue.

She is prepared to _say any lie and spare no expense_ in her mission to try to defeat me.

This is why I need to rely on my grassroots supporters more than ever before to help me cross the finish line.

Your support will allow me to continue fighting for your conservative values in the U.S. Senate.

God Bless,

Marsha Blackburn
---

name: =?UTF-8?Q?Jaiden=C2=A0=28Gadsden?= Flag)
subject: I was kicked out of school. Here’s what’s next…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Libertas Institute
body:
I’m guessing you saw me in the news last week.

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2znl3j5f5khrq2uapp52hrebn9amua08ubnmtab3o_rp22sh2s8i66p71cpgm0o31chh2bs "Tuttle Twins")

Dear Friend,

I'm guessing you saw me in the news last week. I'm the 12-year-old boy who was kicked out of class in my school in Colorado because I had a "Don't tread on me" Gadsden flag patch on my backpack.

The vice principal claimed that it was tied to slavery. (Totally false!) And they wouldn't let me come back to class until I removed the patch.

You might not know why this story got so many views -- over 40 million so far!

After I was kicked out of class, I talked with my mom about what to do. I remembered in one of the Tuttle Twins books how the kids got the media involved to fight against some corruption in the government.

[The Tuttle Twins helped me stand up for what I believe in. I want to help them ship their pro-American history books to schools and families. Can you chip in $25 or more today?](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z2mtumtba7piqb1itrvv3v8sqhjikvr9ct5fesjo_rp22sh2s8i66p71cpgm0o31chh2bs)

[Support Tuttle Twins >>](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zfpe7ainhep23548eaman4nkavd5ltt255il4vj8_rp22sh2s8i66p71cpgm0o31chh2bs)

I asked my mom if we could drive over to the local TV station. She agreed, so I went up and rang the doorbell of their office. Here I am:

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z1r9u2m6ct5av21mjt867tctj3jukok5ii4uoh4o_rp22sh2s8i66p71cpgm0o31chh2bs)

Nobody would speak with me. I felt defeated -- this was a story that needed to be told! My 1st amendment rights were being violated. Why didn't other people care?

Then, my mom decided to reach out to Connor Boyack that night. He's the author of the Tuttle Twins books -- and I'm a huge fan. Connor agreed to share the video my mom had recorded of the vice principal, and now it seems like everyone has seen it!

I'm definitely a little more popular at school now, haha. Lots of other kids are now putting Gadsden flag stickers on their lockers.

I was interviewed by a lot of people afterward. When I talked with Ben Shapiro, he asked me why I knew so much about politics and American history. Here's what I told him:

_" I give it mainly to Connor Boyack with his Tuttle Twins books. I read those growing up, and that really, really helped me. And now I have a good understanding of America and all sorts of key concepts."_

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zufqonrmb93t5mbe94to1dt0umdlvfhl3n186k58_rp22sh2s8i66p71cpgm0o31chh2bs)

I'm so happy that Connor shared my story. But what's next?

Well, one day, I want to run for governor of Colorado. I have to be 30 years old, so that will be in the future.

There is something I can do in the meantime. I can use this attention for good. I can pay it forward. I can get other kids to learn the same things I've learned so when the time comes up, they can stand up for themselves, too.

Connor, my mom, and I have been talking over the past few days about what we can do to use this moment for good. And this email is one of the ideas -- we can use my story to encourage people like you to help us.

**So here is what we are doing:**

Connor and his team have some new American history books that teach the ideas of freedom and the founding fathers. They're so much better than the textbooks we have to use in school that don't really teach history with any kind of depth.

**I want more kids to be able to read these history books. So we are launching a fundraiser to raise $25,000 this week, and we will use the money to ship history books to schools across the country -- with a heavy focus on my state, Colorado.** 😀

[Will you stand up with me and help me? I'm super excited by this. Please donate here -- every $25 donation covers the cost of the book and shipping to a library or classroom.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2znchgglksd74v8o4b1ku3o4bi2v3s40cocc43gm0_rp22sh2s8i66p71cpgm0o31chh2bs)

[Donate $25 = 1 Book Distributed >>](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zlpkvned5uvumlu1e7laobuaa82v07lfvdvgqn1o_rp22sh2s8i66p71cpgm0o31chh2bs)

[Donate $50 = 2 Books Distributed >>](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zs2qkd1ap7ordiojcuk7ui0sckuckcrmgtmt425g_rp22sh2s8i66p71cpgm0o31chh2bs)

[Donate $100 = 4 Books Distributed >>](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zi8uil0itbmndlkdf526siaicudv4c74dc815ejg_rp22sh2s8i66p71cpgm0o31chh2bs)

[Donate $200 = 8 Books Distributed >>](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zlovl86sgra5ejk5eehnoc2p1ht5sfle4qd0j3ag_rp22sh2s8i66p71cpgm0o31chh2bs)

[Donate $500 = 20 Books Distributed >>](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zqlp7qllfe15s11somu5fs0hhom8p9qn4jns5d90_rp22sh2s8i66p71cpgm0o31chh2bs)

[Donate $1,000 = 40 Books Distributed >>](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z3ae3hrq4677ubdmfgj3o2rhkao7b9bsse51ateo_rp22sh2s8i66p71cpgm0o31chh2bs)

**What 's super cool about this is Connor has a big donor who is passionate about this, and they agreed to double everyone's donations!** So, let's say you want to sponsor 5 books for students. That means you'll actually do 10 books when your donation is matched!

I knew how to act when my school tried to shut me down because I'd been learning these ideas for years. Because of the Tuttle Twins, I know what my rights are and how to stand up for them. People like Connor and you have been part of my story, and I'm grateful.

Now, we have to use this moment for good, and I hope you'll stand with me to make a difference. So many other kids need to learn what I have. It's education -- real, true, good education -- that will make sure other kids don't get tread on, too:

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z6ccbubjnq398rmk5v84qcn1s1jt3j8e4q3rm3eg_rp22sh2s8i66p71cpgm0o31chh2bs)

Let's use this momentum to find more Jaidens -- and get them learning today! I'm pumped to work with the author of my favorite books to help even more kids learn what I have.

[So please support our project today! Donate here:](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zqq7viff5tbse4u7848oeqq5tm2sj2ch7j6g1dl8_rp22sh2s8i66p71cpgm0o31chh2bs)

[Donate $25 = 1 Book Distributed >>](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zk4aut1e8cnamssdreidjm3aegk1iucb02pf8uj0_rp22sh2s8i66p71cpgm0o31chh2bs)

[Donate $50 = 2 Books Distributed >>](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zoto4c5tun5eocdeps5h3r5lhgdt5o45fkvl99tg_rp22sh2s8i66p71cpgm0o31chh2bs)

[Donate $100 = 4 Books Distributed >>](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zu07mm8b7rl0l5orla5uqqs6ai8ve4ia2ngdhdk8_rp22sh2s8i66p71cpgm0o31chh2bs)

[Donate $200 = 8 Books Distributed >>](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z19phd8hquu3p5a5ep4v9ikem56ucie69c12v7p0_rp22sh2s8i66p71cpgm0o31chh2bs)

[Donate $500 = 20 Books Distributed >>](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z8a6nqknu6m17vvlv47nlq9qmtcbrmo9c24utvv0_rp22sh2s8i66p71cpgm0o31chh2bs)

[Donate $1,000 = 40 Books Distributed >>](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zvedrgpce6lui9504u0u74r8kuk5a23m92kfjdh0_rp22sh2s8i66p71cpgm0o31chh2bs)

I'm just a 12-year-old kid. I have to focus on my school work and my family, but this is a great opportunity for me to make a difference while I get ready for my gubernatorial campaign 18 years from now.

I hope you can support us! In the meantime, stay free and stay strong!

Jaiden (Gadsden Flag)

Paid for by Libertas Institute

Deroy Murdock
---

body:

**_BREAKING NEWS_ :**
**_The FBI and DOJ have been caught SPYING on me while I led the Russiagate investigation. This DIRECT interference in our investigation was an UNLAWFUL attempt to sabotage our constitutional oversight mandate_!**

**_But there 's even bigger news... Keep reading to learn about this absolute BOMBSHELL_.**

Friend,

When I was named the lead investigator in the Russiagate investigation, I had never met President Trump, the media had never attacked me, and my own government never harassed me...

_We put out the Truth. Then all hell broke loose_.

During my investigation, I concluded that there was ZERO collusion between President Trump and the Russians. However, I discovered that the FBI and DOJ actively sabotaged our system of justice and violated multiple surveillance laws just to prevent the election of President Donald Trump. The Durham Report has fully corroborated these findings and flat-out stated the FBI had zero basis to launch any investigations into President Trump or his campaign.

This made me the target of radical politicians, the Fake News media machine, and even the Deep State itself.

Worse, I witnessed the Deep State hunt down America-First patriots and FBI whistleblowers with expensive and baseless legal actions.

Why?

To punish anyone not aligned with the Establishment's agenda.

This is why I founded the Kash Foundation. The Kash Foundation provides financial assistance to everyday Americans that have become the victims of the Deep State while EXPOSING the lies and corruption of our own government.

**And now the FBI has been caught SPYING on me during the Russiagate investigation. They issued subpoenas for my personal records without any lawful basis ...**

Let's protect America-First patriots from the Deep State and FIGHT BACK!

name: Attention Trump Patriots [via Team Marsha]
subject: President Trump JUST ISSUED A PROCLAMATION
body:
See it for yourself:

| |
---
| | | President Trump JUST ISSUED A PROCLAMATION on the latest criminal arrest and attempt to END his 2024 campaign.

See it for yourself:

_"Isn 't is TERRIBLE that a Political Opponent can haphazardly charge you with FAKE crimes in the middle of your campaign in order to interfere with your time & message, and there is nothing you can do to stop this travesty of 'justice.' They had 2.5 years to file, long before the campaign started. Another Russia, Russia, Russia HOAX. Should not be allowed to happen!"_

name: =?UTF-8?Q?Jaiden=C2=A0=28Gadsden?= Flag)
subject: I’m the 12-year-old who got kicked out of class for the Gadsden flag
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Libertas Institute
body:
I’m guessing you saw me in the news last week.

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zph2kjafv2st048k9msi3tte8bn32is3tri117p8_rp22sh2s8i66p71cpgmcor1chh2bs "Tuttle Twins")

Dear Friend,

I'm guessing you saw me in the news last week. I'm the 12-year-old boy who was kicked out of class in my school in Colorado because I had a "Don't tread on me" Gadsden flag patch on my backpack.

The vice principal claimed that it was tied to slavery. (Totally false!) And they wouldn't let me come back to class until I removed the patch.

You might not know why this story got so many views -- over 40 million so far!

After I was kicked out of class, I talked with my mom about what to do. I remembered in one of the Tuttle Twins books how the kids got the media involved to fight against some corruption in the government.

[The Tuttle Twins helped me stand up for what I believe in. I want to help them ship their pro-American history books to schools and families. Can you chip in $25 or more today?](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zmhc9rtb9o19b0t58qf7ejg6s1dinjmjiqqhjiao_rp22sh2s8i66p71cpgmcor1chh2bs)

[Support Tuttle Twins >>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zf6dsfa8g21eqhs82j9vgm71fj29gp2s0ktdj4j8_rp22sh2s8i66p71cpgmcor1chh2bs)

I asked my mom if we could drive over to the local TV station. She agreed, so I went up and rang the doorbell of their office. Here I am:

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zsb2rf2e4t8tfhlk9e2o0mr3vsuktn00f3j0b1eo_rp22sh2s8i66p71cpgmcor1chh2bs)

Nobody would speak with me. I felt defeated -- this was a story that needed to be told! My 1st amendment rights were being violated. Why didn't other people care?

Then, my mom decided to reach out to Connor Boyack that night. He's the author of the Tuttle Twins books -- and I'm a huge fan. Connor agreed to share the video my mom had recorded of the vice principal, and now it seems like everyone has seen it!

I'm definitely a little more popular at school now, haha. Lots of other kids are now putting Gadsden flag stickers on their lockers.

I was interviewed by a lot of people afterward. When I talked with Ben Shapiro, he asked me why I knew so much about politics and American history. Here's what I told him:

_" I give it mainly to Connor Boyack with his Tuttle Twins books. I read those growing up, and that really, really helped me. And now I have a good understanding of America and all sorts of key concepts."_

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zpuvntpgt6nuse5bdapai5v5o4572k7o0ke0ai38_rp22sh2s8i66p71cpgmcor1chh2bs)

I'm so happy that Connor shared my story. But what's next?

Well, one day, I want to run for governor of Colorado. I have to be 30 years old, so that will be in the future.

There is something I can do in the meantime. I can use this attention for good. I can pay it forward. I can get other kids to learn the same things I've learned so when the time comes up, they can stand up for themselves, too.

Connor, my mom, and I have been talking over the past few days about what we can do to use this moment for good. And this email is one of the ideas -- we can use my story to encourage people like you to help us.

**So here is what we are doing:**

Connor and his team have some new American history books that teach the ideas of freedom and the founding fathers. They're so much better than the textbooks we have to use in school that don't really teach history with any kind of depth.

**I want more kids to be able to read these history books. So we are launching a fundraiser to raise $25,000 this week, and we will use the money to ship history books to schools across the country -- with a heavy focus on my state, Colorado.** 😀

[Will you stand up with me and help me? I'm super excited by this. Please donate here -- every $25 donation covers the cost of the book and shipping to a library or classroom.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zj0a0vdvekvbv5mlo3f7hdu0qi9i81624mpdlm9o_rp22sh2s8i66p71cpgmcor1chh2bs)

[Donate $25 = 1 Book Distributed >>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z534b65q70q4euvspdl98vc403uebh7r23pkfja0_rp22sh2s8i66p71cpgmcor1chh2bs)

[Donate $50 = 2 Books Distributed >>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z7os1hsmvetf40ei34jg8m4mc9b82nerqgve9epo_rp22sh2s8i66p71cpgmcor1chh2bs)

[Donate $100 = 4 Books Distributed >>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z5kfk2ia474bu9b3ous31vgaj59bsh5sdqkv5sv0_rp22sh2s8i66p71cpgmcor1chh2bs)

[Donate $200 = 8 Books Distributed >>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2znqarvu8k1bjgljfpe7qtpvavh42ogoo0t85hfeo_rp22sh2s8i66p71cpgmcor1chh2bs)

[Donate $500 = 20 Books Distributed >>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z4gpkfrksi351lkrc29daol6p7iglbb9rr5vl19o_rp22sh2s8i66p71cpgmcor1chh2bs)

[Donate $1,000 = 40 Books Distributed >>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zndr5ss6f1j4rl0bls3siclklfc4ac6ei3nirvqg_rp22sh2s8i66p71cpgmcor1chh2bs)

**What 's super cool about this is Connor has a big donor who is passionate about this, and they agreed to double everyone's donations!** So, let's say you want to sponsor 5 books for students. That means you'll actually do 10 books when your donation is matched!

I knew how to act when my school tried to shut me down because I'd been learning these ideas for years. Because of the Tuttle Twins, I know what my rights are and how to stand up for them. People like Connor and you have been part of my story, and I'm grateful.

Now, we have to use this moment for good, and I hope you'll stand with me to make a difference. So many other kids need to learn what I have. It's education -- real, true, good education -- that will make sure other kids don't get tread on, too:

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z1jqglkcekunqlasv2ete4e4trvnk803r23g29fg_rp22sh2s8i66p71cpgmcor1chh2bs)

Let's use this momentum to find more Jaidens -- and get them learning today! I'm pumped to work with the author of my favorite books to help even more kids learn what I have.

[So please support our project today! Donate here:](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zffu6kmdcrqt49gba1d9f00l8h1he1rtnli7mfpo_rp22sh2s8i66p71cpgmcor1chh2bs)

[Donate $25 = 1 Book Distributed >>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zoifibmc75j3oobv8ivh9h2h1k6j4nca6vige2c0_rp22sh2s8i66p71cpgmcor1chh2bs)

[Donate $50 = 2 Books Distributed >>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zgog4vuh00gmmvmd6jb5odb45e7r86iam4j3k9co_rp22sh2s8i66p71cpgmcor1chh2bs)

[Donate $100 = 4 Books Distributed >>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zocf4dghstponpaqcgq70m2eupbfshfkncnb0er0_rp22sh2s8i66p71cpgmcor1chh2bs)

[Donate $200 = 8 Books Distributed >>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zdsoafstmtf48icgncuvp0ets2cfqacha8u99s2o_rp22sh2s8i66p71cpgmcor1chh2bs)

[Donate $500 = 20 Books Distributed >>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zfhbo88baemaqp1o7hn4bohi5oq56ain1sn4hbrg_rp22sh2s8i66p71cpgmcor1chh2bs)

[Donate $1,000 = 40 Books Distributed >>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z7ppuehnrlq10lfadf4428lk1595bbdv08fq4d1g_rp22sh2s8i66p71cpgmcor1chh2bs)

I'm just a 12-year-old kid. I have to focus on my school work and my family, but this is a great opportunity for me to make a difference while I get ready for my gubernatorial campaign 18 years from now.

I hope you can support us! In the meantime, stay free and stay strong!

Jaiden (Gadsden Flag)

Paid for by Libertas Institute

American Briefing
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z2uoaisc7qmc4b4ej139lv7h9020moh840f0ata0_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or4s5j62pj3c5i649fg)

body:

**_The FBI and DOJ have been caught SPYING on me while I led the Russiagate investigation. This DIRECT interference in our investigation was an UNLAWFUL attempt to sabotage our constitutional oversight mandate_!**

**_But there 's even bigger news... Keep reading to learn about this absolute BOMBSHELL_.**

Friend,

When I was named the lead investigator in the Russiagate investigation, I had never met President Trump, the media had never attacked me, and my own government never harassed me...

_We put out the Truth. Then all hell broke loose_.

During my investigation, I concluded that there was ZERO collusion between President Trump and the Russians. However, I discovered that the FBI and DOJ actively sabotaged our system of justice and violated multiple surveillance laws just to prevent the election of President Donald Trump. The Durham Report has fully corroborated these findings and flat-out stated the FBI had zero basis to launch any investigations into President Trump or his campaign.

This made me the target of radical politicians, the Fake News media machine, and even the Deep State itself.

Worse, I witnessed the Deep State hunt down America-First patriots and FBI whistleblowers with expensive and baseless legal actions.

Why?

To punish anyone not aligned with the Establishment's agenda.

This is why I founded the Kash Foundation. The Kash Foundation provides financial assistance to everyday Americans that have become the victims of the Deep State while EXPOSING the lies and corruption of our own government.

**And now the FBI has been caught SPYING on me during the Russiagate investigation. They issued subpoenas for my personal records without any lawful basis ...**

body:

|

Friend,

It's Kevin McCarthy again. It looks like you** __** have not completed your **_[2024 Presidential Survey!](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zp72qs7teo22mug1lc3e87bte9619ck2ilvg4nh8_rp22sh2s8i66p71cpgmcor6cdh2bs "2024 Presidential Survey!")_**

name: Your America
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions

| This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22307%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rLO8JnxKaW3LAQisa6xI0A&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That’s why we produced “[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22308%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mf2FbXTKRieJeqUyq5JHDg&sysid=1)” which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22309%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5A%2biaq7%2bbnjGPFBPPBUv%2bA&sysid=1)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis’s profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis’s The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis’s Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis’s beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis’s own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That’s why I hope you’ll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22300%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6l%2bFAyLkDDI6PieFceFiWA&sysid=1).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

body: ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=81169d6269effd0d5bfac3c3cdeaaec049956bf884b935de8134916fbb22e39641df207ca18a4bb29b69825bf37f0bebb88aee368053f3db4cea803b1c5a00be Peter, You may know me as the former governor of South Carolina and UN ambassador, and as a presidential candidate. But I am also a mom of two. I’ve worn many hats throughout my lifetime, but being a mom has been one of my favorite ones. I’m the only mom running for president, and I will do whatever it takes to fight for our children’s future. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=81169d6269effd0d5bfac3c3cdeaaec049956bf884b935de8134916fbb22e39641df207ca18a4bb29b69825bf37f0bebb88aee368053f3db4cea803b1c5a00be SEND A MOM TO THE WHITE HOUSE Right now, I am deeply concerned for our children’s education. Our kids have fallen behind. While they’re struggling to keep up with reading and math, teachers unions are focused on forcing woke ideology into the classrooms. All the while, parents are being left in the dark. Peter, parents should never have to wonder what’s being taught in their kids’ classrooms. We need transparency! That’s why, this week, I teamed up with Moms for Liberty, a parents’ rights group, to share my vision for the future of our education system. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=81169d6269effd0d5bfac3c3cdeaaec049956bf884b935de8134916fbb22e39641df207ca18a4bb29b69825bf37f0bebb88aee368053f3db4cea803b1c5a00be Can I count on your support today? Here’s just part of the vision I have for our schools: → Get our children reading again! → Offer vocational classes in our schools! → Ensure transparency in the classroom! → Stop biological men from participating in women’s sports! → Put parents BACK IN CHARGE of their children’s education! https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=81169d6269effd0d5bfac3c3cdeaaec049956bf884b935de8134916fbb22e39641df207ca18a4bb29b69825bf37f0bebb88aee368053f3db4cea803b1c5a00be If you’re ready to join me in this fight, please send your support to help me win this race. It’s up to us to save our country. I hope I can count on you My very best, https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=81169d6269effd0d5bfac3c3cdeaaec049956bf884b935de8134916fbb22e39641df207ca18a4bb29b69825bf37f0bebb88aee368053f3db4cea803b1c5a00be Nikki Haley https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=81169d6269effd0d5bfac3c3cdeaaec049956bf884b935de8134916fbb22e39641df207ca18a4bb29b69825bf37f0bebb88aee368053f3db4cea803b1c5a00be DONATE https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=81169d6269effd0dddb16de7222bc33e69925342feaea6ccd9b27275ba096f609bd05464199786a09009855dd10aabfed418e86e800efa6297f3004f7f2a58c3 https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=81169d6269effd0dddb16de7222bc33e69925342feaea6ccd9b27275ba096f609bd05464199786a09009855dd10aabfed418e86e800efa6297f3004f7f2a58c3 GET YOUR SHIRT https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=81169d6269effd0d60caf341e8c06fe6b7dc7f78096ee7dba79eb5c7be336f70e9ee876c213000551e6864f777a37350dccccb3d99d65e93960f75f386fe1441 https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=81169d6269effd0d60caf341e8c06fe6b7dc7f78096ee7dba79eb5c7be336f70e9ee876c213000551e6864f777a37350dccccb3d99d65e93960f75f386fe1441 VOLUNTEER More About Nikki Haley https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=81169d6269effd0d7f04e7796f9531e43973a906094b2b532cfa60f58c180e98dbd446dc0225bab189fdf19b638bd801c31781abf0e2e241a76e7cf8af26920d My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I’m running for President of the United States. I’m running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago – an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I’m running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something – that we do love this country. I’m running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I’m doing this for my son who’s a senior in college and shouldn’t have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn’t believe in just to get an A. I’m running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I’m running for President because we have a country to save! I’ve seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden’s leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a “jobs governor” because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs, stood up for Israel even when others refused, and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I’ve done it before. And I’ll do it as your next President. As President, I’ll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington’s spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America’s future. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=81169d6269effd0d7f04e7796f9531e43973a906094b2b532cfa60f58c180e98dbd446dc0225bab189fdf19b638bd801c31781abf0e2e241a76e7cf8af26920d Will you join me today and help me save our country? https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=81169d6269effd0d7f04e7796f9531e43973a906094b2b532cfa60f58c180e98dbd446dc0225bab189fdf19b638bd801c31781abf0e2e241a76e7cf8af26920d DONATE Paid for by Nikki Haley for President. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=81169d6269effd0d31cba5f4ab08ffbf49444dc06931fe325242e1daa3677da71f4c6ba38128ddc59375d17dbbf3ff637344537df78d57aaf512d04477a9d901 www.nikkihaley.com By providing your phone number, you are consenting to receive SMS/MMS news alerts, action items, and donation requests to the number provided from each of Nikki Haley for President, Stand For America PAC, Stand for America, Team Stand For America, SFA Fund, Inc., and Ambassador Nikki Haley (48324) directly or by third parties acting on their behalf. name: Team DeSantis
subject: LOADING....Your VIP Debate Contest experience
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWKQnHODND

3 weeks til another big debate. Would you like to go? Here's how
you can!

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWKQnHODND

Hey
Friend,

If
you saw the last GOP debate, we're sure we don't need to convince
you of how incredible it is to see Gov. Ron DeSantis' leadership
in action... Now, imagine seeing it in action AND in person.

You
can! We're three weeks out from another big debate night, and our
latest contest includes a free trip to the Reagan Library in Simi
Valley, California, to see Gov. DeSantis win again!

Our supporter's flight & hotel
stay in California: Pending 🔄 🛫

Our supporter's ticket to the GOP
debate: Pending 🔄 🎟️

Our supporter's meet-and-greet
with Ron and Casey DeSantis: Pending 🔄 👋

Enter today, Friend! You have less than 3 weeks left to add your
name to our VIP contest and then send in as many $10 or more
donations as possible for your name to be entered again each
time! Your chances of winning are great, and this experience of a
lifetime is worth it. Enter here and rush in a donation for a
chance to win!

ENTER THE CONTEST NOW

We
hope to see you on the big night.

In
Freedom,

Team DeSantis

Meet Ron DeSantis

A native Floridian with
blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a
nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin
High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he
was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated
with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission
in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service,
Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah,
Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military
decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service
and the Iraq Campaign Medal.

Ron
also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child
predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a
platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits
and a balanced budget amendment.

In
Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the
weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to
hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in
manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a
veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our
country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans
and expand support for mental health.

In
2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As
governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for
the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when
the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media
united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis
stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding
principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to
transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival.
Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative
priorities:

Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine
mandates,

Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border
crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against
illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured
professors accountable,

Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital
currency,

Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

Protecting the unborn,

Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a
constitutional carry state,

Expanding education freedom,

Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and
entities,

Lowering prescription drug costs,

Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

Creating a universal school choice program,

Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme
Court,

...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout
his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of
nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the
largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than
1.5 million votes.

But
history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the
majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional
wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently
as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30
points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red,
including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties
overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor
DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics,
and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with
battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing
down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his
inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense
suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of
sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even
for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we
choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than
cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe
place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership,
Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education
opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden
Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that
seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to
the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered
the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's
history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:

Record tax relief

ESG prohibitions

Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering
transparency

Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

Improvements to our state's infrastructure

Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death
penalty for child rapists

The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border
crisis

Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward
school unions

Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No
leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor
DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country,
leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron
is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television
anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters,
Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.

You
can read the full contest rules here. Alternatively, you may
enter without contributing by clicking here.

NO
PURCHASE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN A PRIZE. No contribution or
payment of any kind is necessary to enter or win this Promotion.
Making a contribution does not increase your chances of winning.
To enter by making a contribution use this form. To enter without

clean_body: 3 weeks til another big debate. Would you like to go? Here's how you can! Hey Friend, If you saw the last GOP debate, we're sure we don't need to convince you of how incredible it is to see Gov. Ron DeSantis' leadership in action... Now, imagine seeing it in action AND in person. You can! We're three weeks out from another big debate night, and our latest contest includes a free trip to the Reagan Library in Simi Valley, California, to see Gov. DeSantis win again! Our supporter's flight & hotel stay in California: Pending 🔄 🛫 Our supporter's ticket to the GOP debate: Pending 🔄 🎟️ Our supporter's meet-and-greet with Ron and Casey DeSantis: Pending 🔄 👋 Enter today, Friend! You have less than 3 weeks left to add your name to our VIP contest and then send in as many $10 or more donations as possible for your name to be entered again each time! Your chances of winning are great, and this experience of a lifetime is worth it. Enter here and rush in a donation for a chance to win! ENTER THE CONTEST NOW We hope to see you on the big night. In Freedom, Team DeSantis Meet Ron DeSantis A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer. During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal. Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment. In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health. In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular. Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities: Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates, Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities, Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT, Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable, Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency, Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation, Turning Florida into a model for election integrity, Protecting the unborn, Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state, Expanding education freedom, Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities, Lowering prescription drug costs, Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable, Creating a universal school choice program, Delivering record-breaking tax relief, Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership, Supporting law enforcement and our veterans, Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders, Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court, ...and so much more. After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes. But history didn't stop there: Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points. Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall. Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women. Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism." Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history. This year, Governor DeSantis signed: Record tax relief ESG prohibitions Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation. Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI Improvements to our state's infrastructure Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback. Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason. You can read the full contest rules here. body:
When I was named the lead investigator in the Russiagate investigation, I had never met President Trump, the media had never attacked me, and my own government never harassed me...

**_BREAKING NEWS_ :**
**_The FBI and DOJ have been caught SPYING on me while I led the Russiagate investigation. This DIRECT interference in our investigation was an UNLAWFUL attempt to sabotage our constitutional oversight mandate_!**

**_But there’s even bigger news ... Keep reading to learn about this absolute BOMBSHELL_.**

Friend,

When I was named the lead investigator in the Russiagate investigation, I had never met President Trump, the media had never attacked me, and my own government never harassed me...

_We put out the Truth. Then all hell broke loose_.

During my investigation, I concluded that there was ZERO collusion between President Trump and the Russians. However, I discovered that the FBI and DOJ actively sabotaged our system of justice and violated multiple surveillance laws just to prevent the election of President Donald Trump. The Durham Report has fully corroborated these findings and flat-out stated the FBI had zero basis to launch any investigations into President Trump or his campaign.

This made me the target of radical politicians, the Fake News media machine, and even the Deep State itself.

Worse, I witnessed the Deep State hunt down America-First patriots and FBI whistleblowers with expensive and baseless legal actions.

Why?

To punish anyone not aligned with the Establishment's agenda.

This is why I founded the Kash Foundation. The Kash Foundation provides financial assistance to everyday Americans that have become the victims of the Deep State while EXPOSING the lies and corruption of our own government.

**And now the FBI has been caught SPYING on me during the Russiagate investigation. They issued subpoenas for my personal records without any lawful basis ...**

subject: Kamala Harris just made a bold prediction that will have your head spinning
body:
TheFederalistWire.com

DAILY NEWS | September 10, 2023

Kamala Harris just
made a bold prediction that will have your head spinning

Politicians should have a
certain degree of confidence. But what Harris did, is borderline
insane.

Because Kamala Harris just made a
bold prediction that will have your head spinning.
➞ Continue Reading

TRENDING NEWS

The hammer just dropped on
Hunter Biden in a truly stunning way

The son of President
Joe Biden just can't seem to keep himself out of trouble. But
this time he's really in a bind.
➞ Continue Reading

Kamala Harris let her big
mouth run wild in this crazy CBS interview

Vice President Kamala
Harris is a problem for the Biden admin. She's proven that time
and again.
➞ Continue Reading

Joe Biden is horrified
about the secret CNN just learned about him

President Biden
doesn't want anyone to know the truth. But it's out of his
control now.
➞ Continue Reading

ABOUT
US
The
Federalist Wire brings you dependable news that highlights the US
political landscape as well as the economy. We're here for
citizens who want to stay in the know. If you're particularly
interested in politics or economics, our regular news updates
will help keep you informed. If you're not especially interested
in the topics but know it's important to keep up, then our
reports will be simple to understand.

You know that the political and
economic worlds often collide, and that's why we provide you with
specific coverage. Our news team strives to pinpoint and report
the stories that interest you most. We keep our eyes on domestic
and international matters, both political and financial, so we
can help you stay on top of the latest happenings.

DISCLAIMER
Your privacy is important to us.
It is The Federalist Wire's policy to respect your privacy and
comply with any applicable law and regulation regarding any
personal information we may collect about you, including across
our website, and other sites we own and operate.
