name: Governor Ron DeSantis
subject: Hi, this is Ron DeSantis. This is who I am.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
Our path to victory is clear from the first debate. Now I’d like to make sure you know what I’m fighting for and who I am.

---
| | | | | | | | | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22316%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fsmvpJ0%2b7o%2flPmc6SnygcA&sysid=1)
---
Friend, The first Republican primary debate was an opportunity for the nation to hear directly from their future President. To earn YOUR support, I stood up, weathered the attacks, and now I know that we are one step closer to stopping the decline of this country. **If you’re just tuning into the race after this pivotal debate, I’d like to take a moment to tell you a little bit about myself so you know why I’m running for President, what I plan to accomplish, and why I’m asking for your support.** _**Here’s my story**_ : I was a blue-collar kid born and raised in Florida who went on to work my way through Yale University where I was Team Captain of our baseball team, before going on to graduate from Harvard Law School. After earning my degrees and witnessing the horrific attack on our nation’s freedom on September 11th, 2001, I knew I had to stand up. I volunteered for the Navy and went on to serve in Iraq as a JAG Officer in support of SEAL Team 1.
---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22316%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fsmvpJ0%2b7o%2flPmc6SnygcA&sysid=1)
---
Since my time serving in the Navy, I have taken on the role of prosecutor, Congressman, proud Governor of the free state of Florida, father to three young children, and husband to my wonderful wife, Casey.
---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22316%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fsmvpJ0%2b7o%2flPmc6SnygcA&sysid=1)
---

As Governor, I have made it my mission to lead with conviction, unwavering energy, and with a refusal to back down. That’s why, in Florida, we held the line when freedom hung in the balance. When Covid policies across the country made commonsense an uncommon virtue, our state became a refuge of sanity and a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans. Leadership matters and I believe my record speaks for itself. Since I took office as Governor, Florida now:
* Ranks as the number one economy in the country by CNBC;
* Ranks number one for new business formations;

* Ranks number one for net in-migration;
* Ranks number one for economic growth amongst large states;
* Has an unemployment rate that is a percentage point below the national average and even lower than other large states like California and New York;
* Ranks number one in education by US News and World Report;
* Has NO state income tax;

* Has a crime rate at a 50-year low.

I have worked tirelessly to transform a once purple state to a deep red blueprint for freedom.
---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22316%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fsmvpJ0%2b7o%2flPmc6SnygcA&sysid=1)
---
But here’s the problem, Friend. Failing leftist policies across the country are shoving a radical ideology down your throat. They’re telling you that men can get pregnant, want to impose a social credit score on you, and let Mexican drug cartels cross our border freely and continue to murder Americans. This is NOT okay. Riots and disorder have infested some of this nation’s oldest cities and turned places like Chicago, Philadelphia, and San Francisco into crime slums. I am NOT willing to accept this decline. We have a President who is floundering and bowing down to his own party instead of doing what is right for the American people. He has consistently bent the knee to the woke mob. These radical policies across the nation are making it nearly impossible for hardworking families to achieve the American Dream, and as a father of three young children and husband to my wife Casey, I cannot sit idly by while their future hangs in the balance. _**This election is not about me. It’s about YOU and the American children who are being subjected to the woke mob’s fraud.**_
---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22316%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fsmvpJ0%2b7o%2flPmc6SnygcA&sysid=1)
---
Our nation is facing a critical choice in 2024: Freedom or Decline. That is why I am running for President; I will not stand by while Joe Biden sends this nation into deeper decline for another four years. I’m not running to be President. I am running to DO things as President and from Day One we are going to rip up disastrous policies that are harming American families and REVERSE the decline Joe Biden has let fester in this country. The time to act is NOW.
---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22316%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fsmvpJ0%2b7o%2flPmc6SnygcA&sysid=1)
---
| | [Chip in to my campaign here](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22317%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=INHvQgYop7QJUK%2fKy13d3Q&sysid=1)
---
I believe that decline is choice, success is attainable, and freedom is worth fighting for. I fought with everything I had on that debate stage on August 23rd and took my vision for restoring this nation directly to the American people. I know that no one is entitled to anything in this world, so I am fighting to earn your support and lead when it matters most. Starting on Day One as President of the United States, these are just some of the plans I am promising to you:
---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22316%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fsmvpJ0%2b7o%2flPmc6SnygcA&sysid=1)
---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22316%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fsmvpJ0%2b7o%2flPmc6SnygcA&sysid=1)
---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22316%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fsmvpJ0%2b7o%2flPmc6SnygcA&sysid=1)
---
Friend, together, we will restore sanity to our society, normalcy to our communities, and integrity to our institutions.
---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22316%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fsmvpJ0%2b7o%2flPmc6SnygcA&sysid=1)
---
I stood up for the needs of the American people on the debate stage, and I made sure you know that I will never back down from being your voice and your fighter. _**[Please, join me in fighting for the future--because freedom is always worth fighting for.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22318%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=m2MsQ2oJbrFdNLmv6X6gYw&sysid=1 "Please, join me in
fighting for the future—because freedom is always worth fighting for.")**_ In Freedom,
---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22316%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fsmvpJ0%2b7o%2flPmc6SnygcA&sysid=1)
---
Ron DeSantis

---
|

**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22319%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9QPFN3InoTSJcIWQRBkwOQ&sysid=1)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the “Russia collusion” conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what’s right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn’t popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America’s founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation’s revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden’s border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn’t stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: “When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism.”

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor’s leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration’s overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor’s vision, this year’s legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida’s history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state’s infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden’s border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

body:
Our path to victory is clear from the first debate. Now I’d like to make sure you know what I’m fighting for and who I am.

---
| | | | | | | | | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c676043%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=dZbiRSQSwJ4hk%2b7EyV8kPQ&sysid=1)
---
Friend, The first Republican primary debate was an opportunity for the nation to hear directly from their future President. To earn YOUR support, I stood up, weathered the attacks, and now I know that we are one step closer to stopping the decline of this country. **If you’re just tuning into the race after this pivotal debate, I’d like to take a moment to tell you a little bit about myself so you know why I’m running for President, what I plan to accomplish, and why I’m asking for your support.** _**Here’s my story**_ : I was a blue-collar kid born and raised in Florida who went on to work my way through Yale University where I was Team Captain of our baseball team, before going on to graduate from Harvard Law School. After earning my degrees and witnessing the horrific attack on our nation’s freedom on September 11th, 2001, I knew I had to stand up. I volunteered for the Navy and went on to serve in Iraq as a JAG Officer in support of SEAL Team 1.
---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c676043%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=dZbiRSQSwJ4hk%2b7EyV8kPQ&sysid=1)
---
Since my time serving in the Navy, I have taken on the role of prosecutor, Congressman, proud Governor of the free state of Florida, father to three young children, and husband to my wonderful wife, Casey.
---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c676043%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=dZbiRSQSwJ4hk%2b7EyV8kPQ&sysid=1)
---

As Governor, I have made it my mission to lead with conviction, unwavering energy, and with a refusal to back down. That’s why, in Florida, we held the line when freedom hung in the balance. When Covid policies across the country made commonsense an uncommon virtue, our state became a refuge of sanity and a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans. Leadership matters and I believe my record speaks for itself. Since I took office as Governor, Florida now:
* Ranks as the number one economy in the country by CNBC;
* Ranks number one for new business formations;

* Ranks number one for net in-migration;
* Ranks number one for economic growth amongst large states;
* Has an unemployment rate that is a percentage point below the national average and even lower than other large states like California and New York;
* Ranks number one in education by US News and World Report;
* Has NO state income tax;

* Has a crime rate at a 50-year low.

I have worked tirelessly to transform a once purple state to a deep red blueprint for freedom.
---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c676043%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=dZbiRSQSwJ4hk%2b7EyV8kPQ&sysid=1)
---
But here’s the problem, Friend. Failing leftist policies across the country are shoving a radical ideology down your throat. They’re telling you that men can get pregnant, want to impose a social credit score on you, and let Mexican drug cartels cross our border freely and continue to murder Americans. This is NOT okay. Riots and disorder have infested some of this nation’s oldest cities and turned places like Chicago, Philadelphia, and San Francisco into crime slums. I am NOT willing to accept this decline. We have a President who is floundering and bowing down to his own party instead of doing what is right for the American people. He has consistently bent the knee to the woke mob. These radical policies across the nation are making it nearly impossible for hardworking families to achieve the American Dream, and as a father of three young children and husband to my wife Casey, I cannot sit idly by while their future hangs in the balance. _**This election is not about me. It’s about YOU and the American children who are being subjected to the woke mob’s fraud.**_
---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c676043%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=dZbiRSQSwJ4hk%2b7EyV8kPQ&sysid=1)
---
Our nation is facing a critical choice in 2024: Freedom or Decline. That is why I am running for President; I will not stand by while Joe Biden sends this nation into deeper decline for another four years. I’m not running to be President. I am running to DO things as President and from Day One we are going to rip up disastrous policies that are harming American families and REVERSE the decline Joe Biden has let fester in this country. The time to act is NOW.
---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c676043%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=dZbiRSQSwJ4hk%2b7EyV8kPQ&sysid=1)

I believe that decline is choice, success is attainable, and freedom is worth fighting for. I fought with everything I had on that debate stage on August 23rd and took my vision for restoring this nation directly to the American people. I know that no one is entitled to anything in this world, so I am fighting to earn your support and lead when it matters most. Starting on Day One as President of the United States, these are just some of the plans I am promising to you:

fighting for the future—because freedom is always worth fighting for.")**_ In Freedom,

Ron DeSantis

**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c676156%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CnBLL%2brreEErnIVXqG3%2f%2bw&sysid=1)

| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the “Russia collusion” conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what’s right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn’t popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America’s founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation’s revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden’s border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn’t stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: “When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism.”

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor’s leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration’s overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor’s vision, this year’s legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida’s history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state’s infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden’s border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they’re the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.

clean_body: Our path to victory is clear from the first debate. Now I’d like to make sure you know what I’m fighting for and who I am. | | | | | | | | | | Friend, The first Republican primary debate was an opportunity for the nation to hear directly from their future President. To earn YOUR support, I stood up, weathered the attacks, and now I know that we are one step closer to stopping the decline of this country. If you’re just tuning into the race after this pivotal debate, I’d like to take a moment to tell you a little bit about myself so you know why I’m running for President, what I plan to accomplish, and why I’m asking for your support. Here’s my story : I was a blue-collar kid born and raised in Florida who went on to work my way through Yale University where I was Team Captain of our baseball team, before going on to graduate from Harvard Law School. After earning my degrees and witnessing the horrific attack on our nation’s freedom on September 11th, 2001, I knew I had to stand up. I volunteered for the Navy and went on to serve in Iraq as a JAG Officer in support of SEAL Team 1. | Since my time serving in the Navy, I have taken on the role of prosecutor, Congressman, proud Governor of the free state of Florida, father to three young children, and husband to my wonderful wife, Casey. | As Governor, I have made it my mission to lead with conviction, unwavering energy, and with a refusal to back down. That’s why, in Florida, we held the line when freedom hung in the balance. When Covid policies across the country made commonsense an uncommon virtue, our state became a refuge of sanity and a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans. Leadership matters and I believe my record speaks for itself. Since I took office as Governor, Florida now: Ranks as the number one economy in the country by CNBC; Ranks number one for new business formations; Ranks number one for net in-migration; Ranks number one for economic growth amongst large states; Has an unemployment rate that is a percentage point below the national average and even lower than other large states like California and New York; Ranks number one in education by US News and World Report; Has NO state income tax; Has a crime rate at a 50-year low. I have worked tirelessly to transform a once purple state to a deep red blueprint for freedom. | But here’s the problem, Friend. Failing leftist policies across the country are shoving a radical ideology down your throat. They’re telling you that men can get pregnant, want to impose a social credit score on you, and let Mexican drug cartels cross our border freely and continue to murder Americans. This is NOT okay. Riots and disorder have infested some of this nation’s oldest cities and turned places like Chicago, Philadelphia, and San Francisco into crime slums. I am NOT willing to accept this decline. We have a President who is floundering and bowing down to his own party instead of doing what is right for the American people. He has consistently bent the knee to the woke mob. These radical policies across the nation are making it nearly impossible for hardworking families to achieve the American Dream, and as a father of three young children and husband to my wife Casey, I cannot sit idly by while their future hangs in the balance. This election is not about me. It’s about YOU and the American children who are being subjected to the woke mob’s fraud. | Our nation is facing a critical choice in 2024: Freedom or Decline. That is why I am running for President; I will not stand by while Joe Biden sends this nation into deeper decline for another four years. I’m not running to be President. I am running to DO things as President and from Day One we are going to rip up disastrous policies that are harming American families and REVERSE the decline Joe Biden has let fester in this country. The time to act is NOW. | | | I believe that decline is choice, success is attainable, and freedom is worth fighting for. I fought with everything I had on that debate stage on August 23rd and took my vision for restoring this nation directly to the American people. I know that no one is entitled to anything in this world, so I am fighting to earn your support and lead when it matters most. Starting on Day One as President of the United States, these are just some of the plans I am promising to you: | | | Friend, together, we will restore sanity to our society, normalcy to our communities, and integrity to our institutions. | I stood up for the needs of the American people on the debate stage, and I made sure you know that I will never back down from being your voice and your fighter. "Please, join me in fighting for the future—because freedom is always worth fighting for." In Freedom, | Ron DeSantis | Meet Ron DeSantis | | | | | A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer. During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal. Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment. In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the “Russia collusion” conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health. In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what’s right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn’t popular. Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America’s founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation’s revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities: Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates, Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden’s border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities, Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT, Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable, Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency, Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation, Turning Florida into a model for election integrity, Protecting the unborn, Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state, Expanding education freedom, Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities, Lowering prescription drug costs, Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable, Creating a universal school choice program, Delivering record-breaking tax relief, Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership, Supporting law enforcement and our veterans, Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders, Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court, ...and so much more. After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes. But history didn’t stop there: Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points. Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall. Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women. Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: “When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism.” Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor’s leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration’s overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor’s vision, this year’s legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida’s history. This year, Governor DeSantis signed: Record tax relief ESG prohibitions Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation. Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI Improvements to our state’s infrastructure Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden’s border crisis Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback. Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they’re the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason. | Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder). This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution. I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person. * I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source. Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense. | Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President | Ron DeSantis for President PO Box 3696 Tallahassee, FL 32315 American Update 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Kash Patel
subject: Breaking News: FBI caught unlawfully spying on me
body:
When I was named the lead investigator in the Russiagate investigation, I had never met President Trump, the media had never attacked me, and my own government never harassed me...

**_BREAKING NEWS_ :**
**_The FBI and DOJ have been caught SPYING on me while I led the Russiagate investigation. This DIRECT interference in our investigation was an UNLAWFUL attempt to sabotage our constitutional oversight mandate_!**

[Please make an EMERGENCY donation to Kash Foundation to help me fight back! Click here to donate $10, $100, $1,000, or ANY amount!](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjqkj2iuh7vlm8dhc71ntni4rq1d01pf4nco1om8_rp22sh2s8i66p71cpim0o74clh2bs)

**_But there 's even bigger news... Keep reading to learn about this absolute BOMBSHELL_.**

Friend,

When I was named the lead investigator in the Russiagate investigation, I had never met President Trump, the media had never attacked me, and my own government never harassed me...

_We put out the Truth. Then all hell broke loose_.

During my investigation, I concluded that there was ZERO collusion between President Trump and the Russians. However, I discovered that the FBI and DOJ actively sabotaged our system of justice and violated multiple surveillance laws just to prevent the election of President Donald Trump. The Durham Report has fully corroborated these findings and flat-out stated the FBI had zero basis to launch any investigations into President Trump or his campaign.

This made me the target of radical politicians, the Fake News media machine, and even the Deep State itself.

Worse, I witnessed the Deep State hunt down America-First patriots and FBI whistleblowers with expensive and baseless legal actions.

Why?

To punish anyone not aligned with the Establishment's agenda.

This is why I founded the Kash Foundation. The Kash Foundation provides financial assistance to everyday Americans that have become the victims of the Deep State while EXPOSING the lies and corruption of our own government.

**And now the FBI has been caught SPYING on me during the Russiagate investigation. They issued subpoenas for my personal records without any lawful basis ...**

[I am declaring an EMERGENCY online fundraising goal of $100,000 for the Kash Foundation to FIGHT BACK. You and I must do everything in our power to combat the forces of the Deep State and the corruption within the FBI to ensure we bring the criminals and traitors within these organizations to justice.

Catching the FBI and DOJ red-handed has actually inspired me.

It's time to double down against these government gangsters, defend the Rule of Law, and expose the truth.

Let's protect America-First patriots from the Deep State and FIGHT BACK!

**_The deadline for this $100,000 fundraising goal is within 72 hours. I am counting on you to send your gift ASAP so the Kash Foundation can immediately begin fighting back_.**

**Here is the other BOMBSHELL that 's been exposed...**

The FBI and DOJ went as far as SEIZING my own private emails and data!

Do you realize what this means?

The Deep State searched my emails, hoping to find something illegal or improper regarding the Russiagate investigation. Since I did nothing wrong, they found nothing.

So instead, I imagine they searched my emails to find some dirt or blackmail material on my personal life!

Surprise! They found nothing.

name: American Action News
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College’s National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested.

| | |
---
| This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z21p99hfqn52l6eg4qqn6fidudbchbm6nkd1egho_rp22sh2s8i66p71cpim0o72c5h2bs)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z166ggbh04403cpgsdtl1h41bjkp9c09hca4a6j8_rp22sh2s8i66p71cpim0o72c5h2bs) [NO](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztfpujrui4u620nke3nifht5d4i3gku37aigq9mo_rp22sh2s8i66p71cpim0o72c5h2bs) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to “pack” the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: “To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats.”

What is your opinion about the Supreme Court’s role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me using the College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zemhon4n4ci2o66otmsq071qclculo0qukvs6oc0_rp22sh2s8i66p71cpim0o72c5h2bs)**

And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of too many of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I’m sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That’s why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution” and “The U.S. Supreme Court.”

* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty.

* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America.

* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum.

We **undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America’s great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court **right away--the link is below.

[**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zt2sc80c9o7rbjfcsa5n1i6j8tpopmb6hdsaraa0_rp22sh2s8i66p71cpim0o72c5h2bs)

Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America. The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution. But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench. Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda? Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to “pack” the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda. As Sen. Please share your thoughts with me using the College’s National Survey on the United States Supreme Court right away. name: Tim Holbert, American Veterans Center
subject: The 12 Medal of Honor heroes of D-Day
body:
All Americans should read the stories and know of these heroes who have been all but forgotten.
[View this message in your browser](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z42fr78c3p44g4fcr98amkmq55l1bjvvpb68kco8_rp22sh2s8i66p71cpim0o74clh238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuij79hnmer7acjjegon9crl6crn2ct66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2ugq76ohksdr34c5meqo62d3k6hhn6djieoqb4o72m1hr5cr4edircobk6eqr2ttnq9o74oj6e2p6cs74mdhm0tr4coo79ddgcurm2phhm2p6co70mlhm1o5l64oracdle8iv0)
| | | [](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zco7nmlvk99ggrlg19f7ndlhun4vb5v1qt4ts42g_rp22sh2s8i66p71cpim0o74clh2bs)
---
Friend, Our schools used to teach every child about D-Day. Among the thousands of heroes of the longest day were the 12 soldiers who received the Medal of Honor for their courage and valor... but that’s no longer the case. WAs our Greatest Generation has passed, we have failed to teach our children the legacy of service, honor, and sacrifice of the men who fought their way into Hitler’s Fortress Europe. In a recent poll of High School Seniors:
* 72% Didn’t know we fought Hitler during World War II.
* 87% Didn’t know we entered WWII because of the attacks on Pearl Harbor.
* 60% Didn’t know which countries we fought in WWII
* 13% Thought General Dwight Eisenhower was a general from the Civil War

Friend, American kids are not being taught our nation’s history. According to ‘The Nation’s Report Card,’ America’s high schoolers’ proficiency in U.S. History and Civics is at its lowest level in nearly 30 years. They know little of the immense courage our troops displayed fighting for their freedoms in the Second World War, and they know little of the heroes who gave their life in service to our country. In fact, most Americans these days know next to nothing about World War II and the millions of young soldiers who put their lives on the line to serve their country in the war, let alone in Korea or Vietnam. To help educate young Americans about the selfless, patriotic, and courageous heroes in WWII, the American Veterans Center created a limited-edition booklet — **_A Mighty Endeavor: Operation Overlord through the Eyes of D-Day’s Greatest Heroes._** [**For the next 24 hours, I’m holding a copy of this brand new, one-of-a-kind booklet for you, Friend. With your gift of any amount today, a copy of _A Mighty Endeavor_ will be yours to share with family and friends. **](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zjsk9gddft3vmdc4038og0v1uqb6rla113eunne8_rp22sh2s8i66p71cpim0o74clh2bs)
---
[Claim your copy of **_A Mighty Endeavor_**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zcegnmgthnfgajq53i7ur5ua3obs2u5krktuveo8_rp22sh2s8i66p71cpim0o74clh2bs)
---
[](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2znk5umqjani2cv1gb3d7a9m59mihq4cbaoer8nag_rp22sh2s8i66p71cpim0o74clh2bs)
---
Every one of the 156,000 men who stormed the beaches of Normandy on that bloodyday is a hero in my book. It took real guts to run head-first into a hailstorm of bullets and mortar rounds. We all hope nobody ever needs to experience something like it again. But it is essential we remember, and learn. The AVC is devoted to preserving their history, so that today’s young Americans – and those in generations to come – can learn from the heroes you and I grew up idolizing. The 12 heroes who received the Medal of Honor showed so much courage and valor in the invasion of Normandy, that they were individually chosen to receive our nation’s highest honor. All Americans should read the stories and know of these heroes who have been all but forgotten. The [**American Veterans Center is committed to bringing the legacy of the greatest generation to the latest generation, and with your gift today, we can preserve the legacy of America’s World War II veterans.**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zmidrhv8jb6c706lpdgb836aetr4mcsuajgmsgmg_rp22sh2s8i66p71cpim0o74clh2bs) As a token of my thanks for your support, I’ll send you a limited-edition copy of **_A Mighty Endeavor_**. When you receive it, I have just one request; please share it with a loved one. Show them these stories and talk about how important their legacy is to our history. But, please let me know in the next 24 hours if you’re claiming your copy! It is my hope that you’ll share this booklet with your children, grandchildren, and neighbors and tell them all about D-Day.
---
[Claim your copy of **_A Mighty Endeavor_**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zqh2teq6cbgaa31hlpp89pfo97a0ah8js1debbk0_rp22sh2s8i66p71cpim0o74clh2bs)
---
Friend, we must share the TRUTH about American WWII veterans with America’s youth – we cannot fail them any longer. We must educate our nation’s children with messages of the D-Day heroes who were up against a battle-hardened enemy, whose very actions preserved the freedoms we enjoy today. [**Please support American Veterans Center’s mission to fight the historical ignorance plaguing today’s culture and teach America’s young people what real service meant during WWII.**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zqcqm89vg4oid78u2ns1rt2k4aiogte063drqp1g_rp22sh2s8i66p71cpim0o74clh2bs) Whether you can afford to donate $15, $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000, or any other amount — I’ll send along your copy of **_A Mighty Endeavor: Operation Overlord through the Eyes of D-Day’s Greatest Heroes_** as a “thank you” for your support of our bravest Americans. Thank you and God bless,
---
Tim Holbert American Veterans Center
---
[**Support American Veterans Center**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zs5682kcsa7l0vgk78lurb0kscbipb4r3ol80l4o_rp22sh2s8i66p71cpim0o74clh2bs)
---
The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. © American Veterans Center
1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201
---

subject: Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning...

**The Truth About
The Coming Crisis** This might be your only warning... According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite the severity of the situation, the mainstream media has chosen to remain silent. And our own government has ignored the dire warnings of industry experts. Experts like a fourth-generation American farmer who warns of the impending crisis: **"Food shortages are coming."** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions

| This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=98408961523d459e9bb1c9265cbfe765&_e=Ptv89d2avaAYokO5gDbMVDyVv8M0TlWr8qLZZyLXNpybqMTI400TSKgWmmQOEW9mcjI8eEI3dmqf4z6Y2piz_NiQOP1o0cpA-syQ5h-Df3jg-ZpjpvXr_Hsmma2yfJLKnpW0RJssrzY-qG8438saeUuXwHEatL9w-ej5ZpG7jEuh9Ac5twAtWmyAvT4JBX3ZehffEEVqgEHEMRXrfgBT7t_TuYTRMZ36xN7YPPxBZIsnH3tKO4TxRG8IgVwIbw_2wP70Hn0TFZ2HKM9qMePupVVQGQ7sawl6rz5W751N0-ulfGNwgcaxEvHlAPhiRoskeOqREQeCMGKnNPMh4uPmWBVrhhCAwplSouL5KILfw0RKSqxrcGul3rdiSh34P9rK9QUfx8AZXHj5zxLYSaKsL9jBENjRWftmhzmzFKAAq386RkGpk4p0hZ2og1j4988E)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=98408961523d459e9bb1c9265cbfe765&_e=Ptv89d2avaAYokO5gDbMVDyVv8M0TlWr8qLZZyLXNpybqMTI400TSKgWmmQOEW9mcjI8eEI3dmqf4z6Y2piz_NiQOP1o0cpA-syQ5h-Df3jg-ZpjpvXr_Hsmma2yfJLKnpW0RJssrzY-qG8438saeUuXwHEatL9w-ej5ZpG7jEuh9Ac5twAtWmyAvT4JBX3ZehffEEVqgEHEMRXrfgBT7t_TuYTRMZ36xN7YPPxBZIsnH3tKO4TxRG8IgVwIbw_2wP70Hn0TFZ2HKM9qMePupZQ2WQpUCh8rG0DLSqkYCphB1W1dCr7tzQgP3QbL0msDyM_kI3qITaIuPpkFzz8sgReBZ45mh-zR9CJQMR5idccSmG9eDrdBg8PT2S4pkVTNqsrA7bCJSF2e6V-Vzz-1KpmS8HYpoC-9srRObzulzQ7BHuS49ZdVpwbgpiJ05Q8S)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=98408961523d459e9bb1c9265cbfe765&_e=Ptv89d2avaAYokO5gDbMVDyVv8M0TlWr8qLZZyLXNpybqMTI400TSKgWmmQOEW9mcjI8eEI3dmqf4z6Y2piz_NiQOP1o0cpA-syQ5h-Df3jg-ZpjpvXr_Hsmma2yfJLKnpW0RJssrzY-qG8438saeUuXwHEatL9w-ej5ZpG7jEuh9Ac5twAtWmyAvT4JBX3ZehffEEVqgEHEMRXrfgBT7t_TuYTRMZ36xN7YPPxBZIsnH3tKO4TxRG8IgVwIbw_2wP70Hn0TFZ2HKM9qMePupdmHvSsJzhZ8UVTv_8i4r5SyX0RDdrrnSYRczrJbacPcRj5A3ciQLxYqiDirAeceRAzEjgJlolwKejS4l-jwwQgApH8WPEk7xKwV_RwSbLldMCRhaqqhsdXKDLnxPvySoTqVUW7wrB_aNubiayTNi0Fe164ijAf-41HXXkjJJxt7)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=98408961523d459e9bb1c9265cbfe765&_e=Ptv89d2avaAYokO5gDbMVDyVv8M0TlWr8qLZZyLXNpybqMTI400TSKgWmmQOEW9mcjI8eEI3dmqf4z6Y2piz_NiQOP1o0cpA-syQ5h-Df3jg-ZpjpvXr_Hsmma2yfJLKnpW0RJssrzY-qG8438saeUuXwHEatL9w-ej5ZpG7jEuh9Ac5twAtWmyAvT4JBX3ZehffEEVqgEHEMRXrfgBT7t_TuYTRMZ36xN7YPPxBZIsnH3tKO4TxRG8IgVwIbw_2wP70Hn0TFZ2HKM9qMePupZds5VzO4XpWM8ccCE0ta8LCyIg6JxwTfrQcgwMGmXEGdAPvqBus4R0eEzVCfAPvu-BRKOUQQUtkwIfe0-GHJNyvw77uUn2tBcepX7DJ667qn-BtZVLvZp1XNopBtQ4EhMzq9ygaBnbUHkvS_Xj-J5eODr6HRX2v1aG0Wy4F-hGr).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Conservative Liberty Wire
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=98408961523d459e9bb1c9265cbfe765&_t=xwOSOO_XvQkFFQhwDCSqgc2g-FrjhsbHTBD45BqCbwHtwySc-9D_dxzCH_uHDWZlx3FU_YTcSyjrJc-V4ERKxuU5rNvv82tMRk_MOVzn-SDhaRMvPSo3FAW46XFyX60RSpc03H-23swBF1qMIcxVCZePGjcf71cer7DlCd6CpqE%3D)

name: Marsha Blackburn
subject: I have to give credit where it’s due
body:
I promise never to take the support you’ve shown me lightly.

| |
---
| | | Friend,

Today, I wanted to take a moment to send along a message of my sincere appreciation.

**I know we ask for your help often, so I promise never to take the support you 've shown me lightly.**

_Let me just say I understand how hard it can be to make ends meet right now. Joe Biden and the Democrats have ruined our economy and stretched the budgets of every American thin. So, if donating isn 't an option for you right now, all I ask is for your continued prayers. And I promise to keep fighting in Washington to solve the economic crisis plaguing America._

Reaching each and every one of our critical fundraising goals is absolutely essential to our odds of success, and I truly would not be able to continue in this fight without your gracious help and continued support.

Especially now that a radical member of the Socialist Three has launched her campaign to try to defeat me, your support couldn't have come at a more pivotal moment.

So from the bottom of my heart, _**THANK YOU, THANK YOU, THANK YOU!**_ Your generosity has exceeded what anyone thought would be possible, _**[but can I ask if you would be willing to chip in just one more time to my campaign?](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zf8m32f25c4ijpui58mgntd1td8r1a151g81eb10_rp22sh2s8i66p71cpim2ob6cph2bs "but can I ask if you would be willing to chip in just one more time to my campaign?")**_

As you know, I'm up for re-election this cycle, and my new opponent is pulling out **ALL THE STOPS** to turn Tennessee blue.

She is prepared to _say any lie and spare no expense_ in her mission to try to defeat me.

This is why I need to rely on my grassroots supporters more than ever before to help me cross the finish line.

Your support will allow me to continue fighting for your conservative values in the U.S. Senate.

God Bless,

Marsha Blackburn
---

name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: Getting to the bottom of this
disclaimer_text:
Paid for
by McCarthy for Congress
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vW53siODNN

When my Republican colleagues and I asked for your vote last
fall, we made a Commitment to America of exactly what we would
get done for you if entrusted with the majority.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oW53siODNN

This is Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy. When my Republican
colleagues and I asked for your vote last fall, we made a
Commitment to America of exactly what we would get done for you
if entrusted with the majority.

The House is now spearheading the commitment to hold Joe Biden
and his cronies accountable to you, and let me tell you - the
Biden family corruption our investigations have uncovered in just
a few short months is damning.

But here's the thing:

When the Clintons went after Trump…

When Adam Schiff and Nancy Pelosi went after Trump…

When Merrick Garland and the FBI went after Trump…

And when Alvin Bragg went after Trump…

They ALL had the media, Hollywood, Big Tech, and D.C.
bureaucrats to peddle their LIES.

Now, all those forces are converging all their resources to
SHUT DOWN what my colleagues and I are uncovering about their
puppet in the White House. Which is why I'm coming to you today,
Friend. I need your help to keep the pressure on Joe Biden and
fend off the attempts to undermine our investigations. Can my
colleagues and I count on you?

STAND WITH HOUSE REPUBLICANS

HOLD JOE BIDEN ACCOUNTABLE

Democrats' dark money dollars are pouring in to distract voters
and undermine our investigations. If we don't see some immediate
backup from our grassroots supporters, I fear Joe Biden and his
cronies will get off scot-free with their sketchy schemes.
PLEASE: Support our efforts for accountability today:

STAND WITH HOUSE REPUBLICANS

HOLD JOE BIDEN ACCOUNTABLE

Thank you for your time and support,

Kevin McCarthy

1 click.
The plan to END Biden's Border Crisis is 1 click away... All I
ask for is your written endorsement. Will you make just 1 click?

ENDORSE THE GOP BORDER PACKAGE

This is
Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy. Unfortunately, I come
bearing some bad news:

We're
going to have to cancel our advertising buys unless we see a
massive surge of grassroots support.

According
to my team, if we can manage a $30,000 surge by midnight tonight
- we can manage to keep our candidates on air through the end of
the month.

I'm
humbly asking you to help ENSURE our candidates' ads can remain
up on the airwaves:

PROTECT GOP CANDIDATES

Kevin
McCarthy here. I'll keep this huddle brief.

Voters
across the nation called on us to put a stop to Biden's
ridiculous anti-America agenda - but if we miss our critical
fundraising goal, we are going to FAIL.

I'm only
sending this to the most loyal patriots because I know you won't
let us down.

This is
your last chance to help House Republicans make it to the end
zone. It's game over without you.

LEAD HOUSE REPUBLICANS TO VICTORY!

Paid for
by McCarthy for Congress

PO Box 12667
Bakersfield, CA 93389

name: Cecile Richards
subject: Peter, political analysts say that the future of the Senate could all come down to Nevada:
body:
This is important:
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T581cf0e7-c4ca-4e98-9319-3de625b108f2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf87bbcff-aac0-4b99-81ae-6f5dedb6f0ed/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Peter, During my time as president of Planned Parenthood, I watched Republicans attempt to pass horrific laws to control women's bodies. But now, with Roe v. Wade no longer the law of the land, I need to be blunt with you: Anti-choice extremists are attacking abortion access like never before. In states across this country, Republicans are doing everything in their power to restrict reproductive freedom – and Mitch McConnell and his allies have threatened to pass a national abortion ban if they take back Senate control. Political analysts say that the future of the Senate could all come down to Nevada – just like it did last year – which is why I’m reaching out today: My friend, Sen. Jacky Rosen, is running for reelection. I’m working hard to help her win this fight, and I’m asking you to join me. The GOP knows the importance of Nevada, so they’re zeroing in on Jacky as a top target for defeat. She’s facing an uphill climb and won’t be able to defend her seat without grassroots support from people like you. [So please, Peter, I’m personally asking: Will you chip in $10 – split between Jacky’s campaign and Blue Amp Action’s – to keep Nevada blue, defend the Senate, and restore reproductive freedom nationwide?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9cbd7ec3-5370-4df4-99dc-b646e7cdaeea/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Express Donate: $5](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0ea2fd7a-4653-4800-8f1c-ae6f1b0143ec/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **[Express Donate: $10](https://default.salsalabs.org/T37ede221-b30e-4bf9-9522-79a80542a4f0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **[Express Donate: $25](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4a6b7de1-41cb-42f9-b8d0-5b199e180303/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **[Or, donate another amount](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0d0c392e-30dd-4fac-9b71-725cc2593346/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**
---
| | | Last year, the GOP flooded Nevada’s Senate race with a staggering $55 million – and their handpicked candidate came within less than 8,000 votes of winning. That’s a SLIM margin. There’s no question that Jacky’s race will be just as close – and likely even more expensive. That’s why she urgently needs grassroots resources as early in the election cycle as possible. So please, Peter, can I count on you to join me in supporting Jacky today? [Donate $10 now – or however much you can spare – to keep both Nevada and the Senate blue. This race couldn’t be more pivotal in the fight to protect reproductive freedom in America.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T61d69cb1-083b-4385-8c78-25d8ac3499a2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you, Cecile Richards
---
|
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | |
---
| | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/T65ec02b2-f31c-46d2-afa8-c8f488edaa2b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | |
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---
| **Blue Amp Strategies**
1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/yyz_em_fr_90do_rosen_richards23091019?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T974e6b50-1015-4ec4-88e9-015f8f93a848/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| | [Unsubscribe](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=c4569c34-86c6-4e74-ad9f-9b20f0332151&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) or [Manage Your Preferences](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=c4569c34-86c6-4e74-ad9f-9b20f0332151&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

name: Conservatives Give
subject: The greatest Christian apologist of the 20th century
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions

| This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e07fed2289e84aa5b69464b88cb39974&_e=KmFnEDR4cKncoPZ1oXN3jhJC0bMI4rg_ADo-tFoyTeQ99N0UIt2IsM71mS9VViLBsFEXc-WLt42zkuhDpp66hr8zCY_F2rSlSTyGasN3-QIJ-v8UafPG6NFPBEUY_gWbj_YK-chx_NmYO861eTmbgl4jFcInidgyEEq8FeaF6MZB2E_0xlEiqnHd6Jc7jkhHv7V6EqYAgeD9I8PQJIFJx1of4HBNV4MblFVTrXI1RU4HhkWGLXs-hjq36yhHH0bs671gEnkJRJkz-j47Om9dN7LLCmnyLvuAjDALwACKDTW94TzgRaBvXpEzzSLAT_NzozkMDQIwgbi4A0MX4nV-AC16WRNKvPYFje3M_xuMdm7-OVWYzU8pyePGQVYhRWfl30XB1gtIx0m2Ip679IkEviRoyV0Tkepcm7Z-thJrPIIahi2rnpUPSA0YmGxWoLQt)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e07fed2289e84aa5b69464b88cb39974&_e=KmFnEDR4cKncoPZ1oXN3jhJC0bMI4rg_ADo-tFoyTeQ99N0UIt2IsM71mS9VViLBsFEXc-WLt42zkuhDpp66hr8zCY_F2rSlSTyGasN3-QIJ-v8UafPG6NFPBEUY_gWbj_YK-chx_NmYO861eTmbgl4jFcInidgyEEq8FeaF6MZB2E_0xlEiqnHd6Jc7jkhHv7V6EqYAgeD9I8PQJIFJx1of4HBNV4MblFVTrXI1RU4HhkWGLXs-hjq36yhHH0bs671gEnkJRJkz-j47Om9dN8ZpFs0cNUnfrbTAdIeJYSOlRvGyoHphh39gY4m7k9qKlH7Bd37N3P4JUD7pfsKm9N1V2cS2Unpo_OWro70D_Z7_nnVTC8syplOn5rxlnnn8scejvKMmMhU68dS5hFsUin9IxFnG-lBLJSGZmAAmjxFVjvLkaPGLIEDelVpBqbxz)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e07fed2289e84aa5b69464b88cb39974&_e=KmFnEDR4cKncoPZ1oXN3jhJC0bMI4rg_ADo-tFoyTeQ99N0UIt2IsM71mS9VViLBsFEXc-WLt42zkuhDpp66hr8zCY_F2rSlSTyGasN3-QIJ-v8UafPG6NFPBEUY_gWbj_YK-chx_NmYO861eTmbgl4jFcInidgyEEq8FeaF6MZB2E_0xlEiqnHd6Jc7jkhHv7V6EqYAgeD9I8PQJIFJx1of4HBNV4MblFVTrXI1RU4HhkWGLXs-hjq36yhHH0bs671gEnkJRJkz-j47Om9dN5x68e6JqEt3JwZmpuWIh38oXHuqTXmTW6pEwGjhiq3GxgVXkVIEUqsaWQntDgRz3uJxDPQkCBxPhEaXv2vqZyonWtjduIhbsx72Qg1PkhpMjjSOCZn2c6kJbF_jtqKj6aEPkjbXjln2E70Lkg6v6XglONgINfEEQ2_TJ78tZwJJ)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e07fed2289e84aa5b69464b88cb39974&_e=KmFnEDR4cKncoPZ1oXN3jhJC0bMI4rg_ADo-tFoyTeQ99N0UIt2IsM71mS9VViLBsFEXc-WLt42zkuhDpp66hr8zCY_F2rSlSTyGasN3-QIJ-v8UafPG6NFPBEUY_gWbj_YK-chx_NmYO861eTmbgl4jFcInidgyEEq8FeaF6MZB2E_0xlEiqnHd6Jc7jkhHv7V6EqYAgeD9I8PQJIFJx1of4HBNV4MblFVTrXI1RU4HhkWGLXs-hjq36yhHH0bs671gEnkJRJkz-j47Om9dN3Lwc9UM5o7CUQ3l7EiJ7XjCVssT0p0QC2ddBrmVFVDTynY1nhTFv_ROaifOBQ-a649XhNH9uyHIZ3w60pXiiLUJuk4p2hP_30qwfAQLiJnUmdrTYtpXMv6F0hTDBxt44N15HYWf4EAZniSSxi0MzBFh4dtYbMerK_tOi1X87kYt).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions

| This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e07fed2289e84aa5b69464b88cb39974&_e=KmFnEDR4cKncoPZ1oXN3jhJC0bMI4rg_ADo-tFoyTeQ99N0UIt2IsM71mS9VViLBsFEXc-WLt42zkuhDpp66hr8zCY_F2rSlSTyGasN3-QIJ-v8UafPG6NFPBEUY_gWbj_YK-chx_NmYO861eTmbgl4jFcInidgyEEq8FeaF6MZB2E_0xlEiqnHd6Jc7jkhHv7V6EqYAgeD9I8PQJIFJx1of4HBNV4MblFVTrXI1RU4HhkWGLXs-hjq36yhHH0bseHBUvPJpmGiqlfdLjP66hX94FHeyDHjpwMM89XIFfvrvhZL3k-bJv2fYb4-ouVr1zEcDBFsuY57bB-bkVQ-5spPUEaL_TjYIWYAfn9YABH0XPQgDQ_nuXSS_Ly0KfRJQJTxt8Yzcx4a2cD84NHFL23cwkiuTpaZ4lUi5X_YgTw1WIaSntOzstahWwxA3ZVoj)

| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e07fed2289e84aa5b69464b88cb39974&_e=KmFnEDR4cKncoPZ1oXN3jhJC0bMI4rg_ADo-tFoyTeQ99N0UIt2IsM71mS9VViLBsFEXc-WLt42zkuhDpp66hr8zCY_F2rSlSTyGasN3-QIJ-v8UafPG6NFPBEUY_gWbj_YK-chx_NmYO861eTmbgl4jFcInidgyEEq8FeaF6MZB2E_0xlEiqnHd6Jc7jkhHv7V6EqYAgeD9I8PQJIFJx1of4HBNV4MblFVTrXI1RU4HhkWGLXs-hjq36yhHH0bseHBUvPJpmGiqlfdLjP66hQp-MbIjyr2zpTMuOgmF80ruRcRIuH4dIdCBjNKPV3Or25DXfUl33OeoNzXrfz8MRS_NiFtUQSs8j9Iv1Fx8A_m4VhyCVWMcXUFOwxSlLdBTDGokFEhbU8emtAIolbUmxYzG2oQ35hlWMC0UPhkyvolXSudThHss-4kK6H_CNSVq)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e07fed2289e84aa5b69464b88cb39974&_e=KmFnEDR4cKncoPZ1oXN3jhJC0bMI4rg_ADo-tFoyTeQ99N0UIt2IsM71mS9VViLBsFEXc-WLt42zkuhDpp66hr8zCY_F2rSlSTyGasN3-QIJ-v8UafPG6NFPBEUY_gWbj_YK-chx_NmYO861eTmbgl4jFcInidgyEEq8FeaF6MZB2E_0xlEiqnHd6Jc7jkhHv7V6EqYAgeD9I8PQJIFJx1of4HBNV4MblFVTrXI1RU4HhkWGLXs-hjq36yhHH0bseHBUvPJpmGiqlfdLjP66heqhjX-3kqEKlmLKNYvs6sq-p_N7UT_luzOYSLCyhaIFjQjnn5QTG40dITBJCvRByQ5WV5voPgtJELAiVsFSnTCBlS0miJQBLliXN7VTZlWmNceJwqVnjglWyi-t545bHPlsdaIXux-CbZEDyNgD1eCYdkAMZW8ualYwqvwnTfp8)

| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e07fed2289e84aa5b69464b88cb39974&_e=KmFnEDR4cKncoPZ1oXN3jhJC0bMI4rg_ADo-tFoyTeQ99N0UIt2IsM71mS9VViLBsFEXc-WLt42zkuhDpp66hr8zCY_F2rSlSTyGasN3-QIJ-v8UafPG6NFPBEUY_gWbj_YK-chx_NmYO861eTmbgl4jFcInidgyEEq8FeaF6MZB2E_0xlEiqnHd6Jc7jkhHv7V6EqYAgeD9I8PQJIFJx1of4HBNV4MblFVTrXI1RU4HhkWGLXs-hjq36yhHH0bseHBUvPJpmGiqlfdLjP66hZenKpEOwNSpq3K2D-7g8CL4rA4eHyPsLrD7rJNT9Zu8BE5i5cUwkrVNz_Z6J-15eJ7uG_80LPvGlVlsnc-VlcAjNiVOkVZ511N4qoaFdmTh2bDqrRy5RGVK_K18sxsoI9FddKCr87B_coa59shNGHvGw3t-h2NiElA624oEd4Lq).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
