name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: Big Ag ripping off small farmers
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1976267?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **Got milk, Friend?** We’ve all seen the ads. I’m sure you’re more than familiar with their gleaming smiles and milk mustaches. But have you ever wondered where these “Got Milk?” ads came from? Who funded them? The answer may surprise you... Farmers and ranchers are **FORCED TO PAY** into programs to fund marketing campaigns that often **work against small and sustainable farmers** and **support lobbying for Big Ag interests.** These “checkoff” programs are essentially a tax on farmers, sending funds to industry-specific boards that have a track-record of misusing and abusing their power. **Farmers want to rein in this corrupt program, and there’s a simple way you can help make it happen! >> [Tell your Members of Congress to pass the OFF Act to STOP corporate abuse of farmers, hard-earned money! Add your name now!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1976268?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** | [Sign the petition](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1976269?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
About **83%** of the money that cattle farmers are required to pay through the checkoff program ends up with the National Cattlemen’s Beef Association, which lobbies on competition and fair-trade practices for the world’s largest meatpacking corporations. As a result, **many small and independent farmers are essentially being taxed to support their biggest competitors.**
No farmer or rancher should be required to pay into a program that harms their own market. **Every second we wait to act, more money is being funneled into Big Ag lobbyist groups \-- [take action now and help pass the OFF Act to protect small and independent farmers!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1976270?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**
[Sign the petition](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1976271?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Chloë Waterman
Climate-friendly food senior program manager,
Friends of the Earth**

clean_body: | | | | | == ---|---|--- | | Got milk, Friend? We’ve all seen the ads. I’m sure you’re more than familiar with their gleaming smiles and milk mustaches. But have you ever wondered where these “Got Milk?” ads came from? Who funded them? The answer may surprise you... Farmers and ranchers are FORCED TO PAY into programs to fund marketing campaigns that often work against small and sustainable farmers and support lobbying for Big Ag interests. These “checkoff” programs are essentially a tax on farmers, sending funds to industry-specific boards that have a track-record of misusing and abusing their power. Farmers want to rein in this corrupt program, and there’s a simple way you can help make it happen! >> == | == About 83% of the money that cattle farmers are required to pay through the checkoff program ends up with the National Cattlemen’s Beef Association, which lobbies on competition and fair-trade practices for the world’s largest meatpacking corporations. As a result, many small and independent farmers are essentially being taxed to support their biggest competitors. No farmer or rancher should be required to pay into a program that harms their own market. Every second we wait to act, more money is being funneled into Big Ag lobbyist groups \-- == == Standing with you, Chloë Waterman Climate-friendly food senior program manager, Friends of the Earth | Contact Us: Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687 foe.org/about-us/contact/

name: The Federalist Wire
subject: Joe Biden is fuming after being threatened by this lead Republican
body:
TheFederalistWire.com

DAILY NEWS | September 10, 2023

Joe Biden is fuming
after being threatened by this lead Republican
The Biden administration has
shown that their job isn't to make friends. They've proven that
with one disastrous decision after another.

And Joe Biden is fuming after
being threatened by this lead Republican.
➞ Continue Reading

TRENDING NEWS

Kamala Harris just made a
bold prediction that will have your head spinning

Politicians should
have a certain degree of confidence. But what Harris did, is
borderline insane.
➞ Continue Reading

The hammer just dropped on
Hunter Biden in a truly stunning way

The son of President
Joe Biden just can't seem to keep himself out of trouble. But
this time he's really in a bind.
➞ Continue Reading

Kamala Harris let her big
mouth run wild in this crazy CBS interview

Vice President Kamala
Harris is a problem for the Biden admin. She's proven that time
and again.
➞ Continue Reading

ABOUT
US
The
Federalist Wire brings you dependable news that highlights the US
political landscape as well as the economy. We're here for
citizens who want to stay in the know. If you're particularly
interested in politics or economics, our regular news updates
will help keep you informed. If you're not especially interested
in the topics but know it's important to keep up, then our
reports will be simple to understand.

You know that the political and
economic worlds often collide, and that's why we provide you with
specific coverage. Our news team strives to pinpoint and report
the stories that interest you most. We keep our eyes on domestic
and international matters, both political and financial, so we
can help you stay on top of the latest happenings.

DISCLAIMER
Your privacy is important to us.
It is The Federalist Wire's policy to respect your privacy and
comply with any applicable law and regulation regarding any
personal information we may collect about you, including across
our website, and other sites we own and operate.

State: Virginia

name: Governor Ron DeSantis
subject: Hi, this is Ron DeSantis. This is who I am.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
Our path to victory is clear from the first debate. Now I'd like to make sure you know what I'm fighting for and who I am.

---
| | | | | | | | | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=531de4a88cdc4a0c921dadeea8db0b30&_e=NCe6P2htgYbfeEhiSnLnXfbyHeV10pFOBM7em5V7i_IOJ7uPlWa38GsrrcjOa2XFHzga2B5mPOlJ9nel0A3BkTtjgIhBvjObqxnGyISrDHR_fyVX2leMFnqN-3l7J4wJLv0dzfjtnuPJRUKZ9NiUGqod_LfolDWiBDtzZ_1w70RkyCKAcbmEsF9FgJ-_nrmshlINIs56XSDCINHiovCJ9KVXHViwHRElQQfKq1lpzICMQazVVcibH8zmHLwOKhKAA1JSCFWieo6SdU-LtDIhSHI9OuRwYvYqmIslzfxy8aCC7T-YJzekdRLEEPS76BpBUdPHbPaeRYS3h87fq6uV35uBONWd9eUIWw6v3owv68YGU-a3WQ6ViOFV5MOPlvC28pDyTbhYkClNaFkgG2bfyjztL0AclGi393CuypZt-SE%3D)
---
Friend, The first Republican primary debate was an opportunity for the nation to hear directly from their future President. To earn YOUR support, I stood up, weathered the attacks, and now I know that we are one step closer to stopping the decline of this country. **If you 're just tuning into the race after this pivotal debate, I'd like to take a moment to tell you a little bit about myself so you know why I'm running for President, what I plan to accomplish, and why I'm asking for your support.** _**Here 's my story**_: I was a blue-collar kid born and raised in Florida who went on to work my way through Yale University where I was Team Captain of our baseball team, before going on to graduate from Harvard Law School. After earning my degrees and witnessing the horrific attack on our nation's freedom on September 11th, 2001, I knew I had to stand up. I volunteered for the Navy and went on to serve in Iraq as a JAG Officer in support of SEAL Team 1.
---
| [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=531de4a88cdc4a0c921dadeea8db0b30&_e=NCe6P2htgYbfeEhiSnLnXfbyHeV10pFOBM7em5V7i_IOJ7uPlWa38GsrrcjOa2XFHzga2B5mPOlJ9nel0A3BkTtjgIhBvjObqxnGyISrDHR_fyVX2leMFnqN-3l7J4wJLv0dzfjtnuPJRUKZ9NiUGqod_LfolDWiBDtzZ_1w70RkyCKAcbmEsF9FgJ-_nrmshlINIs56XSDCINHiovCJ9KVXHViwHRElQQfKq1lpzICMQazVVcibH8zmHLwOKhKAA1JSCFWieo6SdU-LtDIhSPa07WT_q1l2RzLmvTelmMnNyjbjUO3pF1u8kE1MZv8PeggCdLHqn6ilok05yvKdY1DWANqq5NdENg4isjUxAwnS0wEyjEpvXNBRxd_-1MJT1KT1tbPdMbMwLr7DWrvawKSd89w7regJErbKen6ncyw%3D)
---
Since my time serving in the Navy, I have taken on the role of prosecutor, Congressman, proud Governor of the free state of Florida, father to three young children, and husband to my wonderful wife, Casey.
---
| [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=531de4a88cdc4a0c921dadeea8db0b30&_e=NCe6P2htgYbfeEhiSnLnXfbyHeV10pFOBM7em5V7i_IOJ7uPlWa38GsrrcjOa2XFHzga2B5mPOlJ9nel0A3BkTtjgIhBvjObqxnGyISrDHR_fyVX2leMFnqN-3l7J4wJLv0dzfjtnuPJRUKZ9NiUGqod_LfolDWiBDtzZ_1w70RkyCKAcbmEsF9FgJ-_nrmshlINIs56XSDCINHiovCJ9KVXHViwHRElQQfKq1lpzICMQazVVcibH8zmHLwOKhKAA1JSCFWieo6SdU-LtDIhSNcDw8wnu33Xo0qZy9t-Hh5MAtBGu15s5ixeERMoTyAf6OEmiOTKg7cxWp9VhOgyOWv94uGavq1Oo-BqyeBEMtUaFURUIYHQns83F5eosQ54U-Bx5cExSAw7LEA8BCj6M7pUYojnEdQg8S7N67vSokg%3D)
---

As Governor, I have made it my mission to lead with conviction, unwavering energy, and with a refusal to back down. That's why, in Florida, we held the line when freedom hung in the balance. When Covid policies across the country made commonsense an uncommon virtue, our state became a refuge of sanity and a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans. Leadership matters and I believe my record speaks for itself. Since I took office as Governor, Florida now:
* Ranks as the number one economy in the country by CNBC;
* Ranks number one for new business formations;

* Ranks number one for net in-migration;
* Ranks number one for economic growth amongst large states;
* Has an unemployment rate that is a percentage point below the national average and even lower than other large states like California and New York;
* Ranks number one in education by US News and World Report;
* Has NO state income tax;

* Has a crime rate at a 50-year low.

I have worked tirelessly to transform a once purple state to a deep red blueprint for freedom.
---
| [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=531de4a88cdc4a0c921dadeea8db0b30&_e=NCe6P2htgYbfeEhiSnLnXfbyHeV10pFOBM7em5V7i_IOJ7uPlWa38GsrrcjOa2XFHzga2B5mPOlJ9nel0A3BkTtjgIhBvjObqxnGyISrDHR_fyVX2leMFnqN-3l7J4wJLv0dzfjtnuPJRUKZ9NiUGqod_LfolDWiBDtzZ_1w70RkyCKAcbmEsF9FgJ-_nrmshlINIs56XSDCINHiovCJ9KVXHViwHRElQQfKq1lpzICMQazVVcibH8zmHLwOKhKAA1JSCFWieo6SdU-LtDIhSNfWdQBlcA2xEXhqSCl98qFiZ1orBaiyXj9u5vPDh1eoq8HnuSE3iAVScxL5LSnhHixn1-8Y-9xzJBk9zUoZODDjPVLJIyPcEtgTjhNqcgeq6wbsp21plvHk5x6MoXZVL4Q0DOkvc5N4a8PgE57OITQ%3D)
---
But here's the problem, Friend. Failing leftist policies across the country are shoving a radical ideology down your throat. They're telling you that men can get pregnant, want to impose a social credit score on you, and let Mexican drug cartels cross our border freely and continue to murder Americans. This is NOT okay. Riots and disorder have infested some of this nation's oldest cities and turned places like Chicago, Philadelphia, and San Francisco into crime slums. I am NOT willing to accept this decline. We have a President who is floundering and bowing down to his own party instead of doing what is right for the American people. He has consistently bent the knee to the woke mob. These radical policies across the nation are making it nearly impossible for hardworking families to achieve the American Dream, and as a father of three young children and husband to my wife Casey, I cannot sit idly by while their future hangs in the balance. _**This election is not about me. It 's about YOU and the American children who are being subjected to the woke mob's fraud.**_
---
| [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=531de4a88cdc4a0c921dadeea8db0b30&_e=NCe6P2htgYbfeEhiSnLnXfbyHeV10pFOBM7em5V7i_IOJ7uPlWa38GsrrcjOa2XFHzga2B5mPOlJ9nel0A3BkTtjgIhBvjObqxnGyISrDHR_fyVX2leMFnqN-3l7J4wJLv0dzfjtnuPJRUKZ9NiUGqod_LfolDWiBDtzZ_1w70RkyCKAcbmEsF9FgJ-_nrmshlINIs56XSDCINHiovCJ9KVXHViwHRElQQfKq1lpzICMQazVVcibH8zmHLwOKhKAA1JSCFWieo6SdU-LtDIhSA1KoxDsLgkRSBglnRSXYblMos3zGJ4zz6_OimU5f_D7BywF7lN98Yj8zdebqetXuikyYgGrxNRzwptPvLCehOOhtW1DHE-v_6gW9hF1vlw2HfpJ2GwBtq61oiOUirjEmpfUYdm27GLyRs_6918VJEw%3D)
---
Our nation is facing a critical choice in 2024: Freedom or Decline. That is why I am running for President; I will not stand by while Joe Biden sends this nation into deeper decline for another four years. I'm not running to be President. I am running to DO things as President and from Day One we are going to rip up disastrous policies that are harming American families and REVERSE the decline Joe Biden has let fester in this country. The time to act is NOW.
---

| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---

The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

Now I'd like to make sure you know what I'm fighting for and who I am. | | | | | | | | | | Friend, The first Republican primary debate was an opportunity for the nation to hear directly from their future President. To earn YOUR support, I stood up, weathered the attacks, and now I know that we are one step closer to stopping the decline of this country. If you 're just tuning into the race after this pivotal debate, I'd like to take a moment to tell you a little bit about myself so you know why I'm running for President, what I plan to accomplish, and why I'm asking for your support. Here 's my story: I was a blue-collar kid born and raised in Florida who went on to work my way through Yale University where I was Team Captain of our baseball team, before going on to graduate from Harvard Law School. After earning my degrees and witnessing the horrific attack on our nation's freedom on September 11th, 2001, I knew I had to stand up. I volunteered for the Navy and went on to serve in Iraq as a JAG Officer in support of SEAL Team 1. | Since my time serving in the Navy, I have taken on the role of prosecutor, Congressman, proud Governor of the free state of Florida, father to three young children, and husband to my wonderful wife, Casey. | As Governor, I have made it my mission to lead with conviction, unwavering energy, and with a refusal to back down. That's why, in Florida, we held the line when freedom hung in the balance. When Covid policies across the country made commonsense an uncommon virtue, our state became a refuge of sanity and a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans. Leadership matters and I believe my record speaks for itself. Since I took office as Governor, Florida now: Ranks as the number one economy in the country by CNBC; Ranks number one for new business formations; Ranks number one for net in-migration; Ranks number one for economic growth amongst large states; Has an unemployment rate that is a percentage point below the national average and even lower than other large states like California and New York; Ranks number one in education by US News and World Report; Has NO state income tax; Has a crime rate at a 50-year low. I have worked tirelessly to transform a once purple state to a deep red blueprint for freedom. | But here's the problem, Friend. Failing leftist policies across the country are shoving a radical ideology down your throat. They're telling you that men can get pregnant, want to impose a social credit score on you, and let Mexican drug cartels cross our border freely and continue to murder Americans. This is NOT okay. Riots and disorder have infested some of this nation's oldest cities and turned places like Chicago, Philadelphia, and San Francisco into crime slums. I am NOT willing to accept this decline. We have a President who is floundering and bowing down to his own party instead of doing what is right for the American people. He has consistently bent the knee to the woke mob. These radical policies across the nation are making it nearly impossible for hardworking families to achieve the American Dream, and as a father of three young children and husband to my wife Casey, I cannot sit idly by while their future hangs in the balance. This election is not about me. It 's about YOU and the American children who are being subjected to the woke mob's fraud. | Our nation is facing a critical choice in 2024: Freedom or Decline. That is why I am running for President; I will not stand by while Joe Biden sends this nation into deeper decline for another four years. I'm not running to be President. I am running to DO things as President and from Day One we are going to rip up disastrous policies that are harming American families and REVERSE the decline Joe Biden has let fester in this country. The time to act is NOW. | | | I believe that decline is choice, success is attainable, and freedom is worth fighting for. I know that no one is entitled to anything in this world, so I am fighting to earn your support and lead when it matters most. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder). name: Read/Act News
subject: Embrace Lifelong Learning with Hillsdale College's Free Online Courses
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.readactnews.)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

As the new school year begins, it’s a great time for people of all ages to learn something new and exciting. We’re all called to improve our minds whether we’re returning to school this Fall or past our days sitting in a classroom.

Through Hillsdale College’s free online courses, you can pursue a lifetime of learning for free and at your own pace.
**
**[](http://trk.readactnews.)
Hillsdale’s 40 free online courses provide a world of intellectual exploration where you can engage with a like-minded community and increase your knowledge and understanding.

With these courses, you can tackle the classic works of literature you’ve always wanted to read. You can overcome your fears of the “dismal science” and learn what makes the American economy prosper. You can finally understand what had seemed so complicated in freshman philosophy class. And, you can learn how to separate truth from fiction in America’s history.

Here are a few of our most popular online courses that have captivated the minds of learners:

1. **C.S. Lewis on Christianity** : Discover C.S. Lewis’s writings on Christianity, exploring morality, conversion, prayer, the Bible, suffering, and the afterlife. Timeless insights from classic works including _Mere Christianity_ , _The Screwtape Letters_ , _The Great Divorce_ , and _The Abolition of Man_.

2. **The Genesis Story** : Uncover the meaning and beauty of Genesis. Explore the complex relationship between God and man, the consequences of a rupture in that relationship, and the path toward reconciliation.

3. **Constitution 101** : Explore the foundation of American governance by delving into the natural rights theory of the Founding, the link between the Declaration of Independence and the Constitution, the crisis of the Civil War, the Progressive rejection of the Founding, and the nature of modern liberalism.

4. **American Citizenship and Its Decline** : Join Victor Davis Hanson in an eight-lecture course that examines the origins and history of citizenship in the West and the grave challenges American citizenship faces today.

**
**Embrace the joy of learning with one of these free online courses by Hillsdale College.

To get started and learn more about our unique range of courses, visit us at: [https://online.hillsdale.edu/](http://trk.readactnews.)

We look forward to embarking on this educational journey with you.

Warm regards,

Kyle Murnen ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

---
| |
---

name: Full Mag News
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions

| This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=247cff26ef1140b6bb3a2db3d325e674&_e=zoCUxSUhc8mMJZSoO4NvWwJ6Ti5lol-W4HficJuUZuoZv2ETzC2YWOtjOMwNows8Wh1NOKQiVMiO-9bCggoZhvxf_cGUdwlkqnxABnQu219GB3od5gHemafzJvcwaFT9mPGcp_fmie_tV5RAokE7L4ppUgSIQSqFvKYUpME7pgxfVoiOBdyO1EwoJBgfkXikDQtsXyqphMtTtn4LOuRmMR7A9Yt5oDeyt0RIV4_7o2a5oQYQTjY6ohXLFQJaqN8g8evDxi2uoNXe7xt4bdGT6JuBFs0yfszcpzJN13gEl5ukiPhHkD-R05T6Nxq6wu_gnJc8IBTSUL38DK-DFGot4EdfOjGW2h8MvqCYnux3sjeyjobQXRUc8gtJk9sT6WZ1IL3GbtqIWRscXcpspCZ3T_yuXgmPfH2S2hQ2OSd-T_Kpylbsv2KCjQvQoDwjAIqy)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=247cff26ef1140b6bb3a2db3d325e674&_e=zoCUxSUhc8mMJZSoO4NvWwJ6Ti5lol-W4HficJuUZuoZv2ETzC2YWOtjOMwNows8Wh1NOKQiVMiO-9bCggoZhvxf_cGUdwlkqnxABnQu219GB3od5gHemafzJvcwaFT9mPGcp_fmie_tV5RAokE7L4ppUgSIQSqFvKYUpME7pgxfVoiOBdyO1EwoJBgfkXikDQtsXyqphMtTtn4LOuRmMR7A9Yt5oDeyt0RIV4_7o2a5oQYQTjY6ohXLFQJaqN8g8evDxi2uoNXe7xt4bdGT6IWB5LxbOjNbBAgc8RhKzuycsytQa8FZOAvNtZ3v52fnM8ztfB9ezqmaoXYBNdJBwcm51-xyCCpOGjB9Uk-rnNFjg00WVaXQ6qYHIzijYyUPjVYvV2QEwE2H5sCotLUPwP44vP-HZQ4Oj7r-MZru1WFZiWRsORUenb2edDxIf4Ik)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=247cff26ef1140b6bb3a2db3d325e674&_e=zoCUxSUhc8mMJZSoO4NvWwJ6Ti5lol-W4HficJuUZuoZv2ETzC2YWOtjOMwNows8Wh1NOKQiVMiO-9bCggoZhvxf_cGUdwlkqnxABnQu219GB3od5gHemafzJvcwaFT9mPGcp_fmie_tV5RAokE7L4ppUgSIQSqFvKYUpME7pgxfVoiOBdyO1EwoJBgfkXikDQtsXyqphMtTtn4LOuRmMR7A9Yt5oDeyt0RIV4_7o2a5oQYQTjY6ohXLFQJaqN8g8evDxi2uoNXe7xt4bdGT6B0EIYMd6lpJd8N4jZCFY7dv-ht-PRLWw7Kuxs9PsO88peaakJiKGdOc36WL1dvyMAl6WZDvtSEhPJOFCEw4vw9y7pqSQQUlVGMf9jkoTjHR5USmZDUvQLMjn8oQxJLT-AUolz3O4o9O0w9rPL1YWGsfCeaneOlsh8usTZ1FK64n)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=247cff26ef1140b6bb3a2db3d325e674&_e=zoCUxSUhc8mMJZSoO4NvWwJ6Ti5lol-W4HficJuUZuoZv2ETzC2YWOtjOMwNows8Wh1NOKQiVMiO-9bCggoZhvxf_cGUdwlkqnxABnQu219GB3od5gHemafzJvcwaFT9mPGcp_fmie_tV5RAokE7L4ppUgSIQSqFvKYUpME7pgxfVoiOBdyO1EwoJBgfkXikDQtsXyqphMtTtn4LOuRmMR7A9Yt5oDeyt0RIV4_7o2a5oQYQTjY6ohXLFQJaqN8g8evDxi2uoNXe7xt4bdGT6Ky2RscCUDl0_MbyWFw5ifINa-h2MCHcc5o3iCrpF1O58a7qWHGGbQXjeAj0pGFCklztYvna43k2RRz5q1o_cWCGfWuR2ErWZp_Gj4UBorteLknFeQuC4NNi6QmlePgqfaju1qOZTyyrQra9_KfHhP__NrxoJixFobmM94w_S9H6).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

clean_body: C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions | This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read. His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century. That's why we produced "" which you can now own on DVD. | | | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including: good and evil, conversion and faith, prayer and the Bible, suffering and death, * heaven and hell, and much more. Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis and After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man, and the co-editor of The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns! This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity. That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with . Best regards, Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College | | Full Mag News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

name: House GOP Chairwoman Elise Stefanik
subject: Not since the Civil War have Democrats tried this hard to keep a Republican off the ballot…
body:
Democrats are doing the same thing to Pres. Trump as they did to Abraham Lincoln
| | [ ](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=af42ada75a7e4b26b0fcda904d165353&_e=i-CFFEM7RAKCJRcnYpodW7xd5FQbtBsnjQE3sBJXTgb5WJp_MkHplVhvbO16jNcsgRUupKwhJ14vo3-QIhuNcLZJPDKD_LOqVWthjxQruyos9tmE9ztsOCQgHuX1nmoj11S_hHpE3cKdsp0cc4AF46puRPZd9OPDuABU3mwQ2Vuv3-plxTGm2dM81z0_lAPlRJMR7ePYG_lnvZPFFxIgPCnUDWyBnpVTRyFsgwL8usaf7fXd8khy1pz6UCGa7QNzLlYrMso1y3SEFmgR5xQLWricDHfMaQajVpNqU3FRTAV7kxW8-1918OteDvALNZl-WudNG7kIJq-jHY1rdBoOJA%3D%3D)
---
Friend, While we continue to fight to ensure that conservatives have the resources to compete and win in every battleground district in next year's election Democrats have been pursuing every dirty trick in the book in their desperate attempt to cling to control of our government. Liberal elites in the DC swamp know that they cannot win in a fair fight because their Left-wing policies, which have given us failures like Bidenomics, a spike in crime, and open borders, are going to lead to a backlash in the form of a massive Red Wave in 2024. **That is why they are trying to rig the election before a vote can be cast!** We have already seen liberal lawyers like Marc Elias and Eric Holder attempt to gerrymander congressional seats and radical prosecutors like Jack Smith and Fani Willis indict President Trump on bogus charges that will force Joe Biden's top political opponent to be in court throughout the election cycle. But you will not believe how ridiculous the Left's latest attempts to hold on to power are... **Democrats are pressuring Secretaries of State across the country to use the 14th Amendment to remove President Trump from the ballot!** These deranged extremists are trying to use Section 3 of the 14th Amendment, a clause created to prevent leaders of the Confederacy from running for office after the Civil War, as an argument to bar Trump from office! **Ironically, the last time a major party 's presidential candidate was removed from the ballot was a few months before the Civil War when Democrats removed Abraham Lincoln from the ballot in several states.**
President Trump was 100% right when he said that the Left is not after him, they are after us, and he is just in the way. That's why it's so important that if we want any chance of saving our country we need to let Democrats know that we will not allow them to rig our elections and destroy our republic. **We have started a petition to tell Secretaries of State across the nation that the American public DOES NOT want President Trump removed from the ballot and DEMANDS that they uphold free and fair elections up and down the ballot.** [**I invite you to add your name to the petition and if you are able I also ask that you consider making a donation to the House GOP Battleground Fund today to help House Republicans hold the line by protecting and growing our conservative led GOP House Majority****.**](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=af42ada75a7e4b26b0fcda904d165353&_e=i-CFFEM7RAKCJRcnYpodW7xd5FQbtBsnjQE3sBJXTgb5WJp_MkHplVhvbO16jNcsgRUupKwhJ14vo3-QIhuNcLZJPDKD_LOqVWthjxQruyos9tmE9ztsOCQgHuX1nmoj11S_hHpE3cKdsp0cc4AF46puRPZd9OPDuABU3mwQ2VvbyGhaas4-RfQc8Qe7S4eGKq-gpjphLCfBABgbKRx3FT7vw9mUrw5pq57UgSYzE44vYSg4Sne-JZdx8DOYUTQn9zzbW_HJwr52ZFpguu2YMJUxvaX_PlWmH_CfIc_AQirkqPjUPSbsw5PLLdhHCW7xbWebG5BcWZ3XHVLYSHDRpA%3D%3D)
| [ **SIGN THE PETITION** ](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=af42ada75a7e4b26b0fcda904d165353&_e=i-CFFEM7RAKCJRcnYpodW7xd5FQbtBsnjQE3sBJXTgb5WJp_MkHplVhvbO16jNcsgRUupKwhJ14vo3-QIhuNcLZJPDKD_LOqVWthjxQruyos9tmE9ztsOCQgHuX1nmoj11S_hHpE3cKdsp0cc4AF46puRPZd9OPDuABU3mwQ2Vu2zv_fB70R_uUoMLIG4ibRNu_TAWZE_x6k1f1OBUBlsuVvXHdN1bx3vQhMl1hWpumDuFiP7Cl7mV4jL_ABbxu6AKvas26ZF8-e5lqahtsrlgxsEKxkOPD3KiDa7i_SmErTrnslfwea-y59HL4IZ8SefxkBDsPYWDjk8B4B9ApHyA%3D%3D)
---
_In Liberty,_

Elise Stefanik
| [ ](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=af42ada75a7e4b26b0fcda904d165353&_e=i-CFFEM7RAKCJRcnYpodW7xd5FQbtBsnjQE3sBJXTgb5WJp_MkHplVhvbO16jNcsgRUupKwhJ14vo3-QIhuNcLZJPDKD_LOqVWthjxQruyos9tmE9ztsOCQgHuX1nmoj11S_hHpE3cKdsp0cc4AF46puRPZd9OPDuABU3mwQ2VvMHu_-e0iE18Itav76AU9gKJs1AW4aHAJPeoxL6NtoGyIyubImQYDDeda8dPueaPh2gVYVPmu9tYaD6nePhldhj-4kurJr-lw09cj3LOBX29JFbIRb0ic3Pmkqkq9JUJq_CaPK_AJxJ3dEQSlkpZVVoz-51wDqFDouh2LHTJryTA%3D%3D)

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: I am writing to humbly ask if you can make your first online contribution to my campaign before midnight tonight. Thank you in advance. - RG
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
This FEC deadline is important. It's critical. Because when it ends we're legally required to report our numbers.
#

Good morning, Peter.
I am writing to ask — humbly — if you can please make a contribution to my campaign before midnight tonight.
The truth is, we haven't had enough first-time donors give this month. I don’t know why, but I do know that winning Arizona's Senate seat is key to control of the Senate.
So if we're going to stay on track to our goals ahead of our next FEC deadline at the end of this month, I have to turn people who have yet to donate online to our campaign.
And this FEC deadline is important. It's critical. Because when it ends we're legally required to report our numbers. So please:
[**Can I count on you to use this link and contribute $3 to my campaign for Senate today? There's so much at stake in this race and I need your help to reach our goals.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-sept23.a-3sdr&refcode=em230910-1-asp&t=1&akid=1168%2E734936%2EYCIBSk)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1044?c0=ruben-em-sept23.4uOuYS&amount=3&refcode=em230910-1-asp&t=2&akid=1168%2E734936%2EYCIBSk)**
---
****
| **[CONTRIBUTE OTHER](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1044?c0=ruben-em-sept23.4uOuYS&refcode=em230910-1-asp&t=3&akid=1168%2E734936%2EYCIBSk)**
---
****
Thank you,
Ruben

Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts, but if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=1168%2E734936%2EYCIBSk). If you would like to support Ruben's campaign for Senate, please consider [making a donation today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruben-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=5&refcode2=1168_734936_YCIBSk&akid=1168%2E734936%2EYCIBSk)

name: DLCC Newsletter
subject: Republicans threaten to impeach a democratically-elected justice while Democrats make record-breaking investments in Virginia …and everything else you need to know in the states
body:
Welcome to the latest edition of the DLCC's newsletter, September 10th, 2023 | | |
---
| | | [](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0qGpwpXgoJxt9wxxr6-3NGZy8uzjP7lQns4eM7mQr18nbBTscuYL22isIY29FSQLcV6mr91eEUVyemsu9wrmEdJ3RiZrFUtRExJnxpDQb-ez3Yjo1dthCjcsTse7b1aGme32dlgda02HiHxYQBErL_-DF0puHBpzc97IB2ZbbDONnQJeKottFQEb4myrMa1XBM3-RrJYzwJT5KLHWOXwS3UaF4tc08KTIC38ms22rgKDwlTlpq7kv5ZrLOm49J9sHOY7KxX6W3dgZILmJwOo4BKysAG3QyuINKHaUnw9Et3uzOV82aeqMHKnet1N7vQ-GnVEHGsuexG0m8XPZ0zJKZJueEkrgA60VEQ72T-HXcE0tziqpdBeL9pZ8yYqqjAPO4UsAk3uZ0EtOng_kJtszT7J_2r6-03D3LxoZ4yVU1LH4b3p2oAOXE-9eB8LTv1k9EoRkkp0o__zwk1Nbe1EMRNdSYDjIYWDSaYJZ6seocYNO2lEYfnD46PrUyuZQ8cNj2FHthEgMr5zbbro5fVktyPCzgJBPg4Jmk1obQJsIFCd3y2K62gjPjUO35m8biRYp4q-hAIaXbxMvVbpIpMqDepLEeJR-tx2eHP3Tt_-CHM7/3zh/NrmWiqiWTUCCKiSok_pn5A/h0/5NMO7MqoPq9pkrGuoMn7wSbGamNgoAtyJ-dAxdOW10I)
---
1️⃣ **_Virginia:_ President Biden directs $1.2 million to VA state legislative races**
In Virginia, following record-breaking GOP fundraising by Republican Gov. Glenn Youngkin ahead of key elections where all 140 seats are up for grabs, President Biden directed the DNC to invest 15 times the amount they did just four years prior, boosting the DLCC’s efforts in this key battleground state. [**All eyes are on Virginia, and the stakes couldn't be higher →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDDUV27dB1SLFWpo-Uwox6EOSj-f2GB18S5Jyd3qa9145F4UjkjWaQpcvE2U3tmQ9Tblg8s7XnHyinn50j7_wsFfzq03RVbKp9B4Z7C7pTm-Y5T5EouVJz20CI_I7T9OQ0bUg090a9BJpuV4FBi9EZhlKofx0icRTjtamBpaTq0_aj7GflvVPaTfPDTQMJz0T2ZoQNrbWnZzCbfTiFA-O-82YCcF0QO1f5o2XmjflM-byvPVRmD_yHUZ_Q9zfGE3AkaRJlf8d9cOtGABxvH21GNxJIbRGedNgACH3xqZWmqanHOvolOeidUvg0xwf39CupeKR8ugxZ-7RWrGVIb1ThjvsAEhRLgTvKvQ3y0jDOnR5TAxjKtyVAugSQia88G0ZsDotvVV9Hz1TGJS8RN4j_Lfb8mhFDdkECEer3ZHsAyd0i0vWo6odgx1TSnBWMVIbgTSbLON6bQj2bksK6aHyI-5dHuf0PZq835xQDWQ4REiyb_MhP_8IxwPQU4suGkwWcY4kahQ8l25zn5nQTNJA3tqVvRyWLIvXA-82gXTlMt7Ekr48Vy_7YRCCesY_xiBBV3kO6m81z_2YRHPRSRZd-alnJX0pYYJhPjh54TNrZ9o0YvlavnZPFUcZDwPtccko32TLW6XGRwvTA8wGG8gHaBkmp4jEyMoD0gWrz7z5dWDc8EBgh6Bw56JXOglAKaWzIg/3zh/NrmWiqiWTUCCKiSok_pn5A/h1/XDNsJC6C9tiWEtyy1cdCA5P6AA2I2s3I2y4fAJ1p7Q8)
2️⃣ **_Mississippi:_ The state’s first openly LGBTQ+ lawmaker is set to serve**
In Mississippi, victory for Democrat Fabian Nelson ushers in a new wave of LGBTQ+ progress following Republicans' countless harmful attacks on the LGBTQ+ community. [**He promises that when anti-LGBTQ+ legislation is brought by the GOP, he will “fight that every single day” →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDGlyFEPfIQqTPhAJ7ICxnKEt7EW2XPv5_fQ032ZYVRdfUBgi_erYUQpk0axRQeN4IBQfax7SZMadtQDbJDKZ4QO3cGjC2spxgpZxKQUTdLPFnx8pdHsrM7Hcji_9nP3CGOaP0SIkgTMjaFZTIsJ3szf6c5OIT3PWAtQjeBLMtAYolCiHA7suQ1oHWL2-nkejIlKij6GBVUnlzl7v41OyeZCyQONFfcrhBk72Vpu2Bzhb7i1cz7A1qLsyXyQ-6hDj1LHLjFEvKVwySIC0nh-Wio573S8mZU_uNpbdvfaEJLXJjJHDtpesWPbs8jol5j32wZrv6AVWVC-mzbEPXFn-HZDUoVgNUsfSF90vl9N_i7jBYu4Pc_26ypfjBM7gbEyvxGLpoZFB6zMzikaIbbmBZT2JTzSuik1e94kQyqwi2bUuAyOgfR_7U7GNyVZeC9nmXo0nFVL6ApRrnqIkbBrf-mN1fu8Zp5oWRTKmn-PhvCCtd71wI2T3C-z6lh_9sh7L5xd78H__lgp_BiQiAWZKYc6WSNxt1lNTNy7SJqbja9XPTAboEnidCPauUXmqEKEfZMJ6K3AsWHBoKM3bXxFp-xlK1Ka4NmNpUMPQoMqkpya8f_eB-qMaWjELdwDY0hw70w7PtK66JKxNlQvRF-wyI2C9MuorHQ6N60iXvpX1LTjdoTXGiF_9o_AqlRoVlnC68A/3zh/NrmWiqiWTUCCKiSok_pn5A/h2/0k81N79_q60NEt_p43HYk2kiml4MD0tW0JSSp2380BQ)
3️⃣ **_Michigan:_ House Republicans encourage party to mock paid family leave**
In Michigan, following calls made by Gov. Whitmer to expand and protect paid family leave – a critical resource for new families and our communities at large – [**Republicans are urging their colleagues to refer to this leave as “summer break for adults” →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/dSCQfi9FLISmU3ZE3bfPhoKrFcq9SVTGzANJ5m7kncsykSoMLkNgX0asD2OY-mgvyE_J1y4TpQ9xc2105SGTQPLolJeWx76Xh97VQpFRQtvilk1xKIStY6c8AjScJKUiJv9JiwN78VsbnKSYfCi0JvA3cm1E5inYatHN8ZjjYxTxw2nHpup3L0cwwJhDnMkYA3OCX4pB0WAxyWnjY8Ui2zzC9N8jEHSZtqnQj6J9mqWuAdcVD6BO7ZstUs8ZwE09x_xAdTCWULaUwX1BmjkiP9Hywv_7Svp3QQtAegMJ70-UM-ZF9ND5C3AbECZxPnG8iMf-IQW7VLQFlFeGQv6vVWFu3Phd5ZZ8gr5R3-brUwe1tMhXFNmO26SuUSE4aqRQH61K32h2qpl1CQGxNNIPhelc23esndZcItEsATQcLC8wT1O8SvupJSkLFE6GCiivPKL6P-3tzmxi7F1C6fXp8qxR43xaKFxKXIovR8M3lnHb8ByiKPHqiDHH0asTCzdiLCVJcFQtiKBfwsuMAw_5GUMp2-TLXhgNk_BdU1Lwr3LuqgGltCezTVYHi6Mx9oqkxBHjbc1GbLBeAzNS8Ix1mD5G2M1FhsTBjYzGF4WLAxUYHiOPMBMJUwek7kRyOPMJveRGisZoIOS-VFg91r0w366xRbnSnVwoyvYUQSqvSk7kAPwEuG8F7M7FJnyQ7xbTy56Z47meMzMSkUSMLLxyqYT1etb8_b4G_vLuXGvZ98cIpjLzy-DUY-BudQVAgtlZNrZGKV0bklZ5WXPuybSBoQ/3zh/NrmWiqiWTUCCKiSok_pn5A/h3/cV3Mb4NKiZz8zW13Oo7BVs9gAc_F7-xnoz0tqbB2XUo)
4️⃣ **_Read:_ Why are Republicans calling to impeach a Wisconsin Supreme Court justice, even though she has yet to hear a case? **
When Justice Janet Protasiewicz was elected this spring, she marked a liberal shift in Wisconsin’s highest court for the first time in 15 years. Republicans feel their power threatened after liberals took a 4-3 majority on the bench this April, and they will stop at nothing to maintain their long-unchecked power. name: Senator Chris Murphy
subject: The NRA wants to make an example out of me.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
Hey there, it’s Alex Padilla. My friend Chris Murphy is up for re-election, and we’re working to support him against the gun lobby and the GOP. I hope you’ll read the message from him below, and then [**consider splitting a contribution between our campaigns.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/553?c0=ap-em-sep23-murphy.A1uOOT&refcode=em230910-1-60&t=1&akid=1515%2E159979%2EsnSpOn)**
I knew from the moment I announced that I would run for reelection that the gun lobby would be after me.
They held Washington hostage for 30 years, blocking every serious attempt at gun safety legislation, until I beat them last summer. They won’t go down without a fight.
When I announced, I said, “The status quo fights back. And I know that the billionaires and the gun companies are going to throw the kitchen sink at me in this campaign.”
And it’s true. I know the gun lobby wants nothing more than to defeat me. There are Republicans in Connecticut desperate for an opening to challenge me.
The PACs and corporations I refuse to take money from are ready to line up behind a challenger who will fall in line in Washington. The NRA wants to make an example out of me. So I need your support.
[**If you believe in me, please split $5 between my reelection and Alex Padilla before the end-of-month FEC deadline to help us continue leading this fight in Washington.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/553?c0=ap-em-sep23-murphy.A1uOOT&refcode=em230910-1-60&t=2&akid=1515%2E159979%2EsnSpOn)**
**[DONATE $5](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/553?c0=ap-em-sep23-murphy.A1uOOT&refcode=em230910-1-60&amount=5&t=3&akid=1515%2E159979%2EsnSpOn)**
**[DONATE OTHER](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/553?c0=ap-em-sep23-murphy.A1uOOT&refcode=em230910-1-60&t=4&akid=1515%2E159979%2EsnSpOn)**
I’m running a true grassroots campaign. I want to make clear that more people are supporting our movement and our progressive ideas than ever before.
My campaign won’t take PAC money. Not a dime of corporate money. It’s up to you, me and everyone who shares our values.
Thank you for standing with me in this fight and those ahead.
Every best wish,
Chris Murphy
**[DONATE](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/553?c0=ap-em-sep23-murphy.A1uOOT&refcode=em230910-1-60&t=5&akid=1515%2E159979%2EsnSpOn)**

Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=6&akid=1515%2E159979%2EsnSpOn)

name: Emily Busch
subject: This has been on my mind
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EMILY BUSCH FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | | [](http://links.emilyformichigan.com/u/click?_t=e92c5e294c1440b880a7ffdf88c24a48&_m=6813ec98dc244a6aac67bdc0bd6bf0ae&_e=QZPMUnC5Go8h0bB4E-rwcyS18-OHRa_jJmJAaNBMnDe8pAVEikBbDCCLYN_RX2h4kD6i9L8lYhI475QLWe9NVqPtQOjBPrbEeutwrCkFc_b_tS3KIadgSHGB0aH4BYdHCAkpoSeBYa7_tbTI7dtwRHuEOAf6bh036EYWUzVqSEEKlfDhY4xGmGjjFNAAqq7xhPaEM-rZRt5K77vedOLT23rMuwNRvIjt7GcbADPiVXx2m6C8tX_e2EG86dn7iVZ9pwRQORWn5h3zIJbbokuO9iT_p9U5mzEJasdaA5P344IWFDdLgZCJN5QB0jWHg2fTkMfKb4HgI2O5W3gShtEXq0Exe85aEut4sR35JuKztfv-yv4uy7GvximJih_mWWW0uQD8S19-fz7917GlZiXPdl79o9YmcTAxcwdlzsffins%3D) Hey there, Peter, I hope all is well! I wanted to reach out and just check in with you. While Congress is attempting to find a solution to keep the U.S. Government open, I can’t help but think about what I would be doing in this situation. **[But before I tell you what I would do, can you chip in $20 now to give me a quick EOQ boost?](http://links.emilyformichigan.com/u/click?_t=e92c5e294c1440b880a7ffdf88c24a48&_m=6813ec98dc244a6aac67bdc0bd6bf0ae&_e=QZPMUnC5Go8h0bB4E-rwcyS18-OHRa_jJmJAaNBMnDe8pAVEikBbDCCLYN_RX2h4kD6i9L8lYhI475QLWe9NVqPtQOjBPrbEeutwrCkFc_b_tS3KIadgSHGB0aH4BYdHCAkpoSeBYa7_tbTI7dtwRHuEOAf6bh036EYWUzVqSEEKlfDhY4xGmGjjFNAAqq7xhPaEM-rZRt5K77vedOLT23rMuwNRvIjt7GcbADPiVXx2m6C8tX_e2EG86dn7iVZ9ykHtQKiZxjJIQaCGoo_Ry4f6A9XWs-GhK8dC4C5ftGoQczgICnaDU0aHtDuyB28av74RTE4-DbetskxsVHA40DiLdvUo2CzjcNKUO_M03pN5LoE2O-QBKGVvhTVhUorYS-I_o0SKMsZOvPBHwyux3nCdz9h_U6o5ZNbb7a-q3u7Og7ErQapuAnSbd16pTQ1E)** As we know, Republicans in Washington would rather watch Americans suffer from a shutdown than get it together and fight across the aisle to get things done. If I were in Congress, I would be fighting day in and day out for the countless Michiganders who wouldn’t get paid as government employees, the veterans who would stop receiving healthcare, and so much more. The actions of this Congress affect all of us. It’s time people step in and do something. It’s time to put aside petty politics and really think about the needs of the American people and why representatives are hired in the first place. And I’m ready to fight for all. So if you’re tired of the same in-fighting and representatives continuously putting party over people, **[chip in and help me to get to Congress.](http://links.emilyformichigan.com/u/click?_t=e92c5e294c1440b880a7ffdf88c24a48&_m=6813ec98dc244a6aac67bdc0bd6bf0ae&_e=QZPMUnC5Go8h0bB4E-rwcyS18-OHRa_jJmJAaNBMnDe8pAVEikBbDCCLYN_RX2h4kD6i9L8lYhI475QLWe9NVqPtQOjBPrbEeutwrCkFc_b_tS3KIadgSHGB0aH4BYdHCAkpoSeBYa7_tbTI7dtwRHuEOAf6bh036EYWUzVqSEEKlfDhY4xGmGjjFNAAqq7xhPaEM-rZRt5K77vedOLT23rMuwNRvIjt7GcbADPiVXx2m6C8tX_e2EG86dn7iVZ9pwRQORWn5h3zIJbbokuO9gdobyrzHdm6v4yAMXP2BPmDndmwAjF-7anVyfS3UmwnGhc6hbymYB8HUaUpM-qOkGiuDgQP4fZ2pl7zjhl2VTnqMSwMZO314VCZgVnB7SCP6fRE9-UYh_YbioyHay32t1AbCB6c_nzVYNeihEKVYMg%3D)** Thank you so much. – Emily PAID FOR BY EMILY BUSCH FOR CONGRESS.

name: Matt Hoskins
subject: Mitch McConnell’s Era Nears Its End
disclaimer_text:
PAID FOR

body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsVw-cODNh

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osVw-cODNh

Fellow
Conservative:

Senator
Mitch McConnell (R-KY) had another scary episode during a recent
press conference in Kentucky.

It's the
second event of this kind within weeks and has many asking
whether it's time for the Senate Republican Leader to step down.

Senator
Mitch McConnell in Covington, KY.

One thing
is becoming clear: the Mitch McConnell era is quickly coming to
an end.

The big
question is what kind of Senate will exist when he is gone.

Will it
be more of the same where the leadership plots ways to undermine
our principles and "crush" our candidates?

Or will
new leadership rise up that represents the voters and truly
fights for less government and more freedom for all Americans?

It is up
to us to determine the answer.

Rather
than leaving the outcome to chance, we must lock arms and work
harder than ever to elect principled leaders who have proven
their willingness to fight for our values.

Please
take action now and support the Senate Conservatives Fund and our
priority candidates before the end of the month.

SCF will
pay all process fees and transfer 100% of your candidate
contributions directly to their campaigns.

We have
been working with grassroots conservatives for years to stop
Mitch McConnell Republicans from destroying our country, and now
our efforts are needed more than ever.

Together,
we can shape the Post-McConnell Senate into something that makes
a lasting impact on the lives of Americans.

Thank you
for considering this urgent request and for doing so much to help
build a conservative Senate.

Sincerely,

Matt
Hoskins
Senior
Advisor
Senate
Conservatives Fund

P.S. We
are trying to raise $100,000 for our candidates in September.
Check our progress and chip in to help us reach our goal!

END OF
THE MONTH
COUNTDOWN

DONATE

Senate
Conservatives Fund
300
Independence Ave SE

Washington, DC 20003

Senate
Conservatives Fund is a grassroots organization that promotes
conservative policies and helps elect conservative candidates to
the U.S. Senate. SCF was founded by former Senator Jim DeMint to
help the grassroots change Washington.

Contributions to the Senate Conservatives Fund are not deductible
as charitable contributions. Contributions from corporations or
foreign nationals lacking permanent resident status are not
permitted. Federal law requires us to report the name, mailing
address, occupation and employer for each individual whose
contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in a calendar year. Not
paid for at taxpayer expense.

| | | Peter,

My name is Byron Donalds, and I was just selected by Chairwoman Ronna McDaniel to help lead the GOP effort to BALLOT HARVEST and sweep the next election.

_**[Here’s our plan:](https://links.house-republicans.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYqMa3j6LnIiGCKNtclVrhkyU8lVfMpOWpGOtxowH5bY3mU0OJL9n7_hn0zeFDdz6TiYw0yMPCFVH7ZCUru9j0xvtE8qeh84CzW1XFJJg7qpA2Lep5IHznaHTOSXcECHffxkQecfX8ThPH-OaRH09oB9RR9X8hex0fX76LdRpMjVBl2KRcYlYE3ft-Ha6HqP_n2yR7o4rEJuSlBPEfslyNay4e85yCNmsQYrMxspazK36GensTdkOuoOTWbV0xm4YhLMr_mITTdNVSa6zh87a3YBo8O3uTxbWKFEmvD9a4gY6cs8q_jWpZGAX9ebGHRBI7Q&e=998fa18fd50048d580e64d9cd10dc33f&utm_source=hdscalise&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20230908_hd_republicans_47_69&n=2 "Here’s our plan:")**_
✔️ **Launch our first-ever NATIONWIDE ballot harvesting operation to bank GOP votes**
✔️ Activate our voters through neighbor-to-neighbor connections
✔️ Expand GOP access to early-voting locations across the country
✔️ Invest in an 80,000-person team to protect your vote
✔️ Expand traditional media efforts into new platforms to reach young voters
✔️ Fight BAD ballot harvesting laws while making sure it’s easy to vote but hard to cheat
I am proud to lead this effort and help turn out votes for Republicans. These efforts will not only allow us to directly confront bad actors and stop cheating but allow us to appeal to younger and important swing voters.

But there's a catch: these kinds of voter contact initiatives take money... Lots of it. It won’t be cheap, **but it will be worth it when Republicans defend our House Majority, flip the Senate, and kick Joe Biden out of the White House once and for all!**

_**[With that in mind, I now humbly ask you to pitch in ten or twenty bucks to help jumpstart our voter contact efforts AND make history.](https://links.house-republicans.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYqMa3j6LnIiGCKNtclVrhkyU8lVfMpOWpGOtxowH5bY3mU0OJL9n7_hn0zeFDdz6TiYw0yMPCFVH7ZCUru9j0xvtE8qeh84CzW1XFJJg7qpA2Lep5IHznaHTOSXcECHffxkQecfX8ThPH-OaRH09oB9RR9X8hex0fX76LdRpMjVBl2KRcYlYE3ft-Ha6HqP_n2yR7o4rEJuSlBPEfslyNay4e85yCNmsQYrMxspazK36GensTdkOuoOTWbV0xm4YhLMr_mITTdNVSa6zh87a3YBo8O3uTxbWKFEmvD9a4gY6cs8q_jWpZGAX9ebGHRBI7Q&e=998fa18fd50048d580e64d9cd10dc33f&utm_source=hdscalise&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20230908_hd_republicans_47_69&n=3 "With that in mind, I now

humbly ask you to pitch in ten or twenty bucks to help jumpstart our

voter contact efforts AND make history.")**_

No matter where you live in the country, this is your chance to impact whether Republicans WIN or LOSE in 2024 directly.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Ronchetti?=
subject: BREAKING: Gun Ban in New Mexico
body:
❗ New Episode Alert! Stream the latest No Doubt About It Podcast | | | | | |
---
[](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=942ae5095e&e=567664f14c)
OUT NOW: A special edition of the **No Doubt About It Podcast!**

➡ [**STREAM EPISODE NOW**](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=6d3e330abe&e=567664f14c)
In this episode, Mark and Krysty Ronchetti, dive deep into the controversial decision made by New Mexico Governor **Michelle Lujan Grisham to suspend concealed carry in the city of Albuquerque.** Joining them as a special guest is famed political consultant Jay McCleskey.
| | | | | | | | | [](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=bd337a9dac&e=567664f14c)
---
### Clearly Unconstitutional Order Targeting Innocent People
They dissect Governor Lujan Grisham's decision, highlighting its potential unconstitutionality and her statement that it won't enhance safety in Albuquerque.
It's worth noting that during Mark's gubernatorial race against Grisham, he emphasized crime as a central issue, accusing the Governor of being soft on crime. **Now, with this ban on guns for law-abiding citizens will actually make Albuquerque even less safe, if that’s possible.**
| [WATCH EPISODE 34](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=7e74447ba6&e=567664f14c)
---
The episode doesn't stop at raising concerns; we also provide insights into potential solutions to the escalating crime situation in New Mexico, offering a concrete path to a safer state.
| [WATCH EPISODE 34](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=601bded94e&e=567664f14c)
---
We invite you to listen to this compelling conversation and share your thoughts. Your support means the world to us, so please remember to rate and subscribe to the podcast on your preferred podcast platform. Additionally, you can catch the video version on our YouTube channel, so don't forget to hit that subscribe button there as well!
# SUPPORT NO DOUBT ABOUT IT
| | | | | | | | | [](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=23a0feaa48&e=567664f14c)
---
| If you'd like to contribute to the **No Doubt About It** podcast, you can do so by visiting our website at [nodoubtaboutitpodcast.com](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=d8b60f8fc6&e=567664f14c). Every little bit helps us continue bringing you thought-provoking discussions on important topics.
---
**Thank you for being a part of our podcast community, and we look forward to sharing this special edition with you.** Together, we can raise awareness and engage in meaningful conversations that make a difference.

Best regards,
Mark and Krysty Ronchetti
|
---
| | | _© 2023 Choose Adventure Media. All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

Our mailing address is:
8100 Wyoming Blvd NESTE M4, #171Albuquerque, NM 87113

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=bfca9dc257&e=567664f14c&c=2b29aed056) or [unsubscribe](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=bfca9dc257&e=567664f14c&c=2b29aed056)

name: Adam Schiff
subject: NEW Trump attack
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| Donald Trump is threatening me again in an exclusive interview with conservative radio host Hugh Hewitt — and we have to respond:
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=3788%2E5257348%2EnklCtn)
Derek, **Donald Trump is threatening me _again_ in an exclusive interview with conservative radio host Hugh Hewitt — and we have to respond:**
**Trump is threatening to use the power of the presidency to punish his enemies.** We cannot grow numb to it. We cannot allow him to normalize it or shrug it off as “just Trump being Trump.”
He remains a grave danger to our democracy.
Take this headline from _The Messenger_ : **Trump Asked Repeatedly If He’ll Use Power of the Presidency to Target Political Rivals: ‘I Think I’m Entitled to Find the Truth.’**
_“These guys like**Adam Schiff** get on television with his **smug, stupid face,** and he makes it sound like Russia, Russia, Russia... They create a fake crime, that’s what they’re doing again.”_
**[We have to respond to this latest Trump attack, Derek: Rush $3 or whatever you can spare to our campaign now:](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1561?c0=sep2023_abs_em.nvizyW&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20230910_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=3788%2E5257348%2EnklCtn)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

---
Trump’s broadsides against me are only going to intensify. In less than three weeks, he’ll be holding a $23,000-per-couple fundraiser and speaking at the California GOP convention when he comes to our state. You can probably guess who he’ll be coming after.
Your grassroots support to help our campaign respond and bring our fight to the Senate is essential.
**[Derek, chip in $3 or any amount to our campaign to help us respond to this latest Trump attack. We’re hoping to raise $100,000 in the next 48 hours to counter him but can’t hit our goal without your help.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1561?c0=sep2023_abs_em.nvizyW&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20230910_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=11&akid=3788%2E5257348%2EnklCtn)**
Thanks for helping us at such a critical time.
— Adam

Take this headline from The Messenger : Trump Asked Repeatedly If He’ll Use Power of the Presidency to Target Political Rivals: ‘I Think I’m Entitled to Find the Truth.’ “These guys likeAdam Schiff get on television with his smug, stupid face, and he makes it sound like Russia, Russia, Russia... name: Team Pramila
subject: A Jim Crow-era relic
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Our legislative system has ground to a halt under the Jim Crow-era filibuster.
#
Peter,
For too long, Republicans have used every tool at their disposal — specifically the filibuster — to stop our progress and continue putting profits over the needs and values of the people.
Common sense laws like codifying abortion rights, raising the minimum wage, banning assault weapons, and even protecting voting rights have been held at a stand-still. We cannot allow this to continue.
Our legislative system has ground to a halt under the Jim Crow-era filibuster. So it's crucial we rid our democracy of this practice once and for all. **[We must call Congress to abolish the filibuster so that we can pass common sense legislation that finally answers the calls of the people. Will you add your name today?](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/abolish_filibuster_petition/?source=em20230910-2902&t=1&akid=2902%2E420207%2Ea1ha6D)**
**[Add your name ››](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/abolish_filibuster_petition/?source=em20230910-2902&t=2&akid=2902%2E420207%2Ea1ha6D)**
In 2020, we saw the highest voter turnout in American history for a presidential election. And this time around, Republicans will do everything in their power to silence voters, strip away our rights, and use their dark money to sway election results in their favor.
By ending the filibuster, we can work to get dark money out of these elections and ensure arbitrary voter suppression laws are a thing of the past. And we won't just stop there, Peter. **Once we end the filibuster, we will pass immigration reform, universal childcare, the PRO Act for union rights, and so much more.**
**There's a lot on the line****, Peter, but getting rid of the filibuster is the first massive step towards building our democracy rooted in love, compassion, and true representation.[If you stand with our fight, please sign our petition to urge Congress to abolish the filibuster and finally pass people-first legislation. ](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/abolish_filibuster_petition/?source=em20230910-2902&t=3&akid=2902%2E420207%2Ea1ha6D)**
Together,
Team Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230910-2902-footer&t=4&refcode2=2902_420207_a1ha6D&akid=2902%2E420207%2Ea1ha6D)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=5&akid=2902%2E420207%2Ea1ha6D)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=2902%2E420207%2Ea1ha6D)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

name: Giffords.org
subject: Our hope vs. the gun lobby’s fear
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Are you with us?
#

Friends -
There’s no doubt about it: The gun industry’s reckless marketing tactics have fanned the flames of hate-motivated gun violence in our nation.
Just recently, we saw a racist gunman kill three Black people at a Dollar General in Jacksonville, FL. But it’s a story we’ve seen time and time again. In 2019, a white nationalist gunman targeting Latinos killed 23 people at a Walmart in El Paso, TX. In 2022, a gunman killed 10 people at a supermarket in a predominantly Black neighborhood in Buffalo, NY.
Gun ads capitalize on extremism, toxic masculinity, and racism. They knowingly use fear mongering tactics to rile up their base. Many gun companies glorify military weapons, essentially encouraging untrained civilians to roleplay as soldiers.
While the gun industry may encourage fear and hate to stoke divisions and encourage violence, we do things differently in our movement.
We’re fueled by hope. We know that by working together to pass commonsense gun safety solutions, we can make our country safer and end America’s gun violence epidemic. We stand firmly in our core belief that nobody should have to fear that they will be the next victim of a hate crime because of who they are.
Defeating the gun lobby’s message of fear won’t be easy. But when we all use our voices together, we have the power to take them on.
[**If you’re with us, will you please make a $3 contribution to GIFFORDS PAC today? Your contribution sends a clear message that we won’t stand for the gun lobby’s messages of fear and hatred.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-sep23.BeCgjV&refcode=em230910-1-30&t=1&akid=6502%2E3935704%2ED5UYE7)

Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Fair Fight
subject: EagleAI: a new potential voter suppression tool from extremists in Georgia
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FAIR FIGHT
body:
Let’s talk about a concerning new tool that extremists are using to further suppress the right to vote. It’s called EagleAI. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69508424/426372297/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20230910_f_eagleai_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYjFjYzhmZC1lYTRmLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V6PikWdW6zwvernxMZz7eXeFzwvQzvP0VFRibjNWx6A=&emci=fa4d2bf7-ea4f-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&emdi=3b1cc8fd-ea4f-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&ceid=1037277)

| | We’re here to talk about EagleAI: a new tool that extremists are potentially deploying to further suppress the freedom to vote in Georgia. **Here’s some background:** Last month, _The Atlanta Journal-Constitution_ and _NBC News_ reported that far-right extremists are weaponizing this new private software as a potential tool for ramping up mass voter challenges — and they’re currently seeking contracts with Georgia election officials. EagleAI markets itself as a program that can comb through voter rolls and other public databases and flag any alleged “discrepancies” for elections officials, enabling them to make it easy to challenge voters’ registrations. To make matters worse, it has been reported that Jason Frazier, an election-denying conspiracy theorist who has challenged nearly 10,000 Georgians’ voter registrations, was involved in the software’s development. **Here’s why it’s an issue: **This is yet another extremist attempt to silence the voices of voters ahead of critical election cycles. We haven’t forgotten the efforts to challenge more than 360,000 Georgia voters before the 2021 Senate runoffs. Since then, with the passage of SB 202 in 2021, we’ve continued to see a staggering number of mass voter challenges filed — amounting to 1 in every 70 Georgians. So far, the overwhelming majority have been dismissed due to faulty evidence. Experts say that EagleAI does not offer improvements on existing bipartisan tools that help states maintain their voter rolls, and will open the door for thousands more erroneous voter registration challenges. It will also require elections officials to take time away from their vital roles in running elections to investigate these unfounded challenges **Here’s what we’re doing about it:** We’re fighting back against extremists’ nationwide strategy to make administering elections more difficult and intimidate voters. No matter the hurdles we face from these extremists, Fair Fight will remain steadfast in our commitment to help voters stay registered, access the ballot box, and ensure their votes are counted. [_**Will you chip in $20 or any amount that’s possible for you today, to help combat extremists’ voter suppression tools like EagleAI?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69508425/426372298/900324065?amount=20&refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20230910_f_eagleai_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYjFjYzhmZC1lYTRmLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V6PikWdW6zwvernxMZz7eXeFzwvQzvP0VFRibjNWx6A=) | [ RUSH A DONATION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69508426/426372300/900324065?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20230910_f_eagleai_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYjFjYzhmZC1lYTRmLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V6PikWdW6zwvernxMZz7eXeFzwvQzvP0VFRibjNWx6A=)
---
Together, we’ll fight back against these blatant attempts to weaken our democracy — and continue our work to protect the fundamental freedom to vote.
Thank you,
The Fair Fight Team
|

name: Tammy Baldwin via Blue Amp Action
subject: re: Wisconsin’s Senate race:
body:
this is personal...
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T828fc3cb-f964-49b5-a818-2571a0db5417/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | This is big, Peter: The Hill just ranked my Senate seat one of the 5 most likely to flip next year. [If Republicans flip my seat in Wisconsin, it’s almost guaranteed that Mitch McConnell will reclaim the Senate majority. So if you can, please rush in a split donation to help us defend this battleground seat and protect our Democratic majority.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T94ac02bb-3833-4586-808c-63333da1acc8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [CHIP IN NOW!](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td7489db9-0ac4-4581-8915-32266c5ffd32/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | The GOP spent a whopping $77 million to win last year’s Senate race in Wisconsin, and won by ONE percentage point. It’s clear that they intend to do (and spend) whatever it takes to squeak by again to flip my seat red. Senate Republicans are looking to recruit candidates with massive personal wealth to jump into the race — including one who said he’d spend $15 to $20 million out of his own pocket to defeat me. This isn’t just shaping up to be my most competitive race yet, it could very well be my most expensive ever. That’s why it’s so important we get to work building the resources it’ll take to fight back against the inevitable flood of GOP attacks and keep this seat blue for Democrats. But I can’t do it without you. [Will you split a donation between Blue Amp Action and my reelection campaign to help us defend our Democratic Senate majority and keep Wisconsin blue in 2024? Your donation will help us prepare, organize, and mobilize in the months ahead.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0ee19b9a-5231-4590-bb1d-3e259852a4a5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

subject: RE: What makes me different from your typical politician

body:
The naysayers are attacking me for showing support for YOU.| | | [](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/u/click?_t=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_m=5faf08640ed24d2fa6cb8a226befb013&_e=fzT5TEcTuBJ8NeWWC_d0X9vAJ-PZqs0MQjCcpG-8qHG4j_Op5qIkI000Kmc3Y2lA3pFmsRSP5HVvugR2VTOjGnkKFwmJX9F7HoWUU1mCgOz00DQqds6-JEx5y-T_WzCOEsJogpyyzwjC48EJKZHD70ksN8Qs1JyYijHrsta9vXFkNqKge8tWkfqy_5WXYLmAWwvxDOeIZQbHFiueHJT_fuk3awRNFFNnkEnDP1sQKFj9aBQZlovBEkMsd10fAZBvUUtrx-1t6nMnPOg3iHp15lzQUIQtYBRgceUi11cVwWQ09dwcJgad5ERqN2u7yRv6NsdsZfk7t7TouR3O9VbBPWuZuhwu9-thX8aMWWj4tG3PZB6qUyqKCkoxN5A4uzPxHvBNjGFzIWcd_pv_FqzeX30DnqULQ-ah0kcDjfl29XU7_NBwtDC0rMoiAHCRKnjBxnJBOCiFeaJ7zoruIAGJCFyoL_EfmbHO-wYFO-uVygcYsuWoG8SADnoF_vlTs7OJ)

| | Patriot,

---
On Friday, I flew to South Dakota – home of the amazing Mount Rushmore – to say hello to some of our incredible supporters and officially receive the endorsement of the great Governor, Kristi Noem.
---
Some naysayers – who wake up every morning dedicated to finding new ways to attack me – wondered why I would make a trip to South Dakota – a state that I won with a resounding 62% _twice_.

---
They say I should ONLY spend my time winning over new supporters, instead of paying tribute to my base of millions of supporters.

---
_But that’s what makes me different from your typical politician._
---
**While every other politician in the country sees you as nothing more than just a “vote” filed away in a database, I will _always_ see you as a loyal supporter and a fellow patriot.**
---
We all remember what happened when Hillary Clinton thought she was too good to visit “blue” states like Wisconsin and Michigan – all while your favorite President made many, many visits.
---
Politicians could really use a lesson in humility from me!
---
**The truth is: I will never take your support for granted. Patriots like you have stood by my side through thick and thin, and I will always remember that!**
---
Perhaps that’s why our campaign now holds a MASSIVE 50-POINT LEAD in the Republican Primary – _because voters know that I’m not in this race for myself, I’m in it for** _YOU_**._
---
I’m more committed now than ever before to fulfill our mission to SAVE AMERICA – _are you_?
---
**[Please make a contribution of even just $1 to our Primary Victory Fund to show the nation that you are ready to MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/u/click?_t=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_m=5faf08640ed24d2fa6cb8a226befb013&_e=fzT5TEcTuBJ8NeWWC_d0X9vAJ-PZqs0MQjCcpG-8qHG4j_Op5qIkI000Kmc3Y2lA3pFmsRSP5HVvugR2VTOjGnkKFwmJX9F7HoWUU1mCgOz00DQqds6-JEx5y-T_WzCOEsJogpyyzwjC48EJKZHD70ksN8Qs1JyYijHrsta9vXFkNqKge8tWkfqy_5WXYLmAWwvxDOeIZQbHFiueHJT_fuk3awRNFFNnkEnDP1sQKFj9aBQZlovBEkMsd10fAZBvUUtrx-1t6nMnPOg3iHp15lzQUIQtYBRgceUi11cVwWQ09dwcJgad5ERqN2u7yRv6NsdsZfk7t7TouR3O9VbBPbdROBPM9JfqGReKZBIsdfVLx-S1HN9ZQQRPzqD1YWD5vwGsxYS_JnNAYUHHHgXmIX5Nj7Uo8C1HYuJdeJClCSDLY-ZokuEQIzeDUb9iFfZlRGulMsm95K09pLro6z-tWaVHyYRg7QPVsl3vN273AHbVyt9l19ySSOh7cjTzJA_7)**
