But, in order to do that we need to provide supporters with the most up-to-date information on all of our efforts.

**TEXT TRUMP to 88022** to start receiving text messages from President Trump.

It’s because of the commitment and support from real Patriots, like YOU, that we will SAVE AMERICA! Thank you again for your generous support. If you'd like to change your subscription status [follow this link.](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_s=5faf08640ed24d2fa6cb8a226befb013&_t=-u5g5gYTNd8_0Xed8EEwaZPR5mGXdfSEMsUm4JEI5MnEJ4X3bRK4tkIcX4ZwjuIDMXtmrYXWFmZME_de5szE10GdDmTD4cPrlP_JpRWXoK8%3D)

[Privacy Policy](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/u/click?_t=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_m=5faf08640ed24d2fa6cb8a226befb013&_e=fzT5TEcTuBJ8NeWWC_d0X6a53Qvc5eZjYfnaYVjh3y3ipZ-S1uotPSlUr7iwAfmNg50HrhpfaKPbdKCBj1iOqs6QCscINRgdLJzc3ztsHz8H-AOe9UaMpvJytJfjDh-Fyw65fuB_yw4-mk9ZfKU04Iu478WYuH6F7u0mimnuIXXj1y4Qr4L_0kqq3LBIozrUJlB9j0J7mR2jZc4ePPTyOdz-Lgc2un0Zb83d7heZcHnz-xhaYj62Cd6NXFgcR8qlJuHB-CZETeLzXsijkKJF-iesBKRj9DU_Qg0Ls7fTrCLeT30mlV9FeNPaymRz6lIcWtMLy4huNGhcUlnebTIFxNEMTp3QOtV_3pJiwqdP2G8%3D)
clean_body: The naysayers are attacking me for showing support for YOU.| | | | | Patriot, On Friday, I flew to South Dakota – home of the amazing Mount Rushmore – to say hello to some of our incredible supporters and officially receive the endorsement of the great Governor, Kristi Noem. Some naysayers – who wake up every morning dedicated to finding new ways to attack me – wondered why I would make a trip to South Dakota – a state that I won with a resounding 62% twice. They say I should ONLY spend my time winning over new supporters, instead of paying tribute to my base of millions of supporters. But that’s what makes me different from your typical politician. While every other politician in the country sees you as nothing more than just a “vote” filed away in a database, I will always see you as a loyal supporter and a fellow patriot. We all remember what happened when Hillary Clinton thought she was too good to visit “blue” states like Wisconsin and Michigan – all while your favorite President made many, many visits. Politicians could really use a lesson in humility from me! The truth is: I will never take your support for granted. Patriots like you have stood by my side through thick and thin, and I will always remember that! Perhaps that’s why our campaign now holds a MASSIVE 50-POINT LEAD in the Republican Primary – because voters know that I’m not in this race for myself, I’m in it for YOU. I’m more committed now than ever before to fulfill our mission to SAVE AMERICA – are you? (If you’re doing poorly due to the very corrupt people in charge of our country right now, just ignore the contribution request and simply enjoy my message!) | | Thank you, Donald J. Trump45th President of the United States | | | Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. | Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. Trump for President 2024, Inc. and Save America.

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: What your gift would mean to my campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
I need your help [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] Friends – in a moment, I'm going to ask you to chip in $5 to help me win in Ohio and keep the Senate blue. But first, let me explain why this moment is so important. [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]
Together, we're building a powerful grassroots movement to protect the Dignity of Work for all Americans. This movement is made up of thousands of folks just like you, giving $5 or whatever they can because they know this fight matters.
But I'll be honest: We're in for a tough race. Right now, polls show me neck and neck with the GOP field, and Republicans are already launching attack ads to defeat me. With our entire Senate majority on the line, I'm counting on supporters like you to power this campaign to victory.
So please, will you split $5 between my campaign and Kirsten Gillibrand’s so we can win this race? Here's a personalized link for you: [[RAW LINK]]
I truly appreciate your support. Thanks for being on my team.
Sherrod

body:
Find the 6 Let's Go Washington initiatives at local and state fairs across Washington. We only have until December 2023 to get these onto next year... | | |

---
| There are local and state fairs still happening across Washington. Our Republican booths are set-up and ready to welcome individuals into our Party and spread our common-sense message. At these booths you will also find **6 initiatives available for you to sign - if qualified with enough signatures by the end of the year - these initiatives will bring 6 key policy issues onto the 2024 ballot for WA voters.** These initiatives are immediate solutions to problems in our state, and if passed, will become law regardless of a Democrat or Republican majority in Oympia.

**Initiatives **
I-2113 > Reasonable Police Pursuit
I-2117 > Stop the Hidden Gas Tax
I-2124 > Opt Out of State-Run Long Term Care Coverage Act
I-2109 > Repeal the Capital Gains Tax
I-2111 > No State Income Tax
I-2081 > Parental Notification

There are local fairs happening from Clark County to Spokane County. For specific information on each one, please check out your local county GOP and fair websites.

**Washington State Fair in Puyallup (September 1 - 24)**
Look for the Pierce County Republican Party booth in the NW corner of the 'Showplex Building'.

name: Biz, NDRC President
subject: I’m reaching out personally to explain why this is one of the best investments you can make ahead of the 2024 election
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
|
---

Team,

I’m reaching out personally to share a few reasons why [**_donating today to the NDRC_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/69509477/426376253/-644827789?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230910_FR_9D_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNkZTI4NGQxLWVjNGYtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZTFiYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=zc8C-5jypWZu_ktLyAaOISEcXuD4R_ZTmxvlRZqwNiM=) is one of the best investments you can make ahead of the 2024 election. **1\. The fight for fair maps is happening right now.** Earlier this summer, our movement won a major victory at the Supreme Court – and now, states across the country could be required to draw new, fair maps ahead of the next election. **According to _FiveThirtyEight_ , “this decision could be the difference between Republican and Democratic control of the House.”**

[**_Your donation today will help the NDRC take full advantage of this moment to continue fighting for fairness._**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/69509479/426376255/-644827789?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230910_FR_9D_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNkZTI4NGQxLWVjNGYtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZTFiYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=zc8C-5jypWZu_ktLyAaOISEcXuD4R_ZTmxvlRZqwNiM=)

**2\. The NDRC has a proven track record of success.** Ahead of the 2022 election, our movement helped secure what the _New York Times_ called “the fairest House map of the last 40 years.” With more redistricting on the horizon, we have an opportunity to secure _even fairer_ maps ahead of 2024.

[**_Your donation today will help us replicate our successful strategy so we can make it happen._**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/69509481/426376257/-644827789?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230910_FR_9D_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNkZTI4NGQxLWVjNGYtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZTFiYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=zc8C-5jypWZu_ktLyAaOISEcXuD4R_ZTmxvlRZqwNiM=)

**3\. We have a nationwide strategy.** The NDRC is working in priority states across the country to protect our fair maps victories, prevent GOP gerrymandering, and propel fair redistricting.

[**_Your donation today will help ensure we can execute our full plan to secure the fairest maps possible for the 2024 election._**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/69509483/426376259/-644827789?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230910_FR_9D_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNkZTI4NGQxLWVjNGYtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZTFiYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=zc8C-5jypWZu_ktLyAaOISEcXuD4R_ZTmxvlRZqwNiM=) After our movement helped stop the predicted “red wave” in 2022, Attorney General Eric Holder said, **“Fighting for fair maps helped save our democracy. But this is not a one-and-done effort.”**

[**_He’s absolutely right – and that’s why making a donation today to the NDRC is one of the best investments you can make to defend our democracy by helping to secure a level playing field for the 2024 election._**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/69509485/426376261/-644827789?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230910_FR_9D_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNkZTI4NGQxLWVjNGYtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZTFiYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=zc8C-5jypWZu_ktLyAaOISEcXuD4R_ZTmxvlRZqwNiM=)

**Can I count on you to pitch in today?** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
[Donate $10](https://click.everyaction.com/k/69509487/426376263/-644827789?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=EM_RTI_20230910_FR_9D_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNkZTI4NGQxLWVjNGYtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZTFiYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=zc8C-5jypWZu_ktLyAaOISEcXuD4R_ZTmxvlRZqwNiM=) | [Donate $20](https://click.everyaction.com/k/69509489/426376265/-644827789?express_lane=true&amount=20&refcode=EM_RTI_20230910_FR_9D_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNkZTI4NGQxLWVjNGYtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZTFiYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=zc8C-5jypWZu_ktLyAaOISEcXuD4R_ZTmxvlRZqwNiM=)

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: Josh Hawley doesn’t know a thing about the Missouri I know
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Let me explain:
#
Peter — Josh Hawley doesn’t know the Missouri I know. **Let me explain:**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36393?refcode=em20230910-3724&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3724%2E614464%2EEUac9q)
On the right is Joshua Hawley. While his banker daddy was sending him to a fancy prep school miles from his hometown, my family and I were relying on our neighbors to survive bankruptcy and medical bills in mid-Missouri — in a community where people took care of each other. That’s us on the left.
When Hawley graduated from law school, he joined one of the world’s most elite corporate law firms. I joined the Marine Corps to pay back the community in Missouri that took care of me and my family. And when he was climbing the ladder to become another corrupt politician, I was serving my country — and then working to prevent the pointless overseas wars that make us less safe.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36393?refcode=em20230910-3724&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3724%2E614464%2EEUac9q)
While Josh Hawley aligned himself with the same giant corporations who’ve spent decades attacking Missouri workers and shipping away our jobs, I’ve been fighting to take back power for American workers and small businesses.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36393?refcode=em20230910-3724&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3724%2E614464%2EEUac9q)
And when Hawley voted against relief for veterans like me who were exposed to toxic burn pits, I stood up alongside thousands of veterans to hold him accountable.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36393?refcode=em20230910-3724&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=3724%2E614464%2EEUac9q)
**The Missouri I grew up in taught us to take care of one another.** To do your duty. To serve and sacrifice for your fellow Missourians.
**Josh Hawley doesn’t know that Missouri — and on January 6th, 2021, he showed us the only thing he’s learned is how to be a fraud and a coward.**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36393?refcode=em20230910-3724&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=3724%2E614464%2EEUac9q)
Josh Hawley hasn't just abandoned our state and our values. He's embarrassed himself and all of Missouri. And embarrassing Missouri... That’s something I can't let go.
**Missourians deserve a US Senator who will stand up and fight for them — and unlike Josh, I'm ready to serve.** If you’re ready to help us make sure every Missouri voter knows it before they vote on Election Day, I need your help:
**[Will you chip in any amount you can afford to our campaign right now so we can get our message in front of voters? The only way we’ll be able to flip this Senate seat is if we build a powerful grassroots movement, and support from real people like you is the best way we can do it.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36393?refcode=em20230910-3724&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=6&akid=3724%2E614464%2EEUac9q)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36394?refcode=em20230910-3724&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=7&akid=3724%2E614464%2EEUac9q) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36394?refcode=em20230910-3724&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=8&akid=3724%2E614464%2EEUac9q) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36394?refcode=em20230910-3724&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=9&akid=3724%2E614464%2EEUac9q) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36394?refcode=em20230910-3724&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=10&akid=3724%2E614464%2EEUac9q) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36394?refcode=em20230910-3724&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=11&akid=3724%2E614464%2EEUac9q) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36394?refcode=em20230910-3724&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=12&akid=3724%2E614464%2EEUac9q) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36393?refcode=em20230910-3724&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=13&akid=3724%2E614464%2EEUac9q)

If we keep working together, we can take back power for working Missourians and everyday people all across the country.
Thanks for helping us get it done,
— Lucas Kunce

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20230910-3724-footer&t=14&refcode2=3724_614464_EUac9q&akid=3724%2E614464%2EEUac9q)**

fall is just around the corner and that means we’re *almost* out of the

clean_body: Hunter Biden’s at the center of a scandal that just will not go away. | | | Hunter Biden’s at the center of a scandal that just will not go away. What started as a criminal investigation of Hunter Biden’s finances now looks like an impeachment inquiry into Joe Biden. And all hell broke loose when Hunter Biden heard this announcement about criminal charges. Fellow American - We're still tied for second place in the Republican primary.

Even after relentless attacks from Super PACs, former Vice President Mike Pence, Chris Christie, and Nikki Haley, **I am still tied for second place with Ron DeSantis.**

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=5638879af64d4ba38cc5b9758f529bff&_e=gPXe5sLGV11VDAMqFLcV5IioAmhYHPffYDh7AKeR93ZXHjGOXvO0KVnlsPaodONhly7Hghsz1E7G5gc1f6zn0ABrrpBqTrJY8JMg-V-L6mNMR7JrT6EIQbyGrFpNKNTqm8ldvf_pNh2vQw8S7Ck4ZDY3XbzalAf3-3_G7usI-KfIlinVSJU10t0mHs61EpIl3N_Po_HkYuRrVxO7QKLNBv7SSMac6xTywrZupsvFM0cMo7Gsw3u8FWEjEOfAcV3PeyI2uxrHQpvZIcE15pWoP4FmS8HSSMHVxRWZrP5bx3MaIz1XCbiQtrPKXkGQC2FEMY3ZDlCWoRyZMfPdfs_LA0_M1WspT22C-6JOfrrt9RsIHvb54vUMBSRVR5Mxebqgu6fzmy2nnotfHmc5d-x3D3u32KqUtsakEPRNPU2mYIdafKaVZq54Zum4D7K36HamR9VJ7Uknn6rtXNbjycg0KQ%3D%3D)
After the first GOP Presidential Debate, it is clear I am now the number one target of D.C. insiders who are vehemently opposed to the revolutionary movement that we are creating.

The attacks from the neo-conservatives, the D.C. Establishment, and their monster Super PACs won't make me back down one inch from speaking the TRUTH.

They keep attacking because they are scared that more people will hear what we have to say and rebel against the status quo.

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

name: =?utf-8?q?Mandela_Barnes=E2=80=99_The_Long_Run?=
subject: The GOP has threatened to IMPEACH Justice Janet Protasiewicz
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P
body:
Friends,
We wanted to make sure you saw this important message from Mandela.
The Republican majority in the Wisconsin State Legislature has threatened to impeach Justice Janet Protasiewicz in an attempt to seize power and maintain their heavily gerrymandered maps.
It’s abundantly clear that the GOP has too much power. To baselessly impeach an elected Justice would undercut our democracy and ignore the voice and will of Wisconsinites. This is clearly politically motivated and we can’t let this continue.
**[If you are with us, contribute $5 to our movement and join us in our fight to flip the legislative majority blue in Wisconsin.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-sep23.guNpwn&refcode=em230910-1-t3&t=1&akid=4823%2E196590%2EA3GqEf)
[CONTRIBUTE $5](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-sep23.guNpwn&refcode=em230910-1-t3&t=2&akid=4823%2E196590%2EA3GqEf)
This fight goes far beyond Justice Protasiewicz. It’s a fight to protect our democracy.
If you have a moment, please read Mandela’s original message below.
The team at the Long Run
* * *

Friends — When we helped to elect Justice Janet Protasiewicz in Wisconsin, it marked a historic day for our movement, Wisconsin, and our democracy.
That day, an overwhelming majority of Wisconsin voters flipped the majority on the Wisconsin Supreme Court. They chose to be represented by a Justice who will not put politics over the freedoms guaranteed by our democracy.
But since Justice Protasiewicz was sworn into office last month, Republicans have threatened an unprecedented and dangerous way to usurp power: **Impeaching Justice Protasiewicz.**
This is a direct attempt by the GOP to undercut the voice of Wisconsinites and undermine a coequal branch of government — a blatant attempt to keep their heavily gerrymandered districts and Wisconsin’s draconian anti-abortion laws alive.
Republicans in the State legislature have indicated that they would support impeaching her, and with their majority in the Assembly and supermajority in the Senate, it's a real threat.
This is a desperate power grab and an attack on our democracy. And we must do all we can to mobilize and organize to prevent these undemocratic stunts.
**[So please, can you contribute $5 to our fund to flip the legislative majority in Wisconsin? Your contribution will help us turn Wisconsin blue up and down the ballot and protect our democracy.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-sep23.guNpwn&refcode=em230910-1-t3&t=4&akid=4823%2E196590%2EA3GqEf)
_If you 've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Express Donate: $5](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1281?c0=longrunpac-em-sep23.EEm7uc&refcode=em230910-1-t3&t=23&akid=4823%2E196590%2EA3GqEf)
[Express Donate: $25](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1273?c0=longrunpac-em-sep23.Z5JDH1&refcode=em230910-1-t3&t=24&akid=4823%2E196590%2EA3GqEf)
[Express Donate: $50](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1274?c0=longrunpac-em-sep23.piBSTI&refcode=em230910-1-t3&t=25&akid=4823%2E196590%2EA3GqEf)
[Express Donate: $100](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1275?c0=longrunpac-em-sep23.PqDy27&refcode=em230910-1-t3&t=26&akid=4823%2E196590%2EA3GqEf)
[Express Donate: $250](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1266?c0=longrunpac-em-sep23.2bzxuA&refcode=em230910-1-t3&t=27&akid=4823%2E196590%2EA3GqEf)
[Or donate another amount](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-sep23.guNpwn&refcode=em230910-1-t3&t=28&akid=4823%2E196590%2EA3GqEf)
This is just the beginning of our battle to protect our democracy. We need your continued support to turn Wisconsin blue up and down the ballot.
Thank you in advance for your contribution. Change is on the horizon.
Mandela

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=29&akid=4823%2E196590%2EA3GqEf). You can also [**sign up to receive fewer emails.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=30&akid=4823%2E196590%2EA3GqEf)
The Long Run PAC is funded by grassroots donors giving what they can, when they can. [**Make a contribution to The Long Run PAC today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/longrunpac-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=31&refcode2=4823_196590_A3GqEf&akid=4823%2E196590%2EA3GqEf)
Submit this form to [**update your contact information.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/update-contact-info/?source=em-footer&t=32&akid=4823%2E196590%2EA3GqEf)

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Dems created the blacklist just for us 👀
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, do you know
the story of the DCCC blacklist?

In 2018, AOC had defeated the 4th most powerful Democrat in the House and
corporate Democrats were reeling.

The DCCC went to extreme lengths to stop progressives like AOC from ever
winning again. They blacklisted any vendors that supported primary
challengers to Democratic incumbents, to weaken our movement.

The DCCC wanted to block working-class progressives like AOC from critical
campaign resources and technology. Of course, they had no issue using
corporate-friendly firms that bust unions, work with Big Oil, and even
lobby for the GOP’s right-wing agenda.

It’s not right,
Peter. The DCCC ended the
blacklist after it became a PR nightmare, but they laid the groundwork for
groups like AIPAC and the Moderate PAC that want to take down our
candidates.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/137898?refcode=em20230910-30782&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=30782%2E1203867%2EUNrI2v ]In order to change the Democratic Party, we have to weather their
ongoing attacks and get our candidates elected. Can you chip in
$3 so we can fight the status quo, overcome the odds, and
expand the Squad?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/137898?refcode=em20230910-30782&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=30782%2E1203867%2EUNrI2v ]Contribute $3

We’re not like the DCCC.

1. We don’t take a cent from corporate PACs. Our candidates’ and our own
work are 100% grassroots-funded.
2. We don’t work with “Democratic” firms associated with union busting,
corporate America, or the GOP.
3. Our strategy pays off — we have elected Justice Democrats and grown
the Squad every cycle, while the last Chair of the DCCC lost the seat
to a Republican.

Corporate Democrats take money from Wall Street, Big Oil, Big Pharma,
payday loan companies, and union-busters. It’s clear: Justice Democrats
will fight for the people, the Democratic establishment will work for
their corporate donors.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/137898?refcode=em20230910-30782&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=30782%2E1203867%2EUNrI2v ]Peter,
we’re determined to keep winning against
the Democratic establishment and its Wall Street-backed candidates. Will
you chip in to help power our work so we can elect more Justice Democrats?

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230910-30782-footer&t=1022&refcode2=30782_1203867_UNrI2v&akid=30782%2E1203867%2EUNrI2v

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1023&akid=30782%2E1203867%2EUNrI2v

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69511480/426382707/-200813216?amount=10&source=GVFC-091023-FR-EM-DYLAN&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDQ4NjQzZi1mMzRmLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KRy8l513j7lCoz-X7At7FJewZUYSFr79EW8bvcticwM=) Hi, it’s Dylan McArthur, Gabe Vasquez’ Campaign Manager. I wanted to reach out to introduce myself to you personally and tell you why Gabe’s race is so important to me.

I was born and raised here in Roswell, New Mexico. I attended Roswell High and New Mexico Military Institute. And just like Gabe, I was raised by a single mom, who worked tirelessly to make ends meet. That’s why I’m in this business — for people like my mom.

As a lifelong resident of the state, I understand what the hardworking families of NM-02 and beyond look for in a leader. The people of NM-02 want someone who goes to Washington to deliver for our community, not play politics. That's Gabe.

In 2022, Gabe fought tooth and nail to **flip this seat blue with 50.3% of the vote.** Kevin McCarthy and the GOP have made this seat their top priority because they want someone more focused on playing games than delivering for our community.

[They’re already calling this race a “toss-up” — meaning you and I have a lot of work ahead of us. Will you chip in $10 now to help us get an early leg up on our far-right extremist opponent?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69511481/426382708/-200813216?amount=10&source=GVFC-091023-FR-EM-DYLAN&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDQ4NjQzZi1mMzRmLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KRy8l513j7lCoz-X7At7FJewZUYSFr79EW8bvcticwM=)

I couldn’t be prouder of my New Mexico roots. I even have a tattoo of a green chile to bring those roots with me wherever I go.

That’s why I’m so passionate about being a part of Team Vasquez — _because I believe there’s no better person to fight for New Mexico in Congress than Gabe._

But with Kevin McCarthy laser-focused on taking back this seat, **there’s no telling how much dark money the GOP is going to funnel into this race** , and we need to start NOW if we want to keep up.

[Unlike his far-right opponent, Gabe’s campaign is fully funded by grassroots supporters like you, so please chip in $10 or anything you can today to keep Gabe fighting for New Mexico in Congress.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69511482/426382709/-200813216?amount=10&source=GVFC-091023-FR-EM-DYLAN&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDQ4NjQzZi1mMzRmLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KRy8l513j7lCoz-X7At7FJewZUYSFr79EW8bvcticwM=)

Thanks for your support. I’ll be in touch with more soon.

Dylan McArthur
* * *
| KEEP GABE IN CONGRESS

Together, we flipped NM-02 in 2022. Now, Gabe is busy in Congress fighting for reproductive choice, economic opportunity, affordable healthcare, and the best interests of the people.

Gabe won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022, and is running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone.

name: Sign the Petition (Left Action)
subject: Sign your name: Tell Republicans to stop blocking immigration solutions
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Sign your name: Tell Republicans to stop blocking immigration solutions](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3d37bbb2-ec24-4bc4-9071-dac402e6cc78/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)[>>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdb9d88e0-3e70-4ebc-abbe-01d817b4d46f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb1507a33-2314-442f-b384-3dc3708d4e9a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Literally no one is happy with the current system for immigration and refugees, but Republicans refuse to do anything to fix it. It's been a decade since bipartisan legislation that passed the senate overwhelmingly was blocked by republicans in the House, and they've not lifted a finger since then to do anything meaningful on this front — even though Democrats have offered all kinds of solutions since then. [_**Add your name, and tell Republicans to stop blocking immigration reform.**_](https://default.salsalabs.org/T78fcac8f-2061-47d3-bb3c-7b760d7b0a59/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Republicans are more than happy to whip up hate over the issue, and to propose jackasstical ideas such as a wall (which sounds sensible, until you remember that ladders exist, as do airplanes). The American people support a broad approach that combines border security with a logical, humane, and economically sensible approach to those looking to come here. Democrats have offered no numerous proposals to do this, and it's time for Republicans to get on board. [_**Add your name, and tell Republicans to stop blocking immigration reform.**_](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc161d7ff-36a7-4fe2-8355-0d792b98eb4e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

---

name: DC Daily Journal
subject: OTC Morphine, APPROVED
body:
*|MC:SUBJECT|*

Please read the
following message from our sponsor.

Hi,

By now, you have heard the news rumblings.

After 10 years of testing, Conolidine "Nature's Morphine" is
APPROVED to come to the US market effective immediately.

As you now know, Conolidine is the most powerful natural pain
reliever in the world, boasting pharmaceutical level relief with
no negative effects.

Remember this Harvard headline?

body:
| | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe [click here.](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl7NBjmTZL5F5oqdT0MFW4GJFfovgZaqyhL6oVedQTvxqf62j1-674ssdeYZmJRYBzWSHitiKSzbPsrpv-_hwFxmusDClMi_fBQryOBnrEe8b-jZjJS38L5J95SNW--VCM3iKA1hmertApcUmIkOq05mQCgg84lyW2dxm3Ai1N9VfmBVpD6XdvQhpTjiVd5ZGkmydzUkJkgdm19nQS_njlvrQgDPQFvWz7wAGN52lwrtPnhpH8KeeDdVwADocg88gYNYD8LLngnLP03nK2vi_jkOntVLdeZx-vETEP_X9MAhFXo2ZWWxrhm4ZUNM90bAddyk4GE9nwRxA3jsADQF5glOjDTEG74n6PIjrwHqSQL2-tESMO7HxxYSIMHWFFbH46bT00oRHlNKLzLBBfEmX5E5jxOZLPEc6ZgdEWeUXY4GL80vuLoSB8r9fHVTobwmgE/3zh/ckqePBaGQ2WxqR__8xHlrA/h0/CaKAuxvRvaLSLC3uZuRt8LqNpWOiuM0StlP7gIXnnss)
| | | Peter,

Last month we launched our **Down-Ballot Candidate Fund** to raise $100,000 before September 21 to make sure we’re ready to provide our endorsed candidates with the resources they need to win **BIG** in the November elections.

At Collective, we’re dedicated to increasing Black political representation, and our mission to expand Black political power extends up and down the ballot at all levels of government.

Local elections are **key** , Peter, because they make the big decisions that impact our everyday lives. That’s why it is so important to make sure that the leaders in those offices reflect the communities they serve.

We need your help to tackle the underrepresentation of the Black community in elected office and help get our endorsed candidates across the finish line. [Will you contribute $10 to support our down-ballot candidates before Election Day?](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zCFq6KlB5ukuUES0_RCBq_K3oYiDmPkIUv6_HJR3cFELJ-X50-8e0sgQdFyLVdhdybyMZBtU-Gju72Qc0icbdPCAiAXObPWlLKMnOooxq6ckD38QPJvF2f4P5T5b_iiLkINzZ1yGDlgqNPmsp5eoUO2VKMIFT2x-Fj_zhnFXUA3CaObwZ1sNwBev7oZTGbkbyJAhAiz8sKO-826KRjbyhwUMKG76-H9hQR-n6mU0tNyyLbr36r9ZI5PcA7cl1SNXJEvI0k-02bwtMnki8pi4SrxkeiTg5xXpL0rnwsfY25nZYvmCyjEyqv3IX91UNwu7KZX0yuM0BQFmSVKAv3gb2PuR3kW_OOE5gaLT9pmFtQ6v9IhgYXCNaAkx3W6criLoTA5IbTlb2k9fHtYLgjd_RUNBjTfJ_3SHSoPVwMYnbKTA/3zh/ckqePBaGQ2WxqR__8xHlrA/h1/vpV2AhIFZLh9u4x_DY00aWMRHSvk0UQ9RgXO0G60SGs)

We need your help to tackle the underrepresentation of the Black community in elected office and help get our endorsed candidates across the finish line. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | | | The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. name: Becky Wagner
subject: My husband is facing 10 years in prison for defending himself
body:
[Unsubscribe](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWWLKaOD_N)
Dear Friend,
I wish I were writing to you under happier circumstances...
...but my hero police officer husband, Mark Wagner, is the next big target of the radical anti-police movement and I urgently need your help before they make an example out of him.
That's Mark in the picture I sent you, along with our boys Nolan and Jacob and dog Kilo.
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62230701:WWLKaOD_N:m:1:2532013465:418A373A486C8B625A0EA4A420F4FD78:r)
Not only is Mark a highly respected officer, he's an incredibly supportive father, a loving husband, and a fierce friend.
He's dedicated his life to protecting others. But we live in far-Left Madison, Wisconsin - and the "defund the police" mob whipped up rage, LIED about what happened, and trashed Mark's reputation.
And now Mark faces 10 YEARS behind bars for doing exactly what he was trained to do in the line of duty - and I'm scared I might lose him. [**That's why I wrote this letter to you, someone I've never met before, to ask for your help.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62230701:WWLKaOD_N:m:1:2532013465:418A373A486C8B625A0EA4A420F4FD78:r)
But first, let me explain what happened...
On the morning of February 3, 2022, Mark and other officers tried to arrest a _violent_ _criminal_ named Quadren Wilson.
Wilson has a rap sheet a mile long with dozens of arrests for drug distribution, theft, witness intimidation, battery, eluding police, and more. He was wanted for allegedly dealing fentanyl to a man found dead in a restaurant bathroom.
Mark's arrest team planned to capture Wilson in his vehicle using a containment strategy. They pulled in their trucks to block his car on both ends. But Wilson floored the accelerator, spinning his wheels wildly in a desperate attempt to escape justice.
Mark and another officer exited their vehicle to make the arrest. Mark was holding one of those big POLICE shields and had his gun drawn. But Wilson refused Mark's commands to show his hands, continuing to spin his wheels and try to force his way out.
With the wheels screeching and smoking, Mark and the other officer saw Wilson reach into the center console and pull his hand up.
Mark thought Wilson had a gun. He heard what he thought was gunfire. Then Mark felt something hit the shield he was holding and push him backward.** **
**Both Mark and the other officer responded to this life-threatening situation by firing into the vehicle.**
Mark believed his life and his fellow officers' lives were in danger. He did what he was trained to do and stopped the threat.
Thankfully, Wilson survived and no one else was injured. But because Wilson is black and Mark is white - anti-police radicals jumped at the chance to target Mark.
Protesters drummed up a racial firestorm by spreading lies that Wilson "had his hands up" and that he "was shot five times in the back." The corrupt liberal media repeated these lies and painted my husband as a monster.
And on September 22, 2022, the liberal District Attorney caved to the mob and filed BOGUS felony charges against Mark. **Now Mark faces 10 YEARS in prison.**
[**_Now I hope you can see why I'm turning to you for help today._**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62230701:WWLKaOD_N:m:1:2532013465:418A373A486C8B625A0EA4A420F4FD78:r)
Mark dedicated his life to helping others. He's spent 30 years in law enforcement, most of them with the Milwaukee Police Department (MPD).
We knew fighting alone against the anti-police movement here in Wisconsin would be impossible and our hope that justice would prevail was quickly fading when we received a call from **the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF)** offering to help Mark.
This incredible organization helps innocent officers, like my husband, who have been unfairly prosecuted for split-second, use-of-force decisions in the line of duty.
Law and justice experts like President Ronald Reagan's Attorney General Edwin Meese and former FBI Assistant Director Ronald Hosko serve on LELDF's Board. LELDF's president, Jason Johnson, served over 20 years as a police officer, including as Deputy Commissioner of the Baltimore Police Department.
In short, these are experts when it comes to policing. And they thoroughly vet cases to determine if an officer was wrongly accused or charged before deciding to help.
They provide legal counsel, expert witnesses, whatever is needed to make sure wrongly accused police officers get a fair shake in court. And they do it all free of charge!
But LELDF doesn't receive any money from the government to help police officers facing unjust charges. They're funded entirely by the generous support of folks like you who can recognize a miscarriage of justice and want to help fix it.
This is why I reached out to you today. I needed to ask you a very important question:
[**_Will you please help my husband Mark fight the unjust charges against him and clear his name by rushing a generous, tax-deductible donation to LELDF today?_**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62230701:WWLKaOD_N:m:1:2532013465:418A373A486C8B625A0EA4A420F4FD78:r)
Your kind gift today of $35, $50, or $100 to help Mark will mean so much to my family.
Or, if you're blessed with the means to help with a gift of $250, $500, or even $1,000 or more, I pray you will so my husband doesn't spend 10 YEARS behind bars away from his family.
Right now, LELDF is preparing to ramp up legal action in Mark's case. [**So please follow this link to make your tax-deductible donation right away.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62230701:WWLKaOD_N:m:1:2532013465:418A373A486C8B625A0EA4A420F4FD78:r)
Any gift amount you can send today is truly a blessing. No matter what you're able to give, please say a prayer for Mark and our family.
Thank you in advance for your generous support of my family and LELDF.
With deepest gratitude,
Becky Wagner
P.S. Mark is the type of person who'd offer to donate a kidney to a friend in need just because it's the right thing to do. In fact, that's exactly what he did when he donated one of his kidneys to his former partner of more than a decade! Mark didn't even let his partner know he got checked out as a potential donor. He just said that his partner had young kids who needed him to be around and it was the right thing to do.
This is the type of man the anti-police mob is targeting and trying to destroy: a kidney donor, a youth football coach, a man who assists the elderly from our parish in running errands and doing handy-man projects. A man of faith who's always helping others.
Mark faces 10 years behind bars - simply for doing his job to serve and protect. [**_Will you help him clear his name by making a tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund today?_** ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62230701:WWLKaOD_N:m:1:2532013465:418A373A486C8B625A0EA4A420F4FD78:r) Your generosity will help LELDF mount the strongest legal defenses for my husband and other wrongly accused officers. Thank you in advance for your prayers and support.

\----------------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit**www.leldf.org**. And remember - Blue Lives Matter!_
_(C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | www.PoliceDefense.org
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303_

Not only is Mark a highly respected officer, he's an incredibly supportive father, a loving husband, and a fierce friend. He's dedicated his life to protecting others. Van Duyne has taken campaign contributions from corporate PACs and special interests , acting in their best interests instead of advocating for the needs of everyday Texans. Friend, Last year, Rep. Summer Lee overcame more than $4 million in attack ads and mailers from AIPAC’s network of PACs. Summer became the first Black woman to represent Pennsylvania in Congress, where she’s been fighting tirelessly for human rights and working class families. Now she’s running for re-election in 2024, and I’m proud to support her. [**Can you chip in $5 or more to our campaigns today so Summer Lee and I can keep building working class power for racial, economic, and environmental justice?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w1cdrvm2TShU3fAiYbO3lKw4CgPtiDSXkrPijXbd1rNzerMhdUm5DpAVBOrMyGRK8hsG7JalKY6KrpCAf1BEsTZlTejjlZgt9wTg7s1uHLdls_bTY0tjM_hZDoBWh3GWmrTPgmonB52djzjlAz1xm02rFwP1OaeTVX7Wu_45nJHyMHDM5qCFCutb-5g71Eb6xQ6S-WqvPOcLEgXqBSSKHneNGYHjKKm58pZsl1YQogDPhPk03Y4U-t4YGTM6pL-fWDt1zF0rtfSTojb-IdE0fmO3gMcfLVRpigd8oSQbyErjSpQQPg2XWHObxF8PaF0jAKPngn_wJcnS1NddSpB8-Tg_f1vuR5dFeMXn7NIEENYRnKjOPcrQ_J2haqcUewN6Q4s4JXCIgxWGLdBW_9aMbp0U1i1a1Jty8zUpyCD0Y9LKu4adU1IXrtD0LloT4OS6iHYIR3Yyzoq4t06FGgSeAZ/3zh/vxFQAycrRRiV4cDIijrXiQ/h1/Py5AkLeN0L1VYvRXjw4bHfBIjnfB_Y-WeArzF_Np0VE) | [DONATE](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w1cdrvm2TShU3fAiYbO3lKw4CgPtiDSXkrPijXbd1rNxvw5Er2G57vBFyaWjI0cQEvZO1gGYacNH16W-YjauiCbjnk92--S8b-SPNDQWFlqNHZFzX125egKvEVhiMPlZdmjdQG8Ok9VVZL5NEWAwJa9RXMbKXde5cEmIIin7B0dGlIz42vlFKoKeqr8D40EWIn8aEpuKFprAIZUZJ60nL5haTl9NCcG5-CmRWLdGqJUCGqTacBOV0gIZBaCx64BrtBVdRMGdZelrvKzPh5qf5U3KNXq9jjb8eE27_M8J8ChrTlJdZlYv1NSULYDsvIy3rqD-fL_B7cCZq8Txg8K9RL6GNviKaviwS07QECl18O3fmSaeyxVqac7vNlY3SeCs89aNnCZQ0RrBwv2y5fTP9WcBpPfiOa25LbKuLEQZg0Xd8Rt-MPCzetjrJl05xmTVZPza4DzK5renUTBKt4YNn-/3zh/vxFQAycrRRiV4cDIijrXiQ/h2/AtfbWXXQ-N77DfyAV_7jUcLfDtGtGf34PTtrrnbpglk)

**As a labor organizer, state legislator, and now a member of Congress, Summer is taking on corporate polluters and wealth inequality.**
Together, we’ve introduced the _OLIGARCH Act_ to tax extreme wealth and the _Justice For All Act_ to expand our civil rights. I’m proud to co-sponsor Summer’s _Hazard Pay for Health Care Workers Act_ to keep workers safe during emergencies. We need to keep her in Congress fighting for workers’ rights.
**Summer has been a fierce advocate for marginalized people, including Palestinians.** We’re already seeing right-wing Super PACs pouring money into the 2024 elections, and we know that pro-apartheid groups will be coming for Summer again in 2024.
[**Please split a donation today between my and Summer Lee’s re-election campaigns. From: **Rashida Tlaib******

Subject: Despite the attacks, Summer has held firm on Palestinian rights while in Congress
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Friend,
I’m proud to support my sister in service Summer Lee as she launches her campaign for re-election.
Like me, Summer was a community organizer and state legislator before running for Congress. For years, she’s taken on corporate polluters and fought for workers’ rights in deep partnership with her community.
In Congress, we’ve introduced the _OLIGARCH Act_ to tax extreme wealth and the _Justice For All Act_ to expand our civil rights. **We’re taking on powerful special interests that are trying to keep working class Black women like Summer out of office.**
**Summer made history last year when she became the first Black Congresswoman elected in Pennsylvania, beating out millions of dollars in PAC spending against her—including $4 million from anti-Palestinian AIPAC’s network.** Despite the attacks, Summer has held firm on supporting the human dignity of Palestinians while in Congress.

**Unlike many of our colleagues in Congress, Summer has lived the same struggles that everyday people face across the country.** That means she understands how urgently our communities need bold changes.
As an activist, she’s fought for fair working conditions and environmental justice. She continues to stand in solidarity with workers, and I’m proud to co-sponsor her _Hazard Pay for Health Care Workers Act_ to keep workers safe during emergencies.

clean_body: We’re already seeing well funded right-wing Super PACs pouring money into the 2024 elections. | | | Friend, Last year, Rep. Summer Lee overcame more than $4 million in attack ads and mailers from AIPAC’s network of PACs. Summer became the first Black woman to represent Pennsylvania in Congress, where she’s been fighting tirelessly for human rights and working class families. Now she’s running for re-election in 2024, and I’m proud to support her. | As a labor organizer, state legislator, and now a member of Congress, Summer is taking on corporate polluters and wealth inequality. Together, we’ve introduced the OLIGARCH Act to tax extreme wealth and the Justice For All Act to expand our civil rights. I’m proud to co-sponsor Summer’s Hazard Pay for Health Care Workers Act to keep workers safe during emergencies. We need to keep her in Congress fighting for workers’ rights. Summer has been a fierce advocate for marginalized people, including Palestinians. We’re already seeing right-wing Super PACs pouring money into the 2024 elections, and we know that pro-apartheid groups will be coming for Summer again in 2024. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, split evenly between Summer Lee and Rashida Tlaib | | | | | | | | | Thank you, Rashida \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Rashida Tlaib** Date: Sat, Sep 9, 2023 Subject: Despite the attacks, Summer has held firm on Palestinian rights while in Congress To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, I’m proud to support my sister in service Summer Lee as she launches her campaign for re-election. Like me, Summer was a community organizer and state legislator before running for Congress. For years, she’s taken on corporate polluters and fought for workers’ rights in deep partnership with her community. In Congress, we’ve introduced the OLIGARCH Act to tax extreme wealth and the Justice For All Act to expand our civil rights. We’re taking on powerful special interests that are trying to keep working class Black women like Summer out of office. Summer made history last year when she became the first Black Congresswoman elected in Pennsylvania, beating out millions of dollars in PAC spending against her—including $4 million from anti-Palestinian AIPAC’s network. Despite the attacks, Summer has held firm on supporting the human dignity of Palestinians while in Congress. Unlike many of our colleagues in Congress, Summer has lived the same struggles that everyday people face across the country. That means she understands how urgently our communities need bold changes. As an activist, she’s fought for fair working conditions and environmental justice. She continues to stand in solidarity with workers, and I’m proud to co-sponsor her Hazard Pay for Health Care Workers Act to keep workers safe during emergencies. By my side in Congress, Summer is helping to build the multi-racial democracy we all deserve, where everyone can thrive. Because we’re taking on the unjust status quo, powerful special interests see us as a threat. We’re already seeing well funded right-wing Super PACs pouring money into the 2024 elections. We’ve beat them before—let’s do it again. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, split evenly between Summer Lee and Rashida Tlaib | | | | | | | | | Thank you so much. Neither of us take any money from corporate PACs, so every donation matters. In service, Rashida * Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . **GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

The first $6,600/$10,000 from a person/multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Biden for President, with the first $3,300/$5,000 designated for the primary and the next $3,300/$5,000 for the general election. The next $41,300/$15,000 from a person/PAC will be allocated to the DNC. The next $510,000/$255,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from these states: AK, AL, AR, AZ, CA, CO, CT, DC, DE, FL, GA, HI, IA, ID, IL, IN, KS, KY, LA, MA, MD, ME, MI, MN, MO, MS, MT, NC, ND, NE, NH, NJ, NM, NV, NY, OH, OK, OR, PA, RI, SC, SD, TN, TX, UT, VA, VT, WA, WI, WV, and WY. A contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant by contacting contact@joebiden.com. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution. Contributions will be used in connection with federal elections, may be spent on any activity as each committee determines in its sole discretion, and will not be earmarked for any particular candidate. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 per election cycle. body:
Let me explain

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69513692/426390937/-2042826227?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNTdjYzQ1Zi1mOTRmLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fo-9MfJQmCN4E4nBBfAzVYTWeMoPwg7HxqOfSZ_dE4Y=)

Meanwhile, the biggest decision Mike Garcia is facing this week is whether or not to go along with his MAGA allies in Congress who are now threatening to shut down the government if their extreme demands aren't met.

**The contrast in CA-27 couldn't be starker. We're fighting for the people. Mike Garcia is playing partisan games that threaten our livelihoods.**

The good news is that voters are taking notice. _The Cook Political Report_ recently moved CA-27 to “Toss Up” due the momentum we’re building. We have a chance to unseat the last remaining House Republican in Los Angeles County. But doing this is going to take widespread, grassroots support.

That’s where you come in:

clean_body: | = Sorry for the weekend email, Peter. I’ll try to keep this update short. September 30th marks the end of our third fundraising quarter. After this deadline hits, our fundraising numbers will go public. That means everyone -- from my opponent Mike Garcia to the political media -- will get a clear look at the progress we’re making. = | **= Our campaign continues to build local support by meeting voters face-to-face about the issues impacting our community -- from reducing drug costs, to protecting reproductive rights, and defending Social Security and Medicare from cruel cuts. Meanwhile, the biggest decision Mike Garcia is facing this week is whether or not to go along with his MAGA allies in Congress who are now threatening to shut down the government if their extreme demands aren't met. The contrast in CA-27 couldn't be starker. We're fighting for the people. Mike Garcia is playing partisan games that threaten our livelihoods. The good news is that voters are taking notice. The Cook Political Report recently moved CA-27 to “Toss Up” due the momentum we’re building. We have a chance to unseat the last remaining House Republican in Los Angeles County. But doing this is going to take widespread, grassroots support. That’s where you come in: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | =** Thank you, George Whitesides | = = = George has spent his career solving problems. Now, he’s ready to deliver for the people of California's 27th Congressional District. = To learn more about George and his commitment to working families, please visit: = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . George Whitesides for Congress P.O. Box 221776 Newhall, CA 91322 United States

| | | **DEVELOPING NOW: Liberal activist group SUES to remove Trump from the ballot in a key swing state**

Friend –

_First:_ a Florida attorney tried to remove him from the ballot... _Then:_ Liberals in Arizona, Michigan, and New Hampshire moved to disqualify Trump from the presidency ... _Next:_ Adam Schiff went on national television to rally MILLIONS of Liberals... **_Now:_ it’s happening in Colorado too – a major state for the GOP!**

The alarm bells are blaring.

Radical Democrats are moving to INVALIDATE YOUR VOTE by making it impossible for you to cast a ballot for President Trump. Here's their plan:

_✔️ Scrub Trump’s name from the ballot
✔️ Stop you from voting for Trump
✔️ Disenfranchise MILLIONS of Republicans
✔️ Establish COMPLETE DEMOCRAT CONTROL_

They want to take a sledgehammer to Trump’s campaign and destroy his path to the White House. **That’s why we’re organizing a MASSIVE grassroots response to shut down this plot before it’s too late.**

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

name: Indiana Dems
subject: Remembering Governor O'Bannon
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www
body:
|
---
Peter, **** This month marks 20 years since Indiana and our nation lost a great leader. Governor Frank O’Bannon was the epitome of a public servant, committed to true Hoosier values and determined to do what was right — regardless of party — for our fellow Hoosiers. As governor, Frank was committed to listening and respecting all voices, and working hard to move Indiana forward. [_**To celebrate his life and his legacy, we’re asking Hoosiers to submit their tributes to his life and accomplishments.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69514072/426392192/697963978?230910-OBannon=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NWExNWFlYi1mYTRmLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y0DvR2zUr5gstPH_pRRzjSsUNj21jM8I3uIeDJtepHs=&emci=b0627e10-774e-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&emdi=75a15aeb-fa4f-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&ceid=4925535) Our state is stronger because of Governor O’Bannon’s work. He uplifted communities and believed in Hoosiers. Governor Frank O’Bannon was the epitome of a public servant, committed to true Hoosier values and determined to do what was right — regardless of party — for our fellow Hoosiers. As governor, Frank was committed to listening and respecting all voices, and working hard to move Indiana forward. Our state is stronger because of Governor O’Bannon’s work. He uplifted communities and believed in Hoosiers. Thanks, Indiana Dems [content goes here] 101 W Washington St., #1110E Indianapolis, IN 46204 Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www.indems.org. disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
I’m already thinking about 2024 and what it will take to keep the Senate in Democratic hands.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69515435/426396491/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODcxZDgwZC1mZDRmLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A96vA0b9pelojBHp7VZtnfWXjVjVDeNL-hvedDtm4lI=&emci=c771d80d-fd4f-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&emdi=c871d80d-fd4f-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&ceid=7731215)
---

| | **I'm already thinking about 2024 and what it will take to keep the Senate in Democratic hands.** It's going to be a tough cycle, but make no mistake, we need to deliver a win for Senator Bob Casey, who is running for re-election in Pennsylvania, a critical swing state. [**We know why it is crucial to re-elect Bob Casey to the Senate – we know what Republicans do when they control the Senate – so can I count on you to split a donation between Bob Casey and Blue Wave Project****, which helps****defend the Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69515436/426396492/-1921836943?refcode=2023-09-10-casey&recurring=&amount=7&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=c871d80d-fd4f-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODcxZDgwZC1mZDRmLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A96vA0b9pelojBHp7VZtnfWXjVjVDeNL-hvedDtm4lI=) [DEFEND THE SENATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69515437/426396493/-1921836943?refcode=2023-09-10-casey&recurring=&amount=7&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=c871d80d-fd4f-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODcxZDgwZC1mZDRmLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A96vA0b9pelojBHp7VZtnfWXjVjVDeNL-hvedDtm4lI=) Working families have enough on their plates. They don't have the time to worry about what's going on in the US Senate. So we need to elect people who take the job seriously and focus on the issues that matter most to their constituents, not scoring political points. **In short, 2024 is about Bringing Back Boring.** Pennsylvania needs a workhorse in the Senate, not a showhorse. _Bob Casey is a workhorse, and he gets results._ It is hard to understate the stakes: Social Security, Medicare, Medicaid, women's rights, LGBTQ+ equality, the right to vote, and more are on the line if Republicans flip the Senate next year. clean_body: I’m already thinking about 2024 and what it will take to keep the Senate in Democratic hands. | | | | I'm already thinking about 2024 and what it will take to keep the Senate in Democratic hands. It's going to be a tough cycle, but make no mistake, we need to deliver a win for Senator Bob Casey, who is running for re-election in Pennsylvania, a critical swing state. = = Working families have enough on their plates. They don't have the time to worry about what's going on in the US Senate. So we need to elect people who take the job seriously and focus on the issues that matter most to their constituents, not scoring political points. In short, 2024 is about Bringing Back Boring. Pennsylvania needs a workhorse in the Senate, not a showhorse. Bob Casey is a workhorse, and he gets results. It is hard to understate the stakes: Social Security, Medicare, Medicaid, women's rights, LGBTQ+ equality, the right to vote, and more are on the line if Republicans flip the Senate next year. = Donate Now If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be split between Bob Casey and Blue Wave Project, and we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = ---|--- = | = = Let the outlandish MAGA characters get cast on Bravo. name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: My favorite part of my job
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hudson for Congress
body:
| | | It’s Kevin McCarthy.

My favorite part of my job as Speaker of the House is talking to conservatives all over America to see where they stand on the issues.

Right now, I’m reaching out to you because I want your input.

Our team put together a new survey for our top patriots, and I need you to fill it out by **tomorrow** at **midnight.**

**[Will you take our crucial survey today and let us know where you stand on the issues facing Americans today?](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=34c5db306b804886bf68e8c976924aef&_e=95vbtupiAdBQ1gz_rOQJU76nvewvDiIpDEFRZ9qLZSS9v5orsmZAygkH1oGKaWVJ-ITuQxOLPjynmMWZCGfWT9U71fpS7pqBNk4m-o9JaLY310CcbUWZplOj6xxvXSIXWCEGgNDFWqbEu2_OL2PBIDCz7n1JHas3kNcSUwWcQJTmhpEUWNKD7xVRMUDBOuF0Yof3KxAdJrmrM2dYNgwVV2JH93nxy5q44JhMvjMyFz0jbs_gLrm70gt3Ybw_1beOoD1SaNuFXjx7xSw60xac13f7m9XwEHuWCTgPOWsB5y_pG1sBfxvo_J4YtO6mAS35oCXHSPEwpD3EsoMPMDImGNPLuQ53rocAxpNLnMEZohrVqPRdJursCfkuDcDKaIYPEasDkmU5GONcDlYi91PrLW4PcqgPXrAmg1qofaYted0%3D)**

We can’t thank you enough for your support.
– Team Kildee
Begin Forwarded Message:
From: Dan Kildee
Subject: humbly asking
Team – I’m a lifelong Michigander, Flint native, proud husband, father, and grandfather – **and I’m in Congress to bring people together and _get things done._**
[_**I’m also one of the national GOP’s top targets to defeat in 2024, but I want to tell you all about what I’ve fought for over the years. If you don’t have time to keep reading, will you chip in $5 or whatever you can right now to help me stay in Congress so I can keep fighting for Michigan?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69516036/426398304/2025394003?refcode=email_091023_bio-kicker&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzODc3Nzc4MC0wMDUwLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LqOHlMDI8Xl_eQDrxs17bVLD6qszL4c0FQSkKjt6rOM=)
| [Chip in →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69516037/426398305/2025394003?refcode=email_091023_bio-kicker&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzODc3Nzc4MC0wMDUwLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LqOHlMDI8Xl_eQDrxs17bVLD6qszL4c0FQSkKjt6rOM=)
---
Before my time in Washington, I served on the local school board, where I worked to support students, teachers, and schools.
Later, I served in local government, including establishing the Genesee County Land Bank, which led to tens of millions of dollars in economic redevelopment in Flint.
In 2012, I was elected to serve mid-Michigan in Congress – and since then, I’ve done everything I can to put hard-working Michigan families first.
I’ve always fought to ensure every Michigander has access to a good-paying job, quality health care and clean water.
And just last year, I helped lead the fight to lower the cost of health care and allow Medicare to finally negotiate lower drug prices for millions of seniors.
**I’m proud of this progress, but there is more work to do. And now, I’m one of the national Republicans’ top targets. They know to hold on to their House majority, they need to defeat me.**
[_**I first ran for Congress to deliver much-needed progress and results to Michigan – and that goal hasn’t changed one bit. But I can only beat back the GOP’s attacks and keep up the fight with your help. So today I’m humbly asking you: Will you chip in $5 or whatever you can afford right now to help me defend this House seat for Democrats and keep fighting in Congress?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69516038/426398306/2025394003?refcode=email_091023_bio-kicker&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzODc3Nzc4MC0wMDUwLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LqOHlMDI8Xl_eQDrxs17bVLD6qszL4c0FQSkKjt6rOM=)

clean_body: = Hey team, did you see this email from Rep. Dan Kildee? If Democrats are going to take back the House, we can’t afford to let Dan’s seat fall into GOP hands. = | | = We can’t thank you enough for your support. – Team Kildee Begin Forwarded Message: From: Dan Kildee Subject: humbly asking Team – I’m a lifelong Michigander, Flint native, proud husband, father, and grandfather – and I’m in Congress to bring people together and get things done. = | = Before my time in Washington, I served on the local school board, where I worked to support students, teachers, and schools. Later, I served in local government, including establishing the Genesee County Land Bank, which led to tens of millions of dollars in economic redevelopment in Flint. In 2012, I was elected to serve mid-Michigan in Congress – and since then, I’ve done everything I can to put hard-working Michigan families first. I’ve always fought to ensure every Michigander has access to a good-paying job, quality health care and clean water. And just last year, I helped lead the fight to lower the cost of health care and allow Medicare to finally negotiate lower drug prices for millions of seniors. I’m proud of this progress, but there is more work to do. And now, I’m one of the national Republicans’ top targets. They know to hold on to their House majority, they need to defeat me. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you for reading – I’m grateful for this people-powered team. – Dan | This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Peter,

My constituents have always been my primary focus in Congress – not dark money groups or corporate PACs. I take great pride in saying that I’ve protected my seat since 2018, completely independent of any corporate PAC funding.

**But the truth is, it makes fundraising a little more difficult because I have to send emails like this to my grassroots supporters asking for money.**

I hate asking, but it’s the only way we can compete against National Republicans and their dark money groups.

name: Ryan Zinke - Navy SEAL
subject: Closing the curtains on my campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
|
---
| | [Unsubscribe](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=d39dd19189c340cd96c09d90fa3ca259&_t=agsPQ6tAbpGT160Mbxd7DWTmB2uLon1DPaVyVZ2QHivhlIaNG3hw6VR8wDiFeeqcdc_bud-tGkBCd7F5Yu4tj3dmrvcGlMMO3sE0KcY-WZQ%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=d39dd19189c340cd96c09d90fa3ca259&_t=agsPQ6tAbpGT160Mbxd7DWTmB2uLon1DPaVyVZ2QHivhlIaNG3hw6VR8wDiFeeqcdc_bud-tGkBCd7F5Yu4tj3dmrvcGlMMO3sE0KcY-WZQ%3D)

|
I'm at my wits' end, Friend.

Biden and the Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their fundraising war chest. Now their sights are set on me.

At this point, if I don't do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will I lose my House seat, Republicans may never hold the majority in Congress again.

**Friend, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump 's Secretary of the Interior and I was the commander at SEAL Team 6.**
**I 'm also running for Congress in the most critical race in the nation.**

But if Biden can destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance.

**In 2022, I lead the team of Navy SEAL 's that retook the House Majority, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I'm one of the toughest, most battle-tested Republicans in Washington D.C. If I can't beat the Democrats gunning for my seat - no one can.**

---
| [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=d39dd19189c340cd96c09d90fa3ca259&_e=NsfLwohpqhOibuORv7zJuHm9FpdMYu13vQR5N-pnDftREkCNne83rK1hWiAdXxoFCV48p2VHdmyB08a_RjzgddLz7tyfKiJLsFwCukCAoHRtMBqXnhSO34HChViWkZwBpklXEjn_QictLxKwIdTcZDButq056q3sJBjGWX1MN9kaJ-IBC0I1MKTIxsvlCBYk9yamCI2VlDhIkR9nOicSZSN-xzqa6erAoEu2S-KjqKIW7cy6JGGw48X1KEqEoP4RyaOO8J1_ZzwXP5f1weUFljTJMxHonTd-_Sw80fDD4f_2pMS4sePtk0HOmJqLSjwVRZ2YJ8Afcna8N8O3GNzU-mwpsF4Y8CyxYTKwpRU6-1YyOlnn27zJLzuRmThT6iG4 "STAND WITH RYAN")
---

So, I'm going to be blunt with you, Friend. **[If you chip in just $5 right now,](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=d39dd19189c340cd96c09d90fa3ca259&_e=NsfLwohpqhOibuORv7zJuHm9FpdMYu13vQR5N-pnDftREkCNne83rK1hWiAdXxoFCV48p2VHdmyB08a_RjzgddLz7tyfKiJLsFwCukCAoHRtMBqXnhSO34HChViWkZwBpklXEjn_QictLxKwIdTcZDButq056q3sJBjGWX1MN9kaJ-IBC0I1MKTIxsvlCBYk9yamCI2VlDhIkR9nOicSZSN-xzqa6erAoEu2S-KjqKKlNTJ2q7IKtQ0EmN_X8U7knmJSJduUgwtOr7CbjW3I69QHbD3ghMP1YMi5BeB0c2JL1wU8KKHFNYRprsRaVrRkD7R-TC-3wS28J0q80KH1wCFHXGQ2ePDIkA7_Xtxux8ZJn-tRxwCSYyl1RiTQVUIT "If you chip in just $5 right now,")** I can promise you that we will blow my fundraising goal out of the water and ruin Biden's plan to destroy our nation.

I'm humbly asking you, as a warrior who's fought for this nation for my entire life, will you help me out?

clean_body: | | | | | I'm at my wits' end, Friend. Biden and the Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their fundraising war chest. Now their sights are set on me. At this point, if I don't do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will I lose my House seat, Republicans may never hold the majority in Congress again. Friend, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump 's Secretary of the Interior and I was the commander at SEAL Team 6. I 'm also running for Congress in the most critical race in the nation. But if Biden can destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance. In 2022, I lead the team of Navy SEAL 's that retook the House Majority, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I'm one of the toughest, most battle-tested Republicans in Washington D.C. If I can't beat the Democrats gunning for my seat - no one can. | "STAND WITH RYAN" So, I'm going to be blunt with you, Friend. "If you chip in just $5 right now," I can promise you that we will blow my fundraising goal out of the water and ruin Biden's plan to destroy our nation. I'm humbly asking you, as a warrior who's fought for this nation for my entire life, will you help me out? | | | "DONATE TODAY" You have my word, as a former Navy SEAL and commander at SEAL Team 6, if you help me out, I will continue to return the favor in Congress. Thank you for your support, Ryan Zinke | | | "DONATE TODAY" | | | Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: David Hogg, Leaders We Deserve
subject: Unless we band together and fight back, nothing is going to change
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-lwd [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-lwd]
Hey friend — it’s David Hogg, gun safety advocate and co-founder of March For Our Lives.
The GOP and conservative special interest groups have been playing a 50-year chess game to elect far-right extremists to every level of government to manipulate our country and attack our rights and freedoms. They are willing to let children be slaughtered at school and watch our planet burn for personal gain.
But badass young people have a habit of being underestimated, from March For Our Lives to the Sunrise Movement to the Movement for Black Lives. And when we demonstrate our collective power, we scare the shit out of Republicans.
That’s why with an incredible team, we launched Leaders We Deserve — a grassroots organization dedicated to electing young leaders to Congress, and especially our State Legislatures, across the country to help defeat the far-right’s agenda and advance a progressive vision for the future.
We can’t do this without you by our side. Will you become a Founding Donor by splitting a donation between Leaders We Deserve and Serve America today? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-lwd]
I’ll be blunt: There is no shortage of people who want us to fail. And unless we band together and fight back, nothing is going to change.
It’s part of why despite making up 45% of the electorate, Gen Z and Millennials only hold 21% of State Legislature seats.
Special interest groups, far-right extremists, and those hoarding the power are so determined to maintain the status quo that they will spend millions to keep Gen Z candidates from winning. They think that they can continue to manipulate the system to keep us out of elected office.
Let’s prove them wrong, friend.
That’s why I’m personally asking: Will you become a Founding Donor to Leaders We Deserve by splitting a donation with Serve America today? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-lwd]
Let’s do this,
David Hogg Co-founder, Leaders We Deserve
https://www.facebook.com/sethmoulton [https://www.facebook.com/sethmoulton] https://twitter.com/sethmoulton [https://twitter.com/sethmoulton] https://www.instagram.com/sethmoulton/?hl=en [https://www.instagram.com/sethmoulton/?hl=en] https://www.linkedin.com/company/seth-moulton-for-america/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/seth-moulton-for-america/]
