name: James Carville
subject: no regrets
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www
body:
Virginia is the ONLY southern state that has not banned or restricted abortion since the overturning of Roe despite the fact the Republicans are only 1 vote away in the State Senate from banning abortion

|
---
Derek, I know you get a lot of requests to donate this time of year. But let me make it clear...and you know I am not one to hold back. **THERE ARE NO MORE IMPORTANT ELECTIONS IN 2023 THAN HERE IN VIRGINIA.** Let me repeat that. **THERE ARE NO MORE IMPORTANT ELECTIONS IN 2023 THAN HERE IN VIRGINIA.** You know why, I know why, and the Republicans know why. And let me remind you why this is the #1 priority for Democrats: Virginia is the ONLY southern state that has not banned or restricted abortion since the overturning of Roe despite the fact the Republicans are only 1 vote away in the State Senate from banning abortion. [So I’m asking, no pleading with you to donate right now to the Democratic Party of Virginia.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69517192/426401857/800907059?refcode=dpva-em-091023&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTcyNzA0Ny0wNDUwLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ejiuiZBpUtIH4MyQTZlVzQjgnyzSRNXGpN4TuEjlyJ0=) If we keep our majority in the Senate we make sure we keep the MAGA extremists from taking away this fundamental right. If we take back our majority in the House of Delegates we can strengthen our gun laws to keep violent people or the mentally ill from getting guns. And did I mention that the Republicans are only 1 vote away in the State Senate from banning abortion? [Donate now...not tomorrow...not next week. Now. Please. Let’s not have any regrets the night of November 7th. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69517193/426401858/800907059?refcode=dpva-em-091023&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTcyNzA0Ny0wNDUwLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ejiuiZBpUtIH4MyQTZlVzQjgnyzSRNXGpN4TuEjlyJ0=) I’m counting on you. \- James [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69517194/426401859/800907059?refcode=dpva-em-091023&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTcyNzA0Ny0wNDUwLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ejiuiZBpUtIH4MyQTZlVzQjgnyzSRNXGpN4TuEjlyJ0=) | **************[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69517195/426401860/264155582?refcode=dpva-em-091023&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTcyNzA0Ny0wNDUwLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ejiuiZBpUtIH4MyQTZlVzQjgnyzSRNXGpN4TuEjlyJ0=)**************

As we close out the Summer months, there are number of major issues being considered in Washington:
**» This week, Congress is working to reach a deal to avoid a government shutdown and keep federal offices fully functioning.** Kevin McCarthy's extreme allies are already threatening a shutdown if their extreme, far-right demands aren't met.

**»**** Democrats in the Senate are moving forward with an ethics complaint against Supreme Court Justices.** This comes in the wake of more revelations of possible ethics violations by Justices Clarence Thomas and Samuel Alito.

**» The probe into former President Trump’s interference in the 2020 Presidential Election is still underway.**
I want to hear from you on these issues and more. What you share will help inform our decisions throughout our campaign and help me better understand what's top of mind for folks across our district and beyond.

name: Wisconsin Update (via DLCC.org)
subject: Impeachment in Wisconsin?
body:
Republicans will stop at NOTHING to defend their tight grip on Wisconsin’s legislature because they know the stakes are HIGH. | | |
---
| | **FIRST:** Wisconsin voters elected a liberal supreme court justice, solidifying a liberal majority for the first time in years – this was a HUGE win for the future of abortion rights and could _finally_ pave the way for fair maps. **THEN:** A lawsuit was filed urging the state to strike down Wisconsin’s rigged, Republican-drawn electoral maps – this lawsuit could put _every_ seat in the legislature on the ballot in 2024. **NOW:** Republicans are considering _impeaching_ WI’s newest liberal justice – _before she hears a single case_ – to stall our progress and stay in power. Republicans will stop at NOTHING to defend their tight grip on Wisconsin’s legislature because they know the stakes are HIGH. With the potential to have all 132 seats on the ballot _next year_ , it’s critical we rally behind state Democrats and lay the groundwork to win in Wisconsin and beyond. [Will you chip in $7 right now to give state Democrats the resources they need to compete against extreme Republicans in states like Wisconsin and beyond? ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xT87Do081Peey8mbiuSK7m06iLNAd-MSsCN8QIrrkMfPBUfMHHNT5nOKkhJ0IdUWl1MviNK-TzBhGobkEQ9_TTJOwiSjxedWmwYqYjOfL1XdWUEqLpvzTlLCjiF8tXY8RzgReG5rhfb-XiLlQlO_hCqUUmoPDhzJ4ca6e4VF6cFPriLKOTUoWYUa0kER9qUYOGlrITWTeM8n_jATI0cc4CExZQNMyHQokLsoUUayDk4MrKrAZ11npBhV4th60sj48krQ5CvRQRDwrSRP7f0U9O34-yOYE-xvoPx2oz2SPbbj5vVOj_xikrm8ikhMX6q5YK1mQ1Ic7t3Au3bcGPF1ozEHvgY8xP_fzLXFQD4DL9-iRECLSVXMdumSfZrnsYfas/3zh/YWjNeKxtSCGWxlWK1KVXeQ/h0/SkmSs8Fag7CFq5jJbhXcFA6IAZExDIv3O2m8xnk5uyM) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

When I came out in college, I already knew I wanted to pursue a career in
public service, but I feared that living my authentic life openly might
prevent me from exploring the field of my dreams.

Seeing the courage of others in the LGBTQ+ community who came out, lived
their truth, and were public about who they are and who they love, I
realized that I didn’t have to choose one or the other. I could run for
office and be true to myself.

name: Adam Frisch
subject: what Dad taught me about abortion
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Adam for Colorado
body:
Every time I see a new attack on abortion rights and women’s reproductive freedoms, I think of my dad.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69517923/426404244/872526041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZTc2YTdkOS0wNjUwLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hGLGvVlJZexshD_Ep25BZDo3X_DB0ZqIMKn5lIfQiHI=&emci=97f5ce2f-0550-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&emdi=de76a7d9-0650-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&ceid=19445147)
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69517924/426404245/872526041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZTc2YTdkOS0wNjUwLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hGLGvVlJZexshD_Ep25BZDo3X_DB0ZqIMKn5lIfQiHI=&emci=97f5ce2f-0550-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&emdi=de76a7d9-0650-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&ceid=19445147)
Hello,
Every time I see a new attack on abortion rights and women’s reproductive freedoms, I think of my dad.
For the first few years of my life, my family lived on an Indian reservation in Northern Montana. Dad was an OB-GYN – in the years before _Roe v. Wade_ ...
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69517925/426404246/1610638071?refcode=em20230910pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=de76a7d9-0650-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZTc2YTdkOS0wNjUwLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hGLGvVlJZexshD_Ep25BZDo3X_DB0ZqIMKn5lIfQiHI=)
Years later, Dad recounted how he saw patients that came from all walks of life. Black, brown, and white. Younger and older. Rich and poor. And just as many Republicans walked through his doors as did Democrats.
Looking back, having a father who provided women with access to health care – especially at a time when so many were being denied the right – really shaped how I think about the issue.
My dad is in his 80’s and retired now, but for years, he helped train the next generation of health care providers at Planned Parenthood. And my sister, who later also became an OB-GYN, is continuing on his legacy.
**My opponent, Lauren Boebert, wants you to think that women having the freedom to make their own medical decisions is some extreme idea. It’s not.**
What’s extreme is Boebert pushing a bill in Congress that would make all abortions illegal – including in cases of rape or incest – and wanting to ban a medication that’s been approved for decades for abortions and miscarriages.
Boebert’s views are a fringe one – supported by people who think that the government should be dictating women’s medical decisions, instead of allowing women the freedom to make choices with their doctor.
I would have thought that after almost losing her seat in Congress last year, Lauren Boebert might have at least pretended to moderate on this issue. But she’s only doubled down on the extreme.
**Only 546 votes separated Lauren Boebert and me in 2022, and I’m ready to finish the job in 2024.**
[**Please, if you’re able to, will you consider chipping in to my campaign today to help me finally defeat Lauren Boebert in 2024? Our race was the closest in the country, but I’m not taking money from corporate PACs. clean_body: Every time I see a new attack on abortion rights and women’s reproductive freedoms, I think of my dad. Hello, Every time I see a new attack on abortion rights and women’s reproductive freedoms, I think of my dad. For the first few years of my life, my family lived on an Indian reservation in Northern Montana. Dad was an OB-GYN – in the years before Roe v. Wade ... = Years later, Dad recounted how he saw patients that came from all walks of life. Black, brown, and white. Younger and older. Rich and poor. And just as many Republicans walked through his doors as did Democrats. Looking back, having a father who provided women with access to health care – especially at a time when so many were being denied the right – really shaped how I think about the issue. My dad is in his 80’s and retired now, but for years, he helped train the next generation of health care providers at Planned Parenthood. And my sister, who later also became an OB-GYN, is continuing on his legacy. My opponent, Lauren Boebert, wants you to think that women having the freedom to make their own medical decisions is some extreme idea. It’s not. What’s extreme is Boebert pushing a bill in Congress that would make all abortions illegal – including in cases of rape or incest – and wanting to ban a medication that’s been approved for decades for abortions and miscarriages. Boebert’s views are a fringe one – supported by people who think that the government should be dictating women’s medical decisions, instead of allowing women the freedom to make choices with their doctor. I would have thought that after almost losing her seat in Congress last year, Lauren Boebert might have at least pretended to moderate on this issue. But she’s only doubled down on the extreme. Only 546 votes separated Lauren Boebert and me in 2022, and I’m ready to finish the job in 2024. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you for letting me share some of my story with you. With gratitude - Adam ** Paid for by Adam for Colorado. Adam for Colorado PO Box 1240 Glenwood Springs, CO 81602 United States Contributions or gifts to Adam for Colorado are not tax deductible.

subject: A View From The Campaign Trail
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Suzanne Crouch
body:
As we continue our journey towards a brighter future for Indiana, I wanted to take a moment to share some recent highlights from this week!

https://www.crouchforindiana.com/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=b0ff4477df-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_08_04_07&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b0ff4477df-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Friends and fellow Hoosiers,

I hope this message finds you well. As we continue our journey towards a brighter future for Indiana, I wanted to take a moment to pause on the campaign trail and share some recent highlights from this week, but before I do, we must recognize and remember the solemn anniversary we will be met with tomorrow. 9/11 was a day that forever changed our nation.

On the anniversary of the September 11th attacks, we honor the memory of the lives lost and the heroes who rose to the occasion. It was a day that tested our nation's resolve and showed the world our resilience. The unity that emerged in the aftermath of that tragedy serves as a reminder that, as Americans, we are at our strongest when we stand together.

In the face of adversity, our country came together, transcending political and ideological divides. We were reminded that, despite our differences, we share a common bond as citizens of this great nation. It is that same spirit of unity and determination that fuels my commitment to the people of Indiana.

As we look back on 9/11, let us draw strength from the unity we witnessed, stand in solidarity with the first responders who continue to serve and protect our communities and carry that spirit forward in our pursuit of a brighter future for Indiana. We owe it to the memory of those we lost to work tirelessly for a better tomorrow, where hope and unity prevail.

Let's keep the conversation going. Please reach out to share your questions, comments and concerns about Indiana as I️ run for Governor.
EMAIL ME (https://crouchforindiana.com/connect/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=b0ff4477df-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_08_04_07&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b0ff4477df-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

** Exploring Toyota's Pathways for Hoosiers with Disabilities
------------------------------------------------------------
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=b0ff4477df-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_08_04_07&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b0ff4477df-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

This week, I️ joined The Arc of Indiana to explore Toyota Motor Manufacturing Indiana and learn more about their groundbreaking program that creates pathways for Hoosiers with disabilities to have successful careers.

https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=b0ff4477df-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_08_04_07&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b0ff4477df-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

There are 160,000 unemployed Hoosiers with disabilities — all of whom deserve the opportunity to work and contribute to our state. Over 100 have already benefited from Toyota's program, serving as a model for inclusive workplaces across our state.

** Meeting with Monroe County Republicans
------------------------------------------------------------
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=b0ff4477df-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_08_04_07&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b0ff4477df-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

I had the pleasure of speaking with the members of the Monroe County Republican Party of Indiana this week.

We engaged in crucial discussions about the challenges we face in our state and how we can work together to overcome them.

I'm grateful for their warm welcome and the opportunity to collaborate with dedicated individuals who care deeply about the future of Indiana!

** This Week's Endorsements
------------------------------------------------------------
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=b0ff4477df-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_08_04_07&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b0ff4477df-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

"As the Franklin-Union-Needham Township Trustee, I fully support Suzanne Crouch for Governor of Indiana. She has a heart for public service and the grit to keep moving Indiana into a brighter tomorrow. She spends her energy working for Hoosiers and not playing politics. A strong leader, a strong woman and a proud Hoosier, Suzanne Couch will be the Governor Indiana deserves.”- Franklin-Union-Needham Township Trustee Lydia Wales

https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=b0ff4477df-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_08_04_07&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b0ff4477df-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

"I️ believe Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch to be the best person to lead our state because of her no nonsense approach to public safety, parents rights, education, and protecting our tax dollars. Her solid conservative principles are time tested and will lead to a better Indiana for all Hoosiers. I ask that you please vote for the best Indiana by supporting Suzanne Crouch." - St. John Councilman Mike Aurelio

https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=b0ff4477df-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_08_04_07&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b0ff4477df-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

“Over the last several years as a member and President of the Rockport City Council, I have witnessed Suzanne Crouch in action, tending to the needs of government entities. Three words describe her performance: AVAILABILITY, RESPONSIVE, and EXECUTION. Not only is she a wonderful person, Suzanne is an outstanding representative for the State of Indiana.” - Rockport Councilwoman Connie Hargis

** Last but not least...
------------------------------------------------------------

As we move forward, I want to express my heartfelt gratitude for your ongoing support and enthusiasm for our campaign. Together, we can build a brighter future for Indiana, where every Hoosier has the opportunity to thrive and prosper.

Stay tuned for more updates as we continue to work tirelessly to earn your trust and your vote. Together, we will create a stronger, more inclusive Indiana.

Onward and upward,

** ICYMI: Learn more about my plan to #AxeTheTax
------------------------------------------------------------
I️ recently unveiled my plan to #AxeTheTax (https://secure.winred.com/friends-of-suzanne-crouch/hf-axe-the-tax?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=b0ff4477df-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_08_04_07&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b0ff4477df-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) by eliminating the individual income tax. I️ wrote an Op-Ed in the Indy Star (https://www.indystar.com/story/opinion/2023/08/30/indiana-income-tax-bidenflation-suzanne-crouch-governor-candidate/70707154007/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=b0ff4477df-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_08_04_07&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b0ff4477df-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) describing my plan — one that will put more money back in your pocket (where it belongs) even as Bidenflation works to empty it.

You can read how we need to #AxeTheTax (https://crouchforindiana.com/axe-the-tax/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=b0ff4477df-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_08_04_07&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b0ff4477df-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) and how we plan to do it, here (https://crouchforindiana.com/axe-the-tax/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=b0ff4477df-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_08_04_07&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b0ff4477df-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) .

clean_body: As we continue our journey towards a brighter future for Indiana, I wanted to take a moment to share some recent highlights from this week! Friends and fellow Hoosiers, I hope this message finds you well. As we continue our journey towards a brighter future for Indiana, I wanted to take a moment to pause on the campaign trail and share some recent highlights from this week, but before I do, we must recognize and remember the solemn anniversary we will be met with tomorrow. 9/11 was a day that forever changed our nation. On the anniversary of the September 11th attacks, we honor the memory of the lives lost and the heroes who rose to the occasion. It was a day that tested our nation's resolve and showed the world our resilience. The unity that emerged in the aftermath of that tragedy serves as a reminder that, as Americans, we are at our strongest when we stand together. In the face of adversity, our country came together, transcending political and ideological divides. We were reminded that, despite our differences, we share a common bond as citizens of this great nation. It is that same spirit of unity and determination that fuels my commitment to the people of Indiana. As we look back on 9/11, let us draw strength from the unity we witnessed, stand in solidarity with the first responders who continue to serve and protect our communities and carry that spirit forward in our pursuit of a brighter future for Indiana. We owe it to the memory of those we lost to work tirelessly for a better tomorrow, where hope and unity prevail. Let's keep the conversation going. Please reach out to share your questions, comments and concerns about Indiana as I️ run for Governor. EMAIL ME () Exploring Toyota's Pathways for Hoosiers with Disabilities This week, I️ joined The Arc of Indiana to explore Toyota Motor Manufacturing Indiana and learn more about their groundbreaking program that creates pathways for Hoosiers with disabilities to have successful careers. There are 160,000 unemployed Hoosiers with disabilities — all of whom deserve the opportunity to work and contribute to our state. Over 100 have already benefited from Toyota's program, serving as a model for inclusive workplaces across our state. Meeting with Monroe County Republicans I had the pleasure of speaking with the members of the Monroe County Republican Party of Indiana this week. We engaged in crucial discussions about the challenges we face in our state and how we can work together to overcome them. I'm grateful for their warm welcome and the opportunity to collaborate with dedicated individuals who care deeply about the future of Indiana! This Week's Endorsements "As the Franklin-Union-Needham Township Trustee, I fully support Suzanne Crouch for Governor of Indiana. She has a heart for public service and the grit to keep moving Indiana into a brighter tomorrow. She spends her energy working for Hoosiers and not playing politics. A strong leader, a strong woman and a proud Hoosier, Suzanne Couch will be the Governor Indiana deserves.”- Franklin-Union-Needham Township Trustee Lydia Wales "I️ believe Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch to be the best person to lead our state because of her no nonsense approach to public safety, parents rights, education, and protecting our tax dollars. Her solid conservative principles are time tested and will lead to a better Indiana for all Hoosiers. I ask that you please vote for the best Indiana by supporting Suzanne Crouch." - St. John Councilman Mike Aurelio “Over the last several years as a member and President of the Rockport City Council, I have witnessed Suzanne Crouch in action, tending to the needs of government entities. Three words describe her performance: AVAILABILITY, RESPONSIVE, and EXECUTION. Not only is she a wonderful person, Suzanne is an outstanding representative for the State of Indiana.” - Rockport Councilwoman Connie Hargis Last but not least... As we move forward, I want to express my heartfelt gratitude for your ongoing support and enthusiasm for our campaign. Together, we can build a brighter future for Indiana, where every Hoosier has the opportunity to thrive and prosper. Stay tuned for more updates as we continue to work tirelessly to earn your trust and your vote. Together, we will create a stronger, more inclusive Indiana. Onward and upward, ICYMI: Learn more about my plan to #AxeTheTax I️ recently unveiled my plan to #AxeTheTax () by eliminating the individual income tax. I️ wrote an Op-Ed in the Indy Star () describing my plan — one that will put more money back in your pocket (where it belongs) even as Bidenflation works to empty it. **GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

Share your thoughts on how to save America | I look forward to debating my Republican competitors again and speaking hard truths. I want to hear from you, Fellow American. Submit your thoughts before our poll closes in just one (1) hour. Thanks, Vivek Ramaswamy GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. name: Gene Karpinski, LCV
subject: MAGA extremists threaten a government shutdown to block climate action
body:
__Give today and your donation will be TRIPLE MATCHED >> |
---

|
_**" If a shutdown occurs, then so be it."** - Rep. Ralph Norman (R-SC)

**" We should not fear a government shutdown ... most Americans won't even miss it"** - Rep. Bob Good (R-VA)_
DEVELOPING: _The Hill_ is reporting that after bringing the country to the brink of default and economic meltdown earlier this summer, "a handful of hard-line Republicans are brushing off -- or even embracing -- the possibility of a shutdown" at the end of this month in order to force _massive_ cuts to key environmental programs. **That. Can 't. Happen.**

**With budget negotiations happening right now, we must rally to ensure that climate action and environmental justice investments from the federal clean energy plan -- along with other important environmental programs -- don't get slashed. To do that, we need your help --** [renew your membership for just $5 to power our campaign to stop MAGA Republicans' planet-destroying cuts in their tracks.](https://links.messages.lcv.)

Peter, these are the same tactics we saw Republicans use to bring the country to the brink of default in May. _They will stop at nothing to serve the interests of their polluter donors._

We stopped them last time. LCV flooded House and Senate offices with messages. We were on the airwaves. We pressured members of Congress at events in their districts and in the Capitol. We spoke up to protect climate action and our environment -- and together, we defended our hard-won progress.

**Now, we need to do it again. And for that, we need _you_.** [Please, renew your membership now to power our campaigns for clean energy and climate action -- it only costs $5. Give today and your donation will be TRIPLE MATCHED >>](https://links.messages.lcv.)

| | **
** **FOR IMMEDIATE REVIEW:**

**Supporter Record:** Peter Willis
**MATCH STATUS:** [_TRIPLE MATCH ACTIVE_](https://links.messages.lcv.)

**Deadline:** 11:59 pm, September 30, 2023
**Fundraising Goal:** $30,000

**STATUS:** [Renew now -- it only takes $5 >>](https://links.messages.lcv.) |
---|---|---

**We won 't sit by while extreme MAGA Republicans try to extort environmental champions in Congress into agreeing to unpopular cuts to critical climate and clean energy programs at the eleventh hour.**

We have the power to stop polluter-backed Republicans from undoing clean energy progress. But members of Congress need to hear from our movement TODAY -- and the truth is, a campaign like this takes resources we just don't have right now.

**That 's why your LCV membership is so important and why we urge you not to miss this opportunity to triple your impact.**

[The best thing you can do right now is to renew your LCV membership while it will be TRIPLE MATCHED. Right now, all it takes is $5.](https://links.messages.lcv.)

We need you to power our work for people and the planet! Join us.

Onward,

Gene Karpinski
President
League of Conservation Voters
__
__

---

name: Maxwell Frost
subject: Peter, I was arrested.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAXWELL FROST FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [ ](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/AYlYhrn5IbJzp2bHJSw16Q~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRm4JHpP0TQaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDIzMDkxMF9lbV9mcl9iMV9nb29kdHJvdWJsZV9lbi1ycyZhbW91bnQ9MjcmY2RtYz0yVjdQWDlENER4ZW82ZU02UHVvc0lleXBXODEmcmVmY29kZTI9MlY3UFg5RDREeGVvNmVNNlB1b3NJZXlwVzgxJnJlZmNvZGVjZG1jPTJWN1BYOUQ0RHhlbzZlTTZQdW9zSWV5cFc4MVcDc3BjQgpk-ukM_mQf8F3WUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAaQ~~)
---
Peter, I’m proud to be following in the footsteps of great civil rights leaders who used nonviolent resistance to fight for justice. To disrupt the status quo and achieve progress, “good trouble” is necessary. I’ve been arrested twice while fighting for the most vulnerable among us. While standing up for the rights of the disenfranchised and downtrodden at the White House. And while acting as one of the lead organizers of the Black Lives Matter protests in Orlando, where I was tear-gassed, arrested, and jailed-- all for peacefully protesting on the frontlines against our broken system. [Peter, I ran and won my race in the face of the GOP who tried to relentlessly destroy the protections the generations before us achieved. But now, we need to ensure we can keep up the momentum year-round and raise $5,483 before midnight. Can I count on you to chip in and join me in this fight? >>](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/AYlYhrn5IbJzp2bHJSw16Q~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRm4JHpP0TQaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDIzMDkxMF9lbV9mcl9iMV9nb29kdHJvdWJsZV9lbi1ycyZhbW91bnQ9MjcmY2RtYz0yVjdQWDlENER4ZW82ZU02UHVvc0lleXBXODEmcmVmY29kZTI9MlY3UFg5RDREeGVvNmVNNlB1b3NJZXlwVzgxJnJlZmNvZGVjZG1jPTJWN1BYOUQ0RHhlbzZlTTZQdW9zSWV5cFc4MVcDc3BjQgpk-ukM_mQf8F3WUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAaQ~~) | [ ](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/AYlYhrn5IbJzp2bHJSw16Q~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRm4JHpP0TQaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDIzMDkxMF9lbV9mcl9iMV9nb29kdHJvdWJsZV9lbi1ycyZhbW91bnQ9MjcmY2RtYz0yVjdQWDlENER4ZW82ZU02UHVvc0lleXBXODEmcmVmY29kZTI9MlY3UFg5RDREeGVvNmVNNlB1b3NJZXlwVzgxJnJlZmNvZGVjZG1jPTJWN1BYOUQ0RHhlbzZlTTZQdW9zSWV5cFc4MVcDc3BjQgpk-ukM_mQf8F3WUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAaQ~~)
---
I know that change can feel impossible and hope can be hard to come by.
John Lewis, civil rights icon, was arrested over 40 times in his lifelong fight for equality knew that progress requires forging on even in the difficult times:
_“Do not get lost in a sea of despair. Be hopeful, be optimistic. Our struggle is not the struggle of a day, a week, a month, or a year, it is the struggle of a lifetime. Never, ever be afraid to make some noise and get in good trouble, necessary trouble.”_
**As national organizing director at March for Our Lives I often thought of John Lewis, the youngest speaker at the March on Washington, and how we could honor his legacy. Even in the tough times.**
[I’m fighting in Congress as part of the next generation of leaders but I cannot do this alone. Will you join me in good trouble and support our fight? Even a couple of dollars gets us that much closer, please rush your donation now >>](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/AYlYhrn5IbJzp2bHJSw16Q~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRm4JHpP0TQaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDIzMDkxMF9lbV9mcl9iMV9nb29kdHJvdWJsZV9lbi1ycyZhbW91bnQ9MjcmY2RtYz0yVjdQWDlENER4ZW82ZU02UHVvc0lleXBXODEmcmVmY29kZTI9MlY3UFg5RDREeGVvNmVNNlB1b3NJZXlwVzgxJnJlZmNvZGVjZG1jPTJWN1BYOUQ0RHhlbzZlTTZQdW9zSWV5cFc4MVcDc3BjQgpk-ukM_mQf8F3WUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAaQ~~)

clean_body: | ~~ Peter, I’m proud to be following in the footsteps of great civil rights leaders who used nonviolent resistance to fight for justice. To disrupt the status quo and achieve progress, “good trouble” is necessary. I’ve been arrested twice while fighting for the most vulnerable among us. While standing up for the rights of the disenfranchised and downtrodden at the White House. And while acting as one of the lead organizers of the Black Lives Matter protests in Orlando, where I was tear-gassed, arrested, and jailed-- all for peacefully protesting on the frontlines against our broken system. ~~ | ~~ I know that change can feel impossible and hope can be hard to come by. John Lewis, civil rights icon, was arrested over 40 times in his lifelong fight for equality knew that progress requires forging on even in the difficult times: “Do not get lost in a sea of despair. Be hopeful, be optimistic. Our struggle is not the struggle of a day, a week, a month, or a year, it is the struggle of a lifetime. Never, ever be afraid to make some noise and get in good trouble, necessary trouble.” As national organizing director at March for Our Lives I often thought of John Lewis, the youngest speaker at the March on Washington, and how we could honor his legacy. Even in the tough times. ~~ | | ~~ ~~ | ~~ ~ | ~ ~ Together in the fight, Maxwell ~~ ~ | PAID FOR BY MAXWELL FROST FOR CONGRESS Maxwell Frost for Congress PO Box 772671 Orlando, FL 32877-2671 United States | Maxwell is an organizer representing Florida's 10th Congressional District in Congress. In a stunning turn of events, conservative lawmakers are pushing for the impeachment of a newly sworn in Wisconsin Supreme Court Justice. This audacious move is a blatant attempt to derail progress towards a more equitable and fair democracy by chipping away at the independence of our judicial system.
**Why Wisconsin Republicans are talking about impeaching a new state Supreme Court justice – AP** [**WHAT EXACTLY DID PROTASIEWICZ SAY?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/69520714/426407157/-240684510?refcode=20230910_AOTL_F_WISCOTUS_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM0OGQ3NTNiLTBjNTAtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZTFiYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OLwD0e-ZJNFilirSqjIV1uYfKmvhEdmp8oiNnODf1d0=) Protasiewicz frequently spoke about redistricting during the campaign, calling the current Republican-friendly maps "unfair" and "rigged." "Let's be clear here," she said at a January forum. "The maps are rigged here, bottom line." "They don't reflect people in this state," Protasiewicz said at the same forum. "I don't think you could sell any reasonable person that the maps are fair. I can't tell you what I would do on a particular case, but I can tell you my values, and the maps are wrong."
---

clean_body: | In a stunning turn of events, conservative lawmakers are pushing for the impeachment of a newly sworn in Wisconsin Supreme Court Justice. This audacious move is a blatant attempt to derail progress towards a more equitable and fair democracy by chipping away at the independence of our judicial system. Why Wisconsin Republicans are talking about impeaching a new state Supreme Court justice – AP = Protasiewicz frequently spoke about redistricting during the campaign, calling the current Republican-friendly maps "unfair" and "rigged." "Let's be clear here," she said at a January forum. "The maps are rigged here, bottom line." "They don't reflect people in this state," Protasiewicz said at the same forum. "I don't think you could sell any reasonable person that the maps are fair. I can't tell you what I would do on a particular case, but I can tell you my values, and the maps are wrong." The efforts to unseat this justice stem from a deep-seated resistance to fair maps that aim to level the playing field and ensure fair representation for all people. name: Diane Sare
subject: 9/11 Memorial Concert Today Live in NYC and online
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sare for Senate
body:
| | [](https://www.sareforsenate.com/?e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2023_9_11_memorial_concert&n=1)
---
Friend Today at 5:00 pm, the Schiller Institute NYC Chorus is holding a [9/11 Memorial Concert](https://www.sareforsenate.com/r?u=qMltVqwXsh7eRHnd-hTLiW_h4-Wh1mm4lbJsffOcAl_eyaqh9QUjatgMoC2e7_Zk&e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2023_9_11_memorial_concert&n=2) at the Church of St Paul and St Andrew on the corner of 86th St and West End Ave. in Manhattan. It will also be broadcast [live online.](https://www.sareforsenate.com/r?u=VdtJ-0x9Mn5WQiItSl6weNegsOlmhrSFUNjJIO_WTaQ1i_Cu-zdVpgW_nA99w62fnzPO6UWhpfM8fnkmQQm7kg&e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2023_9_11_memorial_concert&n=3) This is the chorus which I founded in 2014. It is known for its annual 9/11 memorial concert, which is especially important here because so many New Yorkers were personally affected by the attack on the Towers, including our first responders, many of whom made the ultimate sacrifice on that day. The United States has also lost thousands of talented young people in the needless and illegal wars which followed, which have served to unleash waves of displaced people, just as Libya's Gaddafi warned would happen if he were to be assassinated. The carnage must stop. That is why I am running for US Senate, and that is why I am committed to NOT forgetting that horrible day on September 11, 2001. Only when the Truth is told will Justice be attained. I hope you can make it either in person or online.
## [Schiller Institute 9/11 Memorial Concert](https://www.sareforsenate.com/r?u=qMltVqwXsh7eRHnd-hTLiW_h4-Wh1mm4lbJsffOcAl_eyaqh9QUjatgMoC2e7_Zk&e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2023_9_11_memorial_concert&n=4)

| | Patriot,

---
Last month, the disgusting witch hunts against our movement undoubtedly took their darkest turn yet.
---
Crooked Joe’s accomplices **ARRESTED** yours truly in the notoriously violent jail in Fulton County, Georgia – _and they even forced me to take a mugshot to try and make me look like Public Enemy #1!_

---
The Left truly believed that picture would be the end of our beautiful movement...

---

From: Working Families Party
Date: Tue, Sept 5, 2023
Subject: Join UAW President Shawn Fain for a virtual labor solidarity rally Peter,
**At 11:59 PM on Thursday, September 14th nearly 150,000 auto workers’ contracts will expire — setting up what could be one of the largest strikes of the year.** Right now, the United Auto Workers (UAW) union is in intense negotiations with General Motors, Ford, and Stellantis, demanding pay increases, improved benefits and pensions, an end to the tiered wage system, and job security for all workers during the transition to electric vehicle production as part of their new contract agreement. But, if the companies refuse to reach a fair deal by the expiration date of the existing contract, UAW members have authorized the union to call a strike against the companies. **This Sunday, September 10th at 7PM ET, join us for a virtual rally with the UAW, MoveOn, and allies as we show our solidarity with union members gearing up to take on the three biggest U.S. automakers.** **[You don’t want to miss this. Click here to RSVP now.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDN_AKdF4M0u5pGQ87M_sP-cGYGWrDFVb05z_d7bYwkuq1Wd5R2yAKqeyBlJLpnIaY4xc-gz5CgkftCuTNeMDUcLCPqCPrmiebmGCczPIHuVa2ltsdQJZwgSfoPWdA92h9aA5vy0a1GTK5UiYwNKpEcUxN7O_P-cHrI4Y2BLGrUNVwAvAwcQZsNc3VZ0PW6NiH4cTwoQc7d27WmvcQ6ERdqF7BoQ1eNGBPHZBF99e380ux-JmILDOvLIZnDYW7slxeaYys6YkVNXMNJtK47i6eifGlaKV6rEqeLZX0yU_JCv-f2WHCoILV4R5o-fvMzdllA/3zh/T_wTxFEGTjGmkyEf-C3VXg/h3/spm-VKA-AdaVE9AIC5_itCSAVZnLcQojnMHaCFkOSUc)** **[RSVP now »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDN_AKdF4M0u5pGQ87M_sP-cGYGWrDFVb05z_d7bYwkuq1Wd5R2yAKqeyBlJLpnIaY4xc-gz5CgkftCuTNeMDUcLCPqCPrmiebmGCczPIHuVaIwh0dZm0_kwhnCYN8zGcuWp7EvUxFNIm29j3_8oxGrrsXydkGh9MIKUct35FY2oNS0bc8WU6r_3uavMwDAuA_Sl2_yrqUu9L1i0d6Ahwfmj9WGJCgGc3TxmLPbdKhqnJPfZ__iWG24MbaHjrFSJ1uraAatQowXt7HE64IaSXlEOB0UfD6JVLBGxEAiAwPs2JbL7oI8O7mJ83lnwzfBVD-Q/3zh/T_wTxFEGTjGmkyEf-C3VXg/h4/wQDTnARK07Pz2f2o9uf4z1LVhi9knG2UVvfkPI1FZQ0)** We'll hear from UAW President Shawn Fain, who will update us with the latest on what's happening at the bargaining table, and how we can best support workers heading for strike. clean_body: Tonight, September 10th at 7PM ET, we’re hosting a virtual rally with the UAW, MoveOn, and allies to show our solidarity with union members gearing up to take on the three biggest U.S. automakers. | | | Peter — Tonight at 7pm ET, join UAW President Shawn Fain, Rep. Rashida Tlaib, WFP National Director Maurice Mitchell, Center for Popular Democracy Action, Detroit Action, Jobs with Justice, MoveOn, OLÉ, Our Revolution, People’s Action, SEIU, Standing Up for Racial Justice, Sunrise Movement, United We Dream Action, and movement leaders from around the country in a show of solidarity with UAW workers: UAW President Shawn Fain will be detailing the latest on bargaining and speaking to the best way to support. Rep. Tlaib, Maurice Mitchell, and others will be sharing stories of solidarity and why all of us need to join the struggle for a fair contract. Big business wants to roll back advances workers have made. We’re not going to let that happen. — Team WFP \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Working Families Party Date: Tue, Sept 5, 2023 Subject: Join UAW President Shawn Fain for a virtual labor solidarity rally Peter, At 11:59 PM on Thursday, September 14th nearly 150,000 auto workers’ contracts will expire — setting up what could be one of the largest strikes of the year. Right now, the United Auto Workers (UAW) union is in intense negotiations with General Motors, Ford, and Stellantis, demanding pay increases, improved benefits and pensions, an end to the tiered wage system, and job security for all workers during the transition to electric vehicle production as part of their new contract agreement. But, if the companies refuse to reach a fair deal by the expiration date of the existing contract, UAW members have authorized the union to call a strike against the companies. This Sunday, September 10th at 7PM ET, join us for a virtual rally with the UAW, MoveOn, and allies as we show our solidarity with union members gearing up to take on the three biggest U.S. automakers. We'll hear from UAW President Shawn Fain, who will update us with the latest on what's happening at the bargaining table, and how we can best support workers heading for strike. Special guests, including U.S. Representative Rashida Tlaib and WFP National Director Maurice Mitchell, will also join us to share stories of solidarity and why all of us need to join the struggle for a fair contract. Ready to join the fight? In solidarity, Working Families Party Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. name: Team Casey
subject: No tax breaks for union busters. Period.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
👍 to unions, 👎 to tax breaks for union busters
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=611%2E552475%2EdLtLB8)
Peter,
**For too long, the deck in Washington has been stacked against workers.**
That's why Bob is fighting to stop corporations from claiming anti-union expenses as run-of-the-mill business tax write-offs. That’s right — **no tax breaks for union busters. Period.**
**[It’s pretty simple — and if you agree, we hope you’ll add your name to our petition to show your solidarity and support for PA workers.](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/casey-em-20230910-no-tax-cuts-for-union-busters/?refcode=em20230910-1&akid=611%2E552475%2EdLtLB8)**
**[Add Your Name ››](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/casey-em-20230910-no-tax-cuts-for-union-busters/?refcode=em20230910-1&akid=611%2E552475%2EdLtLB8)**
For years, Bob has been standing up to big corporations in Washington because our workers deserve more than our support — they deserve action.
Unions are a way of life for many workers nationwide, especially here in Pennsylvania. That’s why Bob is leading the fight to stop corporations from using tax breaks to subsidize their anti-union expenses.
**[Will you add your name to show your support for workers in Pennsylvania and across the country? Every signature makes a difference and shows a strong amount of support for unions and workers.](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/casey-em-20230910-no-tax-cuts-for-union-busters/?refcode=em20230910-1&akid=611%2E552475%2EdLtLB8)**
**[Add Your Name ››](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/casey-em-20230910-no-tax-cuts-for-union-busters/?refcode=em20230910-1&akid=611%2E552475%2EdLtLB8)**
With gratitude,
Team Casey

* * *

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

name: Joseph Geevarghese, Executive Director
subject: Join me for a virtual rally for the UAW tonight!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

This is BIG:

Next Thursday, September 14th at 11:59 PM nearly 150,000 auto workers’ contracts will expire! This could be the beginning of one of the BIGGEST strikes of the year.

The United Auto Workers (UAW) union is in the middle of negotiations with General Motors, Ford, and Stellantis, demanding things every worker has the right to expect from their employer:
* Fair pay increases
* Improved benefits and Pensions
* An end to the tiered wage system
* And job security for all workers during the transition to electric vehicle

But here’s the thing Peter Willis, if these Greedy Big Corporations refuse to make a fair deal the UAW members have authorized the union to call a strike against the companies.

So this Sunday, September 10th at 7pm ET, we’re joining a virtual rally with the UAW, Working Families Party, MoveOn, and other allies to show our solidarity with union members and their families as they get ready to take on the biggest U.S. automakers. (https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/UAW_Event_Invite/?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230910_INV_uawinv_0_6MO_uawevent_na_na_uawevent&t=1011&akid=4653%2E5885482%2EyatNdY)

https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/UAW_Event_Invite/?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230910_INV_uawinv_0_6MO_uawevent_na_na_uawevent&t=1012&akid=4653%2E5885482%2EyatNdY

UAW President Shawn Fain will update us on the latest from the bargaining table, and what we can do to support these workers and their families.

Joining us will be U.S. Representative Rashida Tlaib and WFP National Director Maurice Mitchell to share their stories of solidarity and why the struggle for a fair contract matters for all of us.

So Peter Willis, join us and UAW President Shawn Fain, U.S. Representative Rashida Tlaib, WFP National Director Maurice Mitchell, and more movement leaders from around the country this Sunday, September 10th at 7pm ET.

When we organize, we win!

The team at Our Revolution

body:
| Peter, just hours after launching my campaign for U.S. Senate, I spoke with Lawrence O’Donnell on MSNBC to talk about why I’m running to defeat Sen. Rick Scott and flip Florida blue. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/69526776/426411484/-2064700167?amount=5&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250,500&refcode=UTS_20230910_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRkZWYxYzllLTE0NTAtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZTFiYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Kd4HxCBUKfQVBc6uMxUg1qNjX-JUTcfGh65atR3eP5c=) Rick Scott has failed us in Florida. He’s proposed tax increases on working families, advocated for a nationwide abortion ban, and wrote the GOP plan to end Social Security and Medicare. He’s pushing our state backward – and we need to fight back.

**But there’s good news: Experts at _CNN, FiveThirtyEight, and Roll Call_ all agree that Florida is one of Democrats’ best opportunities to flip a Senate seat blue in 2024, and new polling shows this race is nearly TIED at 44% to 43%.**

We can defeat Rick Scott, Peter, but only with all hands on deck. **[Will you split a donation of $10 between Upset the Setup and my campaign to flip Florida blue and defend our Senate majority? clean_body: | Peter, just hours after launching my campaign for U.S. Senate, I spoke with Lawrence O’Donnell on MSNBC to talk about why I’m running to defeat Sen. Rick Scott and flip Florida blue. = Rick Scott has failed us in Florida. He’s proposed tax increases on working families, advocated for a nationwide abortion ban, and wrote the GOP plan to end Social Security and Medicare. He’s pushing our state backward – and we need to fight back. But there’s good news: Experts at CNN, FiveThirtyEight, and Roll Call all agree that Florida is one of Democrats’ best opportunities to flip a Senate seat blue in 2024, and new polling shows this race is nearly TIED at 44% to 43%. We can defeat Rick Scott, Peter, but only with all hands on deck. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Debbie Mucarsel-Powell and Upset the Setup will go through immediately: | = = = = = = Thank you for joining me in this fight. On top of that? Pundits and political experts agree that Texas is one of the most flippable Senate seats this year.

name: Hilary Franz
subject: What sets me apart
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Hilary Franz (D)
body:
I am a mother and caretaker who has successfully made a career in a male-dominated field as an environmental and conservation lawyer.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69527289/426413387/-165497492?refcode=BLU-HFFG-20230910-Z-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDA1NzQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTMzNmMwYjYtMTY1MC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0DiaTKxN4o9ysO8DmoIgfZQjFoxNAhoJB4WJaeGfCSo=)
---
| Peter,

Here's what sets me apart: **I am a mother and caretaker who has successfully made a career in a male-dominated field as an environmental and conservation lawyer.**
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69527290/426413388/-165497492?refcode=BLU-HFFG-20230910-Z-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDA1NzQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTMzNmMwYjYtMTY1MC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0DiaTKxN4o9ysO8DmoIgfZQjFoxNAhoJB4WJaeGfCSo=)
Balancing my roles on my journey as commissioner of public lands has taught me to be innovative when solving problems.

I know that when we work to solve our problems hand in hand, we can create solutions like never before.

I did it when we used Washington's Department of Natural Resources to build affordable housing on public land for the first time ever. Now, I'm ready to continue doing it as Washington's next Governor.

**I've spent the last seven years on the ground working to understand our communities' needs and how to deliver.** I've seen communities big and small, rural and urban, struggling with the same things – housing affordability, rising costs, the impacts of climate change, and a lack of mental health care. But, Peter, to get to the Governor's office, I need your help. [_**We have a reporting deadline at the end of every month in Washington, and I need your help to kick off September on the right foot. Can I count on you to contribute $25 or whatever you can afford today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69527291/426413389/-165497492?refcode=BLU-HFFG-20230910-Z-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDA1NzQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTMzNmMwYjYtMTY1MC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0DiaTKxN4o9ysO8DmoIgfZQjFoxNAhoJB4WJaeGfCSo=)

name: Team Biden-Harris
subject: 5 dollars could make you a winner
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
This contest ends in just 5 days! If you want a chance to enter and win you should rush in donations as soon as you can! | | |
---
Hey, Peter -- did you see our last email about our contest? We extended the deadline to give folks like you a chance to enter. name: Dick Durbin
subject: A cleaner environment can’t wait (sign on)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
Support the Plastic Pellet Free Waters Act.
#
Peter,
Every year, millions of tons of plastic pellet pollution finds its way into our rivers, lakes, and oceans, damaging our environment and irreparably harming ecosystems across the country.
**[Add your name now to support my efforts to stop plastic pollution in our waterways>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69527468/426414030/801423420?refcode=dd_em_230910_1&ms=dd_em_230910_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjFhZDRlNS0xYTUwLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2cpty4iSglt__FR9xSt3SBgWOX6LlwxGX1IPY5EIMCE=&emci=84ded994-ae4d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=ab1ad4e5-1a50-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&ceid=2727974)**
Plastic pollution in our waterways is an urgent problem in need of an urgent solution. Preserving the health of our planet isn’t an option,**it’s a must.** That’s why I introduced the _Plastic Pellet Free Waters Act_ , an initiative that will require the U.S. EPA to prevent the release of plastic into waterways from facilities that use or transport plastic pellets.
Here in our region, significant plastic pollution has been recorded at all five of the Great Lakes. More than 250,000 tons of plastic pellets are estimated to make their way to our oceans on an annual basis. This is not a political issue, and it’s certainly not something we can afford to ignore.
Our environment isn’t just a beautiful backdrop for our busy lives. It’s the air we breathe and the water we drink. It’s a precious resource that sustains us and all life on Earth. But it's also under threat of irrevocable damage from pollution, the climate crisis, and other human-caused harm.
I’m working alongside the Democratic Senate majority to stop pollution, protect our environment, and respond to the climate crisis before it’s too late. Meanwhile, a GOP presidential candidate is calling the climate crisis a hoax while Republicans in Congress try to block meaningful progress.
****[Can I count on your support as I work to clean up our polluted waterways, conserve our environment, and respond to the climate crisis? clean_body: Support the Plastic Pellet Free Waters Act. Peter, Every year, millions of tons of plastic pellet pollution finds its way into our rivers, lakes, and oceans, damaging our environment and irreparably harming ecosystems across the country. Plastic pollution in our waterways is an urgent problem in need of an urgent solution. Preserving the health of our planet isn’t an option,it’s a must. That’s why I introduced the Plastic Pellet Free Waters Act , an initiative that will require the U.S. EPA to prevent the release of plastic into waterways from facilities that use or transport plastic pellets. Here in our region, significant plastic pollution has been recorded at all five of the Great Lakes. More than 250,000 tons of plastic pellets are estimated to make their way to our oceans on an annual basis. This is not a political issue, and it’s certainly not something we can afford to ignore. Our environment isn’t just a beautiful backdrop for our busy lives. It’s the air we breathe and the water we drink. It’s a precious resource that sustains us and all life on Earth. But it's also under threat of irrevocable damage from pollution, the climate crisis, and other human-caused harm. I’m working alongside the Democratic Senate majority to stop pollution, protect our environment, and respond to the climate crisis before it’s too late. Meanwhile, a GOP presidential candidate is calling the climate crisis a hoax while Republicans in Congress try to block meaningful progress. ** Together, we can save our planet. Our children and grandchildren are counting on us to do it. My best, Dick Durbin **** Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin

name: Jacky Rosen via Zak for Congress
subject: Can I be honest with you?

body:
#
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/23-rosen-split?amount=10?source=em230910-zm-jr-split-90do&refcode2=421_8507_1RhFex&akid=421%2E8507%2E1RhFex)

Friend, I'm about to ask you to donate to my Senate reelection campaign. _Can I explain why?_
* Did you know that CNN ranked me as one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection?

* Or that political experts predict our race in Nevada will likely decide Senate control?

* Or that recent polling shows me 2 points down?

If all of that wasn't enough, Mitch McConnell's hand-picked candidate immediately out-raised me within the first week of launching his campaign to defeat me – _**and now I'm on track to fall short of my crucial $150,000 mid-month goal.**_

**I urgently need your grassroots support if I'm going to fight back and protect this seat.** [_So please: Will you donate $10 or more by midnight – split between my campaign and Zak Malamed's – so we can hit our mid-month goal, keep Nevada blue, and defend the Senate for Democrats?_](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/23-rosen-split?amount=10?source=em230910-zm-jr-split-90do&refcode2=421_8507_1RhFex&akid=421%2E8507%2E1RhFex)

body:
“I’m busy working on our economy.”
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00164N4jXoWESkMYo3jsMm3wGNfHj_tx0GE2Wvz1syrEqGL22q-MjG4dW9quPXIQV-Pw5hPhq0OUdRbYJm0BZFlGqR0fSW1Hb7XanAcaA5aAd-8CiEC3xjn2TqaM3_rFKODoS89hDiSZmnq3ie_vY50DA==&c=8sFxpBgBwKdx4oPrLDOrzpW4XBhsLRcIo_0jHc7HtUBWX0q_-g6eyQ==&ch=IKol4NIrwjvFMYPblE5ihXge0IWsMGmpWjfrSWFTRd5BAoTplbWM8Q==)
---
| Peter,
---
An incredible test of politicians these days is whether they're willing to admit how much the Big Government spending on radical agendas has wrecked our economy.
While 60% of Americans are living paycheck to paycheck, Jacky Rosen is still proud that she helped pass the Inflation Expansion Act despite its trillions of dollars in government spending on a Radical Green New Energy agenda.
---
[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00164N4jXoWESkMYo3jsMm3wGNfHj_tx0GE2Wvz1syrEqGL22q-MjG4db_Vdanx9I5F_zTNTF4jNvSXru3kCo14BW1LTB86hs_iiWgF5DMyZe2ytktChX4tpEVzUZE7cAInYdBP0feRuM4BOc54WLnk7_G0QGtFA1H1FhmcrooRcOSRhKgoi1ZPzzwsQ8D4emI94vRQWamYxVPISrymAkiNfc6SfcsukUtTQhby8EWsrZ8=&c=8sFxpBgBwKdx4oPrLDOrzpW4XBhsLRcIo_0jHc7HtUBWX0q_-g6eyQ==&ch=IKol4NIrwjvFMYPblE5ihXge0IWsMGmpWjfrSWFTRd5BAoTplbWM8Q==)
---
The Radical Left and Biden Admin's war on energy have driven up gas prices and utility bills, but Jacky is tone deaf to how Nevadans feel about it.

---
[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00164N4jXoWESkMYo3jsMm3wGNfHj_tx0GE2Wvz1syrEqGL22q-MjG4db_Vdanx9I5F_zTNTF4jNvSXru3kCo14BW1LTB86hs_iiWgF5DMyZe2ytktChX4tpEVzUZE7cAInYdBP0feRuM4BOc54WLnk7_G0QGtFA1H1FhmcrooRcOSRhKgoi1ZPzzwsQ8D4emI94vRQWamYxVPISrymAkiNfc6SfcsukUtTQhby8EWsrZ8=&c=8sFxpBgBwKdx4oPrLDOrzpW4XBhsLRcIo_0jHc7HtUBWX0q_-g6eyQ==&ch=IKol4NIrwjvFMYPblE5ihXge0IWsMGmpWjfrSWFTRd5BAoTplbWM8Q==)
---
During President Trump's first term, our nation reached energy independence for the first time in almost 40 years. Now our petroleum reserves are dangerously low and we've become dependent on foreign oil while an unrealistic transition to 'clean energy' is worsening our economic struggle.
Jacky says the "GOP field focuses on promoting election lies" while she's "busy working on jobs, working on our economy." Could the woman be more out of touch?

---
[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00164N4jXoWESkMYo3jsMm3wGNfHj_tx0GE2Wvz1syrEqGL22q-MjG4db_Vdanx9I5F_zTNTF4jNvSXru3kCo14BW1LTB86hs_iiWgF5DMyZe2ytktChX4tpEVzUZE7cAInYdBP0feRuM4BOc54WLnk7_G0QGtFA1H1FhmcrooRcOSRhKgoi1ZPzzwsQ8D4emI94vRQWamYxVPISrymAkiNfc6SfcsukUtTQhby8EWsrZ8=&c=8sFxpBgBwKdx4oPrLDOrzpW4XBhsLRcIo_0jHc7HtUBWX0q_-g6eyQ==&ch=IKol4NIrwjvFMYPblE5ihXge0IWsMGmpWjfrSWFTRd5BAoTplbWM8Q==)
---
Perhaps Jacky was talking about her own job security. Peter,more and more are realizing that the Radical Left and globalists' goals of Net Zero equate to a wealth transfer from you to the government and corporations - and I hope you're among us!
Politicians like Jacky have to keep telling the same lies because they have no other option, and their only hope is that their belief that Americans are blind and stupid is true.

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature Needed: Dangerous pesticides are pushing pollinators closer to extinction
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1976451?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **URGENT ACTION NEEDED: Wild bees and other critical pollinators are being driven toward extinction in large part by DANGEROUS PESTICIDES called neonics!** We have already **lost 89% of the American bumblebee population** in the last 20 years. These and other vulnerable pollinators help keep our ecosystems healthy and are essential for 1 out of 3 bites of food. But toxic pesticides called neonics, the most widely used insecticides in the world, are poisoning the pollen and nectar bees rely on and **_driving many of these beloved pollinators closer to extinction._ [Friend, please take action now to help BAN these bee-killing pesticides before it’s too late >>](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1976452?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** | [SIGN THE PETITION NOW](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1976453?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
The science linking neonics to the decline in bees and other pollinators is clear. That’s why the European Union has already banned the worst neonics -- **but the EPA continues to prioritize pesticide industry profits above the health of our planet. **
Over **180,000 species of plants need pollinators to survive** , and we rely on them for **75% of our most nutritious food crops** like fruits, veggies, and nuts. Without bees and other pollinators, there could be devastating consequences for our ecosystems. [**Will you help protect our planet by adding your name right away to STOP the use of harmful neonics?**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1976454?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[SIGN THE PETITION NOW](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1976453?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Thanks for taking urgent action,
Friends of the Earth**
|

body:

| [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/52554?t=6&akid=10388%2E878179%2EpW0aOj) **Listen, President Biden has been an INCREDIBLE President and defender of our democracy.** [**So you’ve been personally selected to sign our letter thanking President Biden for fighting for the American people! Please, we need 10,000 signatures by midnight to demonstrate massive support! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/52554?t=7&akid=10388%2E878179%2EpW0aOj) | [Donate $3 to sign the letter now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/52554?t=8&akid=10388%2E878179%2EpW0aOj)

TO: President Biden
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: Thank you. **Dear President Biden,**

**_I’m so thankful for everything you’ve done as President!_**

Over the last two and a half years, you’ve fought TIRELESSLY for the American people — defending abortion rights, confirming an incredible Supreme Court Justice, saving Social Security from GOP cuts, and creating millions of jobs.

**I know standing up to MAGA Republican attacks isn’t easy, especially now that Donald Trump is running for President again.**

So as your reelection race kicks into high gear, I wanted to show my support and thank you for being such an amazing leader for our country! [**I hope you know that there are MILLIONS of us across the nation who stand with you. That’s why I’m signing this letter and chipping in $3 to Voter Protection Project to thank you and to keep electing incredible Democrats up and down the ballot »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/52554?t=9&akid=10388%2E878179%2EpW0aOj) | [Donate $3 to sign now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/52554?t=10&akid=10388%2E878179%2EpW0aOj)

name: Hung Cao
subject: Fire Tim Kaine
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hung Cao for Virginia
body:
| | | [](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=a68f9ca7b8fb4400b7bbda65acc1a518&_e=CtBdDafJfLdahXNaC1jgKSqVaJ1LMotBEjlxZH4aQ-ChGsWh9l2IgYeFUJ5lsr9MFovgenpXcuI7qd0WgXqWiQcBtSIj77erNNBa2iDO02E_lqK_Rx6Wxd91oirgY8GRJhGtbuOjqIOsuIeRwVIaCaDabxaoeEZIbrXyJD7uwN0ocfmWd51J8xZgaSufrpk3OJ7-tLJbhnr8hxg4Ed4xw-Qu75ZusEuy11j7W4Qw-C9afR-HnnjPqWEku52IDHw4-fPFdkoHwc_wkwQDLeK7qZ_dwrkL8oGCuJDa7qwrV5crQBwtBNJQ4fKuMAKoxacHbgwCecx_3AsbMbQoVSlaeHAzk7zQSeYcFtKD_yZJT-09Cztz2-lyTJtmh23WeLB7b9s4ZSgKvuGOYSwo0FuezA%3D%3D)
---
Friend, Tim Kaine said that Donald Trump should be disqualified from the election. Let’s get to the heart of this matter. It doesn’t matter whether or not you like Donald Trump. This has much deeper implications. Disqualifying a candidate because the opposite side concocts a bunch of charges opens up Pandora’s box where we can indict a political opponent and keep them from running for office. I have seen this in third world countries around the globe. It never ends well. This is why, regardless of who is in the Oval Office, we need a strong legislative branch for checks and balances. We need fighters who will fight for us, not career politicians protecting the Washington DC machine. **[It’s time for Virginia to have a Senator who will fight for us with the same values of God, family, and country.](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=a68f9ca7b8fb4400b7bbda65acc1a518&_e=CtBdDafJfLdahXNaC1jgKSqVaJ1LMotBEjlxZH4aQ-ChGsWh9l2IgYeFUJ5lsr9MFovgenpXcuI7qd0WgXqWiQcBtSIj77erNNBa2iDO02E_lqK_Rx6Wxd91oirgY8GRJhGtbuOjqIOsuIeRwVIaCaDabxaoeEZIbrXyJD7uwN0ocfmWd51J8xZgaSufrpk3OJ7-tLJbhnr8hxg4Ed4xw-Qu75ZusEuy11j7W4Qw-C9afR-HnnjPqWEku52IDHw4KdKx2yphs_eDJBNEwRXXsdNo6qcEAew90rXPmUoPJ8Z5pvliBJMuwhz9GX4tl0AIWL7UZ5qxRCsNU9H07pZrhmVT5I2Cqlb3qVUx_KTmSZ3AJVOTcgQm2hnpTBfBKeJ2-qhS0Ale6xpnVy1chterPA%3D%3D)** I will never stop fighting for us, because I know what it’s like to wake up one day without a country or a flag to stand over. That will NEVER happen on my watch.

name: Katie Porter
subject: Elizabeth Warren's advice to me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
I confided in Elizabeth when I was struggling to see how I could make a difference.

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=55%2E4032634%2EF-Ta34)
---
Hey there, it's Katie Porter. You may know me as the woman who brings props (like a whiteboard!) to Congressional Hearings to help hold the powerful accountable. But when I first got to Washington in 2019, my mentor and former law professor — Senator Elizabeth Warren — called me to ask how things were going, and I shared that I was struggling to see how I could make a difference and live up to the promise I had made to voters to shake up Washington. About a month later, Elizabeth called again. But this time, I had a couple of Congressional hearings under my belt, and I had found ways to hold the CEO of Equifax and the CEO of Wells Fargo accountable. I had asked the tough questions and got real answers for the American people. The Wells Fargo CEO even resigned shortly after the hearing. **Elizabeth said to me, “you found your voice. Don’t ever stop using it.”** **[Now, I’m running for the U.S. Senate so I can continue using my voice to stand up for working people, stop corruption, and continue working with Elizabeth to make our government work for working people. Can you support this fight by making a contribution that will be split between our two campaigns?](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/452?t=8&akid=55%2E4032634%2EF-Ta34)**

---
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_ |

clean_body: I confided in Elizabeth when I was struggling to see how I could make a difference. | | | Hey there, it's Katie Porter. You may know me as the woman who brings props (like a whiteboard!) to Congressional Hearings to help hold the powerful accountable. But when I first got to Washington in 2019, my mentor and former law professor — Senator Elizabeth Warren — called me to ask how things were going, and I shared that I was struggling to see how I could make a difference and live up to the promise I had made to voters to shake up Washington. About a month later, Elizabeth called again. But this time, I had a couple of Congressional hearings under my belt, and I had found ways to hold the CEO of Equifax and the CEO of Wells Fargo accountable. I had asked the tough questions and got real answers for the American people. The Wells Fargo CEO even resigned shortly after the hearing. Elizabeth said to me, “you found your voice. Don’t ever stop using it.” If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | | | | | | | Look, my race is highly competitive. disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hung Cao for Virginia
body:
| | | [](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=d6c556d96ae54b49a6db21615c2feafb&_e=LsM8PKyA8jD1shUfnW4JoDaUqALgfzvbYLLWxfS5GG3Iepk0q8nRgQn3hstRO1lTM1HnhWSGidL5LC0_06N0bq9s47t8N4-FjXbvb_FhHbS_rShvEilO-AIOpNDh3c3FelO7iKbkt50u9kSWB56rFIvFmaAwQz3mW3JpQ7wqz87VKeFHLxQ92cbJwNh-ZkCvTtFHwuufNEO-ebgYztR9IEnmxjbNZiw3-uWtc__lkYA-wYIJbz17tE-Kdu47wTTrPyhfUsUDiARE2cX_yi3a66uZkZdbln3kUrS-Bb1AJhsfcz-wuhIkwLmhAiMoH_VO0NISDqSzNPWHmUyIrjBycdxXnHwMU7pxtPKncNWe_kA%3D)
---
Peter, When my family first escaped to America in 1975 from Communist Vietnam, the average price of a house was just $39,300.

Now, it’s $416,100.

**A lot has changed has changed in America since I got here,Peter. **

Out of control spending and irresponsible decision making by out-of-touch politicians have made opportunities like my family found here scarcer than they should be in the greatest country on Earth.

**As the Left has sunk heir claws into our nation, I’ve watched them try to destroy the American Dream bit by bit.**

_I’m not about to let them._
---
[**DEFEND THE AMERICAN DREAM**](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=d6c556d96ae54b49a6db21615c2feafb&_e=LsM8PKyA8jD1shUfnW4JoDaUqALgfzvbYLLWxfS5GG3Iepk0q8nRgQn3hstRO1lTM1HnhWSGidL5LC0_06N0bq9s47t8N4-FjXbvb_FhHbS_rShvEilO-AIOpNDh3c3FelO7iKbkt50u9kSWB56rFIvFmaAwQz3mW3JpQ7wqz87VKeFHLxQ92cbJwNh-ZkCv6joB6wzzdSgOmn-GZuaaSsfSDXBCH5IsIDL6SIFLBNRDN1T_DSyhhnO__OBZs0j7yAvrfbqH6G41ub3-zp8RenfdkkKx7yoH0OxIu1rS4k76E-dh_LYRMqmdAWSeYHZ-TSPA2lW56QY3le6CnJ8YQZP0WP5A1zHz1W6nXqm-VUM%3D)
---
I’m living proof that America is the land of opportunity.

My family escaped communism with little besides the clothes on our backs.

I stepped onto American soil without speaking a word of English.

But by the time I graduated high school, I had earned a spot at the U.S. Naval Academy.

I spent the next 25 years of my life fighting some of the most dangerous terrorists on Earth.

It wasn’t easy. But I did it because after all that America gave to me, I had to dedicate my life to paying it back.

**I’m honored to be a part of the great American Dream. But my own success isn’t enough: I won’t rest until EVERY family in our great country has the same opportunity that I did.**

**[I can’t defend our American Dream alone. Please, join me today to take it back from out of touch politicians and pay it forward to hardworking patriots.](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=d6c556d96ae54b49a6db21615c2feafb&_e=LsM8PKyA8jD1shUfnW4JoDaUqALgfzvbYLLWxfS5GG3Iepk0q8nRgQn3hstRO1lTM1HnhWSGidL5LC0_06N0bq9s47t8N4-FjXbvb_FhHbS_rShvEilO-AIOpNDh3c3FelO7iKbkt50u9kSWB56rFIvFmaAwQz3mW3JpQ7wqz87VKeFHLxQ92cbJwNh-ZkCvqHkSMn4ALa_OuiF9VC9MSVBT1SaXuDhmJdCsRwEpwl_ZLMXeq_KV9lMdoM1i5a1yAXJe96a9EiweVRsxIPIhU6meXKmg-xxKOMY_sznDpoROqRL5WkkK7r_qrgj5sUAt8FGtit_tP-7Wf0wIHTeRakMgOPu3YLXFPIWR9591LF4%3D)**
---
[**JOIN OUR TEAM**](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=d6c556d96ae54b49a6db21615c2feafb&_e=LsM8PKyA8jD1shUfnW4JoDaUqALgfzvbYLLWxfS5GG3Iepk0q8nRgQn3hstRO1lTM1HnhWSGidL5LC0_06N0bq9s47t8N4-FjXbvb_FhHbS_rShvEilO-AIOpNDh3c3FelO7iKbkt50u9kSWB56rFIvFmaAwQz3mW3JpQ7wqz87VKeFHLxQ92cbJwNh-ZkCvNCr2R67d_dYZop_wh2k8xGcosDMOpTjip6LnTQEWzgqu5Is4ZmfykqfL-mFtbQUr775yxAiGJ_0EP-RgQ7HjpH2iT0kkt-7Gs4fNble0vsYODPRWPCIMXc3OTSry3XfxVVEFoLc-U0p6k9YFzrPAIWxJl9WY1PB7jlzWA4VYhp8%3D)

clean_body: | | | Peter, When my family first escaped to America in 1975 from Communist Vietnam, the average price of a house was just $39,300. Now, it’s $416,100. A lot has changed has changed in America since I got here,Peter. Out of control spending and irresponsible decision making by out-of-touch politicians have made opportunities like my family found here scarcer than they should be in the greatest country on Earth. As the Left has sunk heir claws into our nation, I’ve watched them try to destroy the American Dream bit by bit. I’m not about to let them. I’m living proof that America is the land of opportunity. My family escaped communism with little besides the clothes on our backs. I stepped onto American soil without speaking a word of English. But by the time I graduated high school, I had earned a spot at the U.S. Naval Academy. I spent the next 25 years of my life fighting some of the most dangerous terrorists on Earth. It wasn’t easy. But I did it because after all that America gave to me, I had to dedicate my life to paying it back. I’m honored to be a part of the great American Dream. But my own success isn’t enough: I won’t rest until EVERY family in our great country has the same opportunity that I did. In Liberty, CAPT Hung Cao USN (RET) Please mail checks made out to "Hung Cao for Virginia" to this address: PO Box 652 Purcellville VA 20134 | | Paid for by Hung Cao for Virginia | | Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
