body:
Donald Trump and his MAGA allies have plans to take unprecedented control over the federal government if he returns to the White House – they’re calling this power-grab “Project 2025.” | | |
---
| | | **NYT:_Trump and Allies Forge Plans to Increase Presidential Power in 2025_**
---
**🚨Republicans are endangering our democracy🚨**
**Donald Trump and his MAGA allies have plans to take unprecedented control over the federal government if he returns to the White House – they’re calling this power-grab _“Project 2025.”_**
Here’s what they’re planning:
* **Building unilateral power.** Vital decisions around health care, public education, environmental protection, and more, could be made without _any_ independent oversight.
* **Cutting vital funding.** Republicans want to give the president powers to deny funding to programs that don’t align with the GOP’s priorities.
* **Stocking the government with Trump allies.** They’re set on stripping employment protections from dedicated civil servants, making it easier to replace them if they disagree with Republicans’ far-right platform.

This corrupt MAGA plot _demands_ our attention because it has the potential to reshape the entire government, affecting _every_ American in _every_ state. **It’s _dangerous_.**

For years, I’ve worked to ensure that our elections are free, fair, and efficient. As Auditor General, I worked with the Pennsylvania Department of State to improve the accuracy of the voter registration process to better verify that voter records are up-to-date.
And as the Auditor General who has *actually* conducted audits before – I knew when some folks on the right wanted to conduct their sham “audits” of the 2020 election, that it was just to stir the pot of extremists.
I could tell that their claims of voter fraud and purging voter rolls were all about undermining the election, not about preserving its integrity.
As your next Attorney General, I will protect voting rights and make sure attempts to disenfranchise the will of the people are fought against every step of the way – **but I can’t win this critically important election without the support of this grassroots team.**
[_**Please, will you pitch in any amount right now to support my campaign for Attorney General? Make no mistake: As Pennsylvania’s Attorney General, I’ll always stand up for free, fair, and safe elections – and fight back against efforts that make it harder for you to cast your ballot. Voters ought to choose their politicians – not the other way around. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | = | = | | | = | = | | | = | = For years, I’ve worked to ensure that our elections are free, fair, and efficient. As Auditor General, I worked with the Pennsylvania Department of State to improve the accuracy of the voter registration process to better verify that voter records are up-to-date. And as the Auditor General who has actually conducted audits before – I knew when some folks on the right wanted to conduct their sham “audits” of the 2020 election, that it was just to stir the pot of extremists. I could tell that their claims of voter fraud and purging voter rolls were all about undermining the election, not about preserving its integrity. Friend, America is in the midst of a gun violence epidemic. There have been nearly 500 mass shootings in 2023 _alone_. Our children and communities are living in fear of gun assailants and violence every day. **But it doesn't have to be this way.**
There are simple gun safety reforms that _we know_ will curb gun violence and make our communities safer. The vast majority of Americans support basic reforms like expanded background checks.
Gun safety legislation shouldn't be a partisan issue. It's about protecting communities and preventing senseless deaths. But the far-right gun lobby is spending MILLIONS each year to stop common sense legislation from becoming the law of the land. And each year, the cycle of mass shooting and violence continues.
That's why Democrats are fighting to finally make a change and pass universal background checks! **This would be a major step forward to a safer future — and we're counting on grassroots activists like you to join these Democratic leaders in standing up to the gun lobby.[_Please, will you add your name before midnight tonight to show your support for expanded background checks?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69528833/426418770/673600542?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=43614&ask=10&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk4419-su-nd&refcode=jtk4419-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Yjk5N2MxNC0yNjUwLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Neh4OsBP1WHyxDwPmV_3leLJGgP1XYRDELAY81pQ9Qg=&emci=267feb7a-654e-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&emdi=4b997c14-2650-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&ceid=7659029)**

Team, this is HUGE: According to a recent poll, **53% of Americans say they _definitely won’t_ vote for Trump for president next year.**

But that's almost IDENTICAL to the number of Americans who voted against Trump in 2016 and 2020 -- which means next year's election could be _**razor-close!**_

If this poll is accurate, we need to lock in as many Democratic votes as possible. We need 51 more people in Pennsylvania to let us know by midnight that they'll NEVER consider voting for Trump. **So please, sign our urgent petition now to confirm you DEFINITELY WON’T vote for Donald Trump next year:**

**Sign on to confirm you DEFINITELY WON'T vote for Trump >>**

name: LucasKunce.com
subject: Can you take a moment today to fill out this quick survey, Peter?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
We can’t underscore enough how valuable your feedback is to our grassroots campaign.
#
Hey Peter, can you take a moment today to **[fill out this quick survey?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/survey/lk-email-20230910-1-survey?t=1&akid=3727%2E614464%2Et7acfR)**
**[TAKE THE SURVEY »](https://act.lucaskunce.com/survey/lk-email-20230910-1-survey?t=2&akid=3727%2E614464%2Et7acfR)**
Lucas Kunce is running for U.S. Senate because he’s on a mission to fundamentally change who calls the shots in our country.
Unlike Missouri’s current U.S. Senator Josh Hawley, Lucas isn’t taking cues from the corrupt mega-donors and corporate elites who’ve spent decades tearing our country up. He’s relying on input from real voters like you to drive our campaign’s message and priorities at every step of the way — **and that’s why we’re reaching out to you today.**
**[Will you take just a few moments to fill out our short priorities survey and share your thoughts with Lucas about the issues on your mind this year, our campaign, and what you think we need to accomplish before November 2024?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/survey/lk-email-20230910-1-survey?t=3&akid=3727%2E614464%2Et7acfR)**
**[TAKE THE SURVEY »](https://act.lucaskunce.com/survey/lk-email-20230910-1-survey?t=4&akid=3727%2E614464%2Et7acfR)**
Lucas doesn’t have a network of shady mega-donors or corporate elites backing up his campaign — and he doesn’t want them. He’s committed to building this movement the right way, completely powered by everyday people like you, because those are the only folks he wants to serve in the U.S. Senate.
Part of that means our campaign won’t accept ANY corporate PAC money. But it also means we need input from real people like you to guide our strategy and priorities throughout this campaign. **So Peter:**
**[Can you take just a minute or two to share your priorities and thoughts with Lucas in this quick survey? Your feedback is invaluable as we build out this campaign to flip Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/survey/lk-email-20230910-1-survey?t=5&akid=3727%2E614464%2Et7acfR)**
**[TAKE THE SURVEY »](https://act.lucaskunce.com/survey/lk-email-20230910-1-survey?t=6&akid=3727%2E614464%2Et7acfR)**
Thank you so much,
Team Lucas Kunce

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20230910-3727-footer&t=7&refcode2=3727_614464_t7acfR&akid=3727%2E614464%2Et7acfR)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/lucaskuncemo/) | [](https://twitter.com/lucaskuncemo) | [](https://www.instagram.com/lucaskuncemo/)
Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.lucaskunce.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=3727%2E614464%2Et7acfR). Mail us: PO BOX 1240 Independence, MO 64050.

Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

I'm one of Wendy's campaign managers, and I am forwarding this email she sent you. She hopes you'll take a second to read this and chip in today to help build up the Team Wendy Momentum.

> \-------------------_Forwarded Message_ \-------------------
>
> **Subject:** Fwd: quick thought...
> **From:** Wendy's iPhone
> **Date:** Fri, Sep 8, 2023, at 3:34 PM
>
>
>> Hey guys, it's Wendy.
>
> Dropping a quick note for you. But first, I'll cut straight to the chase: **_[can you donate anything to my grassroots campaign? I launched one month ago and could really use your support.](http://links.davisforin.com/u/click?_t=3e9e6097e33749f890adf7e8c9b24a4e&_m=97924047c2894e43b7a0a86f48b1f528&_e=Hd3EzhR4PYnrKCIhjoZRh7YVpsL2AZJmPVcYEWFMBj9UemCuka56KtBcGKcJT4dmwDx8LQZeyul345PQpL5CNpzSnOZPb-wHGCxeQTakWgzx1CMRmCZoFY_e4SoQ0xfxPYHnm-RnOn0H9dDH7KGSQguijXvvBci_KbMiDv51kFhdGhwotflmFSQ5k9qxR-ISPFFUF0qZXGY3pa1i7g8qejiKT1Fyq5RPGeg7BG7odZApyh2ypHZ3843INmEupSlrl7YelcWE7zrtDbCklMVtXYMahIxj_TxwYXk7Fv_4Xdz93_gnl1meBETQMNb9furfMIhetsGP-xQxSefIs_IVOMeBg2y68QWmlFyx7zkur66X0UZ89atLRytxxeRy5o_UT8MZqW8WB0JlL3xWXWS4HlYY2g94O_j3cBtlZ6tCekqz7-0_jnVv9XWMGIAOPpG3f4Q2oxKgg_Fc7uPFRxnJ1PLKg-PbgKBbv6wVfWAITjU0kNG2B6-hQTz49TwwjA8Zsk_EXwaiY2VQ0EEAK5ZWEpXgTqJWAglCuSECT_hfyxk%3D)_**
>
> I wanted to ask you to pitch in and be one of my **[day 1 supporters](http://links.davisforin.com/u/click?_t=3e9e6097e33749f890adf7e8c9b24a4e&_m=97924047c2894e43b7a0a86f48b1f528&_e=Hd3EzhR4PYnrKCIhjoZRh7YVpsL2AZJmPVcYEWFMBj9UemCuka56KtBcGKcJT4dmwDx8LQZeyul345PQpL5CNpzSnOZPb-wHGCxeQTakWgzx1CMRmCZoFY_e4SoQ0xfxPYHnm-RnOn0H9dDH7KGSQguijXvvBci_KbMiDv51kFhdGhwotflmFSQ5k9qxR-ISPFFUF0qZXGY3pa1i7g8qejiKT1Fyq5RPGeg7BG7odZApyh2ypHZ3843INmEupSlrl7YelcWE7zrtDbCklMVtXYMahIxj_TxwYXk7Fv_4Xdz93_gnl1meBETQMNb9furfMIhetsGP-xQxSefIs_IVOMeBg2y68QWmlFyx7zkur66X0UZ89atLRytxxeRy5o_UUkeid9CTaIjss_dUKsFEi0BD3tmicYdEvCK8Q33ccodOr3oVg4qvSC4PQ869qqqBSOp0AcFvG9cCLyRP0x8RtVAbHP-NK3vj28mM3CkTUuEJVQ7ZGlxQkkMJF885g-B8kEuIJoBh6Fu1HcTHRvW1O2e19-eDx8vamUq87ZYx3Eg%3D)** in this campaign. | Peter,

I wanted to reach out to you just before this midnight deadline. While we made great strides this month, we need one last surge of donations so my team and I can feel good about where we stand going into May.

Look, MAGA Republicans are angry that I haven’t backed down after getting booted from the House Intelligence Committee. Instead, I’ve been holding them accountable for their disgraceful attempts at glossing over the January 6th insurrection, fueling blatant anti-semitism, and destroying our democracy.

**That’s why now more than ever, we need to show them that we’re not backing down — and we refuse to let them try to single-handedly make a mockery of our Congress.**

Split a donation between me and Mark Takano of any amount you can so they know they don’t stand a chance at holding the House in 2024. Look, my new opponent has a long, socialist rap sheet she’s pitching to Liberal donors: | | ❌ ❌ ❌ ❌ ❌ ❌ ❌ | | She’s dangerous. She’s as woke as they come. And she wants to replace a strong, God-fearing Conservative (me!) with a die-hard socialist who toes the line for Democrats. But she has to get through us first. Thank you and God bless, Marsha Blackburn (R-TN) | | Contributions to the National Republican Senatorial Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.. | | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: Team Alsobrooks
subject: sorry to bother you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate
body:
|
---
[ ](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/2092?t=1&akid=450%2E52803%2ETmubd5)

| | Hey Peter, sorry to bug you during the weekend, but I’ll try to keep this short. I’ve been keeping an eye on our ActBlue numbers over the last couple of days, and I’m worried we’re not getting the boost we need to start September on a high note. I figure that before I talk to Angela about it, I’d instead try reaching out to our grassroots supporters and see if we can’t turn things around before the end of the weekend. **[Can you chip in $25 before going about the rest of evening? It would mean the world to Angela to see a huge groundswell of support to start the week.](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/5623?t=10&amount=25&akid=450%2E52803%2ETmubd5)** | | | [Donate](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/5623?t=11&amount=25&akid=450%2E52803%2ETmubd5)
---
I know you get a lot of emails about why fundraising goals are so important, from getting the word out about Angela’s record and policies, to connecting with voters in every corner of Maryland.
But spending all my time at Alsobrooks HQ gives me a different perspective, so here’s how I think of these things:
_Every dollar we raise is maybe another phone call we can make, or another door we can knock on. It might be one more piece or mail or an extra yard sign. On its own, it might not seem like much._
But believe me, it is.
**[That’s why I’m taking a few minutes out of my Sunday night to ask for your help, Peter. Will you pitch in a few bucks so we can do the work reaching Maryland voters in their communities?](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/5623?t=12&amount=25&akid=450%2E52803%2ETmubd5)**
_If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._

name: Senate Republicans
subject: Biden's disastrous year in review:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Peter, Now that we’re well into 2023, we want to look at Joe Biden’s disastrous year in review so far:
* **Our border remains WIDE OPEN to drugs and criminals.**
* **Violent crime is intolerably high.**
* **“Bidenomics” has given us soaring prices and falling wages.**
* **More than half of Americans are living paycheck to paycheck.**

_And that’s just the beginning._

**Here’s the truth: America can’t afford one more minute of Joe Biden, let alone four more years. **

If we’re going to get our country back on track, we need strong Republican leadership at every level of government, and that means taking back the Senate.

**[Will you join us today to take back the Senate with a Republican majority that will help America get back on track?](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=697a8b87d300462fb3b00ff2d30c1b59&_e=_Vbl6yfiiCTdKAUklKRyv5CUZVSu3ykvEbNI9DL37XNfXG8jn9taDF_WaEif0_NHeXJWANF5Ny_3HD0Vhsmxr1mjb9B4t-C7gL5Twr2QP6GBdxBLHSOOtVrBov9uJ2TAL2SIt37BplihI8hk4CV6j8HJfoQyMZE6uxYw-74Lvg5GliaEh25IcjZVICfZ5TobiAAMP2ezjlGHgVLVsC0K3NZmsB_HH6D2Uc6dii62Zsl7zmRw6O_VIWBAcMM-JlfXeesNAzhTh_t4c-FH4sFQqacnTM9-CsAy9yMhOMycCOE3l3dZ1UKw-Zf3L3J1s0GS58kgb5A81z4w85sKxS5j0doUfWXF9MxQOezsUz6c5p_eRyGPw4cn5M4HgwZaVE6S)**

We wouldn’t be asking if we didn’t genuinely believe that this was the ONLY WAY to save America, Peter.

After four years of Joe Biden, our country is in shambles compared to where we were.

**It’s going to take serious Republican leadership to get us over this hurdle, and we NEED our majority back.**

clean_body: | | | Peter, Now that we’re well into 2023, we want to look at Joe Biden’s disastrous year in review so far: Our border remains WIDE OPEN to drugs and criminals. Violent crime is intolerably high. “Bidenomics” has given us soaring prices and falling wages. More than half of Americans are living paycheck to paycheck. And that’s just the beginning. Here’s the truth: America can’t afford one more minute of Joe Biden, let alone four more years. If we’re going to get our country back on track, we need strong Republican leadership at every level of government, and that means taking back the Senate. We wouldn’t be asking if we didn’t genuinely believe that this was the ONLY WAY to save America, Peter. After four years of Joe Biden, our country is in shambles compared to where we were. It’s going to take serious Republican leadership to get us over this hurdle, and we NEED our majority back. We’re not going to lie - if we don’t win in 2024, we’re worried about America’s future. Thank you, Senate Republicans | | | Team Rick Scott Featured Merchandise *Made in the USA Golf Balls and Joe Biden, the two things that seem to get themselves lost the most! Friend,
---
My grandfather, who was born in Cuauhtemoc, Mexico, earned his U.S. citizenship in World War 2 after receiving 2 purple hearts fighting Nazis in Bastogne. My mom, Rebecca Chavez, thought she would spend her whole life in a one-room hut with a dirt floor in Juarez, Mexico– but faith, hard work, and American opportunity allowed her to earn a prestigious job as a flight attendant during the glamorous peak of air travel in the 70s and 80s. My family fought tooth and nail for the American Dream so that future generations like me could have a better life, and I plan on making that up to them in full. My name is Gabe Evans. I fought for our country in the Middle East as a US Army officer flying Black Hawk helicopters, served my community as a police lieutenant, and fought wildfires with Colorado’s National Guard. **[I’m officially announcing my run for U.S. Congress and I’m humbly asking for your support.](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=ad374ffd0dbc49dbb7327865ce62106f&_e=pNWrvcjW1yuhUaJPLyo6-hZ15GQwGWeuiulD957nzycwftg3z0mb7gagZXc4fqURIUSujcidrZUaqLtNVJYjNOP5dB3ZV2seuP1ra9Hadzl1KjUCdNkXurbzUKg1upBNC2rpVS6BrEd7ZrQOakeTXp-KZzUS-Yh1Ohpwk53XaBbMxzcYqXomGVq27oBLm51FheNyJkkUWH6_jaXj_xG9VK7dSEMKVe6p-5pxpaFKKmui8pJ9q5fWDB0LVoAYGyRjlkdmqRgpmhzDREFdrwj-SfVQf-PoUwuB8RvhmUyA4CYXsEC8DeMSVP13S77fMR2l_D_WrjlehBUYKBG1vxY71FHAiXWOY88guJQoCxDCDE13gG37A8oIdfsobxJgBJSgrFkLoZ8Vr1HehCpx9h_HCSrHwuaorzQxNjWFgDUTcO3735IGAJdhVAQ0i6aNuePUe9y4ByAzeL55WDAI_yNFYHkUdrYHT-TKrnxGPqnorL0%3D)**
---
[**BECOME A FOUNDING DONOR**](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=ad374ffd0dbc49dbb7327865ce62106f&_e=pNWrvcjW1yuhUaJPLyo6-hZ15GQwGWeuiulD957nzycwftg3z0mb7gagZXc4fqURIUSujcidrZUaqLtNVJYjNOP5dB3ZV2seuP1ra9Hadzl1KjUCdNkXurbzUKg1upBNC2rpVS6BrEd7ZrQOakeTXp-KZzUS-Yh1Ohpwk53XaBbMxzcYqXomGVq27oBLm51FheNyJkkUWH6_jaXj_xG9VK7dSEMKVe6p-5pxpaFKKmui8pJ9q5fWDB0LVoAYGyRjlkdmqRgpmhzDREFdrwj-SfVQf-PoUwuB8RvhmUyA4CYXsEC8DeMSVP13S77fMR2l_D_WrjlehBUYKBG1vxY71F7kfof3lyvSsngxIzywLfpHp-WKpDOGjMTbXV64m7PQb_45ooZacR2x2AcQBB9228XwYac6Q9GM3DNiGqoxBtAdW2PA57WcUPQ_HubwA1M2jqJBVtm_9bubuDip9mZQkuTO6LVmdIBuq2CYHhr8US8%3D)
---
I’ve never faced anything more challenging in my 22 years of combined service as a cop and soldier. I’m drawing a line in the sand against radical Dems in Washington who are tearing our country apart. They’d rather see our once great cities burn and our borders crumble than EVER let a combat Vet and a cop in DC. I need to level with you. **Democrats know that our race could decide the balance of power in Congress. ** The Democrat Establishment will pour **MILLIONS** into my opponent’s war chest to crush our campaign. If I don’t get an overwhelming response to this email, I may be forced to call it quits before I can hit the ground running. **[So please, if you can make any contribution at all, can I count on you to be a founding donor to my Congressional race?](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=ad374ffd0dbc49dbb7327865ce62106f&_e=pNWrvcjW1yuhUaJPLyo6-hZ15GQwGWeuiulD957nzycwftg3z0mb7gagZXc4fqURIUSujcidrZUaqLtNVJYjNOP5dB3ZV2seuP1ra9Hadzl1KjUCdNkXurbzUKg1upBNC2rpVS6BrEd7ZrQOakeTXp-KZzUS-Yh1Ohpwk53XaBbMxzcYqXomGVq27oBLm51FheNyJkkUWH6_jaXj_xG9VK7dSEMKVe6p-5pxpaFKKmui8pJ9q5fWDB0LVoAYGyRjlkdmqRgpmhzDREFdrwj-SfVQf-PoUwuB8RvhmUyA4CYXsEC8DeMSVP13S77fMR2l_D_WrjlehBUYKBG1vxY71IMFOXEMiqGeERRSSfFtEwcQ5_NmA9Qitvee5tQ7aJzdYOvrZ8uyHPWn8VPKEr_zwlGb_EIQIJOhxA2LqjWm8AOR3S9CggNcSm2ZFf2x7pSHj1lnGhg1A6iEn80o96S9Fr723dCpr-iWL0zTev4-EvI%3D)**
---
[**BECOME A FOUNDING DONOR**](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=ad374ffd0dbc49dbb7327865ce62106f&_e=pNWrvcjW1yuhUaJPLyo6-hZ15GQwGWeuiulD957nzycwftg3z0mb7gagZXc4fqURIUSujcidrZUaqLtNVJYjNOP5dB3ZV2seuP1ra9Hadzl1KjUCdNkXurbzUKg1upBNC2rpVS6BrEd7ZrQOakeTXp-KZzUS-Yh1Ohpwk53XaBbMxzcYqXomGVq27oBLm51FheNyJkkUWH6_jaXj_xG9VK7dSEMKVe6p-5pxpaFKKmui8pJ9q5fWDB0LVoAYGyRjlkdmqRgpmhzDREFdrwj-SfVQf-PoUwuB8RvhmUyA4CYXsEC8DeMSVP13S77fMR2l_D_WrjlehBUYKBG1vxY71O-XLuY82KA3XnwFuadcsk6lI1rTZ2DLu7r_hK_Sedg-1qDY1tHcIdwz1VePlwEIVps0U5sLDF2uiZWRPJCs-U7B87wACchG1I46E9GzIKWIDEuyW2Tl28c8R_EV1sEU64EDTMYleTajMYdBCcbGDQs%3D)
---
If my time in the military and police taught me one thing, it's that leadership matters. And if there’s one thing that our country needs more of, it’s solid, unwavering leadership to restore the American Dream for everyone.
Restoring the American Dream for everyone is no easy task. But your help today will bring us one step closer to making that happen.
---
Thank you for your generosity,

Hey, Peter!
I wanted to quickly reach out today to thank you for signing my birthday card.
That little gesture really meant a lot to me and my family, and I want you to know how truly grateful I am.
It has been an honor to serve as your representative in DC and I wouldn’t be there if it weren’t for your support.
Our victory in 2022 was a major upset, to say the least, and even though Democrats are going to come at us with all they have in 2024, I know I can count on you to stand by me.
[Would you take a moment to sign up to be a Sustaining Member of Team Lawler in 2024? clean_body: | | | | You made the day great! Hey, Peter! I wanted to quickly reach out today to thank you for signing my birthday card. That little gesture really meant a lot to me and my family, and I want you to know how truly grateful I am. It has been an honor to serve as your representative in DC and I wouldn’t be there if it weren’t for your support. Our victory in 2022 was a major upset, to say the least, and even though Democrats are going to come at us with all they have in 2024, I know I can count on you to stand by me. | | | | | Thank you again for your kind birthday wishes. It’s a privilege to be your representative and I look forward to working alongside you for many years to come. | | Sincerely, Congressman Mike Lawler U.S. Representative NY-17 | | | | | Mike Lawler is a Republican running for reelection in New York’s 17th Congressional District. He is passionate about standing with law enforcement and making our communities more safe, protecting Social Security and Medicare, fixing our crumbling roads and bridges, and restoring the SALT deduction to lower taxes and make New York more affordable. | | USE THE ADDRESS BELOW TO CONTRIBUTE BY CHECK LAWLER FOR CONGRESS PO BOX 87 SOUTH SALEM, NY 10590 GET YOUR MIKE LAWLER, NO CUOMO MERCH No New Yorker wants to call our Tappan Zee Bridge the “Governor Mario M. Cuomo Bridge”. Proudly send the message that you want the bridge restored as the Tappan Zee. | Are you interested in staying up-to-date on Mike Lawler's reelection battle? Don't miss out on the latest news and updates from his campaign! By texting "Lawler" to 85007, you can receive regular updates on Mike's campaign, upcoming events, and important news about the race. Text "Lawler" to 85007 today and join the fight for a brighter future for New York!_ Do you know someone who would be interested in supporting Mike Lawler’s reelection campaign for Congress? Simply forward this message to five of your friends or family members who you think would be interested in staying up-to-date with Mike's campaign. To stay up-to-date with our latest news and events, we encourage you to text "Lawler" to 85007 and follow us on social media, where we share updates, thoughts, and news about our progress. You can also opt others in by providing their email address and we will send them regular updates and important news about the campaign. | go.txting.io/7jAGfc Let's work together to ensure that Mike Lawler has the support he needs to make a real difference for New York! | | | | | = \- ==
